Friend,

It’s time again....
**📣 IRENE! ALL ELEMENTS IRENE! 📣**

That was the sign that it was go-time in the Battle of Mogadishu, and it’s our sign that it’s go-time in our campaign to beat the Career Politicians.

**When Mike Durant heard the word “Irene,” he knew it was time to go into battle and fight for our country.** He was the pilot of Black Hawk helicopter Super Six Four, which you might recognize from the movie Black Hawk Down. Mike put his life on the line and was held prisoner by a Somali warlord for 11 days. He’s ready to fight for freedom once more. **[Will you fight for freedom with Mike?](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=570867d982664c45bfc564f05cd8d899&_e=pz35bN4LhNcCbFFKHU5Jw4uj6vUUHPpPR1Q83i2vDxGHLVUS8ESCPVeUjUg8sX_BlNdE5_ZUNRXnooWt7vmzjScuHp83hB_njDEibM6p1nHANKExOi4qmR7-_8pQe8fQPoQEeg1KVGGumXHoL0S-Om7OssIzqhl2v1sA9fHeFWVf6rFcZs2Bt_2F5ksa7bCUD6seXpNtHWo6IdT6kySQ-M7cDYte0ldT7kWPQPYmJejiCBABH9WGYw9nuaAHNekt9AgpmfkboEuLe4ExTWLQHyrbiNQ3LVxEMp1fPFWihu623rnm3C08cMP7_ZNtNjk-II2wGFFwiIFw2iSD_NHOujHt_E8nyaTX8uweoStod5kTV7XnLgQgQLTcHlzxJP_nTWNyMJwpDtFSRoU5t51xkVNw4GpeSo0G2C4zVNZ1kGoTzkxTXE63WAKrPlCpjDnSFOLdU1xSQYN1L_PIKd3kN2E5m_XyQUBEEtBjziP_u88gIc2QKTCvSMR0kAKXvM_fqsquVD7MMeLlq8N1Up_K2A%3D%3D)**

He won’t let Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the Squad run this country into the ground any longer -- **he’s ready to stand up and promote the America First agenda of Donald Trump, not the America Last one of Joe Biden.**

But Mike can’t do this without your help. They despise that the Wyoming GOP has removed Liz Cheney from the State Party. And they are furious that WE ARE WINNING! They are so angry over our America First movement that they need to attack YOU and me. Liz Cheney calls anyone who disagrees with her “crazy.” In Wyoming, we understand that when you are under attack, especially by big government bureaucrats and elitists, it’s time to fight back. clean_body: | | | | It’s time for a change. | Peter - With over 200 days until the Primary Election day, our opponent, the FAKE news, and the DC Swamp have begun attacking us. They HATE that President Trump, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik have endorsed our campaign. They despise that the Wyoming GOP has removed Liz Cheney from the State Party. And they are furious that WE ARE WINNING! They are so angry over our America First movement that they need to attack YOU and me. Liz Cheney calls anyone who disagrees with her “crazy.” In Wyoming, we understand that when you are under attack, especially by big government bureaucrats and elitists, it’s time to fight back. Our opponent and the DC elites will do whatever it takes to maintain power, even if they have to attack the very backbone of this country. That is why it is so important to make sure our campaign message is spread as far and wide as possible. You have been so important to our campaign, please don’t let us down when we need your most Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Wyoming’s Lone Congressional Seat | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: I have a question for Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
United + ruthless.
#
Derek, I have a question for you.
**What if Democrats were united and ruthless like Republicans, and got some transformative legislation passed for the American people? 🇺🇸**
What if *every* Democrat prioritized working people?
What if we actually cared? Not about shady donors or special interests, but actual working families across America?
Imagine what we could do.
If you’re ready, I’m asking you to go beyond imagining and take action...[** _chip in any amount you can to help send me to the U.S. Senate, where I’ll proudly cast the 51st vote Democrats need to lower health care costs, pass a living wage, strengthen unions, and so much more._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45432?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5016&t=1&akid=5016%2E434096%2ExrXljM)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45432?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5016&t=20&akid=5016%2E434096%2ExrXljM)**
From serving as Mayor of Braddock, PA to serving all of PA as Lieutenant Governor to running a grassroots-funded campaign for the U.S. Senate, I’m in this for folks like you, Derek. Always have been, always will be.
I’m the kind of Democrat you can count on in the Senate. Because I’d NEVER stand in the way of President Biden’s people-first agenda out of self-interest. Instead, you can count on me to spend every day fighting for things working Pennsylvanians (and Americans) need.
That’s why (and I couldn’t be prouder of this) our campaign has received a staggering **500,000 donations** , with **99% coming from grassroots folks** like you. Not only that, we’ve got **donors in all 67 PA counties** , including ones Trump won in a landslide in 2016.
We’re a campaign by and for the people, and we’re stronger than our millionaire opponents ever could be. 💪💪💪
And we’re going to run this race the right way up until Election Day. But the truth is, we need all the support we can get if we're going to keep up our momentum and continue the hard work of building a campaign that will flip this seat blue.
**[If it makes sense for your budget, will you make your first $5 donation to our true grassroots campaign? I’m proud to not take a cent from corporate funders and PACs — so I’m really counting on a lot of folks from Crescoto build a campaign that can win.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45432?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5016&t=21&akid=5016%2E434096%2ExrXljM)**
Thank you so much for all that you do. I hope you're proud of all that you have done to fight for the Democratic Senate majority working people deserve.
Keep it going,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220317-5016-footer&t=22&refcode2=5016_434096_xrXljM&akid=5016%2E434096%2ExrXljM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5016%2E434096%2ExrXljM)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Fighting Corruption, RINOs and Lockdown Politicians
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fighting_corruption_rinos&n=1)
---
Peter \-- We're three months into an election year and things are really heating up. **Politics is the adjudication of power - those in power, don't want to give it up!** But our mission at Action 4 Liberty is to protect liberty for the next generation, which means we have to fight against those in power. And that's why they HATE US! I mean, they REALLY hate us. I'm sure you've heard the Political Class attack us with vicious lies and deceitful statements. They're threatened by the fact that [we expose their corruption](https://www.action4liberty.com/corruption_in_morrison_county_activists_prevail?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fighting_corruption_rinos&n=2). And the RINOs and vulnerable Democrat politicians are angry that a large, well organized group is finally willing to expose their terrible voting records.
## GOOD!
As you can imagine, the Political Class would love for us to fail. They don't want a powerful, conservative, grassroots army setting the record straight. Lucky for you, we refuse to give up. But we'll be forced to if we don't start building up our election year war chest. We're on the cusp of having a big year and I need your help. There's only one organization dedicated to fighting corruption, RINOs and lockdown politicians in Minnesota - and that's Action 4 Liberty. **We need to build the war chest up by $5k by the end of the week so we can keep funding our field operations. subject: St. Patrick’s Day: My immigrantgreat-grandmother’s dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAQqTxG_UXnvL1IWCtFNu7AN4kLb6PSvLzeSyGLp-HeatTTBcOPpkCorN3Gqnz0hj1H-j93CPHSRHLkhor9fFP_0gUIR_A7bH8GVHJlNiij7w5agMqkMz4WuKt2U_BB9SRM9VhQKGeWZ7ZGB7ew3VKgpWBsPjVij9DSEtuZP9FkbShlQ4QtdHKy4PXF_1c-8EKqqWO1oXcnFsJFgjdM-xwh1hQY5E_cPxCls-IfOyL63PnJnvHCSUS7LFSV5FrmAeBycRgYRN2nf5ouu2VdfIUrjL6DqG8wo7YEcxwGlam7fZH5WZoOMJ1JIm_xSH8VxipnmLaNSBgLRCtdzH39RYAMnxhBQ86qnsgAQ8IS1Z96Jofdl7oWRjPMEK7hfVLtNgqs/3kg/x6inxdK6TGSey2_MQsaJ9A/h0/J7Y4z2gd7pKV6IlFqeD91uAyHjUKyF07HO7dOZb60lA)
---
Happy St. Patrick's Day, Peter Willis!
Now, I may have an Italian last name, but our family celebrates St. Patrick’s Day like it’s Christmas:
☘️ Decorations ✔️
☘️ Cookies ✔️
☘️ Guinness Stew ✔️
☘️ Kids in matching outfits ✔️
☘️ Presents for the kids ✔️
This holiday has the same emotional resonance for me that Christmas or Hanukkah or Ramadan has for others. It brings back memories of gathering with family and friends, sharing a meal together, and remembering our Irish roots.
**St. Patrick’s Day is also a reminder that our nation is a nation of immigrants.**
My great-grandmother, Annie, immigrated to New York from Ireland many, many years ago. She didn’t have much, but because of the opportunities this country gave her, she was able to build a better life for herself (she also opened a race car track, but that's a _much_ longer story). Along the way, she raised a big, loving family right here on Long Island.
My great-grandmother’s story is the embodiment of the American dream. I don’t think she ever could have imagined her great-granddaughter running for Congress, but that wealth of opportunity, and the ability to give your children a better life than you ever dreamed for yourself, is what makes our country special.
**But for far too many families, especially here in New York’s 3rd District, which has some of the worst income inequality in the nation, that American dream is out of reach.** I’m running to change that and to restore the America that brought my great-grandmother here so many years ago.
So many people say that progressive policies — Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, making the uber-rich pay their fair share, and ending the lobbyist-backed corruption that’s taken over our politics — are radical attempts to permanently alter American structures, institutions, and values. But in reality, the progressive agenda is about _reaffirming_ what has always been at the center of the American experiment: opportunity for ALL of its people.
Lá fhéile pádraig sona daoibh go léir — Happy St Patrick's day to you all!
Melanie

[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAQqTxG_UXnvL1IWCtFNu7ANWjwBEiy0og1yexFZ-2FEjq2p-BiEY3Lg2ze2WkAm4IDM1IISJ9gobF9OFnNE3VTBDHwBaibtT88N7STxARaDNY58HdzOv62wfm7_VrMj6urY9V6zSV4Ext5OfzLGYJF7Zng2Wk92vU5zZpXo6jdKpTB_Hnhe_oNpfIq1oSTFtrOaJHaXc_Hu_-LwvIWyBMmfXy3quV_aJE0zP8rQHlGY3P9uYdEWCLxo0_EIKUjngOH6EZzOcvMn1LqJr5X01KyA89CoDbclMY-lM1QBn5l0ccZapsFdC0DUOaLNBI6DNUEKohfNFqNE0rg7sjbrK8GAwDfiAD_iy-LqvMwC5kvBBtzQDo6Bx0RZe_0np0d0WUs/3kg/x6inxdK6TGSey2_MQsaJ9A/h1/Su0Egs19Ola0n30FSp_YkERNcNGnq2HxY5Nnnfh5f3A)

clean_body: | | | | Happy St. Patrick's Day, Peter Willis! Now, I may have an Italian last name, but our family celebrates St. Patrick’s Day like it’s Christmas: ☘️ Decorations ✔️ ☘️ Cookies ✔️ ☘️ Guinness Stew ✔️ ☘️ Kids in matching outfits ✔️ ☘️ Presents for the kids ✔️ This holiday has the same emotional resonance for me that Christmas or Hanukkah or Ramadan has for others. It brings back memories of gathering with family and friends, sharing a meal together, and remembering our Irish roots. St. Patrick’s Day is also a reminder that our nation is a nation of immigrants. My great-grandmother, Annie, immigrated to New York from Ireland many, many years ago. She didn’t have much, but because of the opportunities this country gave her, she was able to build a better life for herself (she also opened a race car track, but that's a much longer story). Along the way, she raised a big, loving family right here on Long Island. My great-grandmother’s story is the embodiment of the American dream. I don’t think she ever could have imagined her great-granddaughter running for Congress, but that wealth of opportunity, and the ability to give your children a better life than you ever dreamed for yourself, is what makes our country special. But for far too many families, especially here in New York’s 3rd District, which has some of the worst income inequality in the nation, that American dream is out of reach. I’m running to change that and to restore the America that brought my great-grandmother here so many years ago. So many people say that progressive policies — Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, making the uber-rich pay their fair share, and ending the lobbyist-backed corruption that’s taken over our politics — are radical attempts to permanently alter American structures, institutions, and values. But in reality, the progressive agenda is about reaffirming what has always been at the center of the American experiment: opportunity for ALL of its people. Lá fhéile pádraig sona daoibh go léir — Happy St Patrick's day to you all! Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. It’s not enough that in 2019 Missouri became one of the first states to ban abortions performed after 8 weeks. A [new bill proposed last week](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43089493/335662735/-2013374963?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2QwODBiZi01MGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VtM7ZTATPVJl-mfDUGTvoDT3HblpOR4TVf1IrG1M3yg=&emci=c829c3f5-22a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a7d080bf-50a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14943357) _**would make performing an abortion before 10 weeks of pregnancy a class A felony, carrying a potential punishment of ten years to life in prison.**_ This new law would apply to ectopic pregnancies, which are not viable pregnancies and are dangerous and life-threatening to the mother. There’s no easy way to say this, so I’ll just be straightforward: **what we are seeing in my state is a slide toward a far-right agenda that is bent on control, and based on shaky legal reasoning. ** But make no mistake: their repressive agenda doesn’t stop with abortions—if they succeed, birth control, including contraception will be on the chopping block. If that sounds like an exaggeration to you, consider how far the GOP has shifted to the extreme right on healthcare and reproductive healthcare in the last decade. I am running my campaign to be inclusive to the thousands of voters in this district who are also disgusted by what we’re seeing from Ann Wagner and the GOP, but may need convincing to vote for a Democrat. I need your support to persuade this broad coalition of voters to send a clear and unmistakable message that there is no room for far-right extremism in our politics. name: Tim
subject: This is the longest email I’ll ever send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ][IMG]

This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, so I hope you’ll read the
whole thing.

I want to share our game plan for flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat
blue—when you’re running in a swing state that Trump won, you can’t leave
anything to chance.

That’s why I have to ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Will you make a $25 donation to help us on
the road to victory to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Chip in

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step One: Talk to Folks in Every Corner of Ohio

Working class Ohioans, in our big cities and our small towns, know what
it’s like to be left out and left behind. I won’t be that kind of Senator.

We kicked off this campaign by launching a Workers First Tour. Since then,
we’ve been traveling all over Ohio—visiting union halls, factories,
restaurants, and even a few bars—to hear from folks about the challenges
they’re facing.

The truth is, a lot of people don’t trust politicians, and they have every
reason to be skeptical. The only way to break through that is to look
someone in the eye, shake their hand, and let them see that you don’t have
eight heads.

The opposition might be spending millions of dollars on attack ads, but
your donations allow me to do what matters—show up and meet folks
face-to-face.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Two: Stand Up to Special Interests and Put Workers First

I’ve made more than a few headlines for getting loud (okay, outright
yelling) on the House floor, because when it comes to speaking up for the
hardworking people out there busting their rear ends every day, I’ll never
hold my tongue.

Whether it’s China, Big Pharma, a corporate giant trying to ship jobs
overseas, or a member of my own party—I’m not afraid to take on anyone who
tries to leave our workers high and dry.

If that puts a target on my back, so be it.

My opponents can rely on the steady support of dark-money groups, but I’m
proud to run a campaign that’s powered by grassroots supporters like
you—not right-wing special interests and tech billionaires.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Three: Focus On The Issues That Matter

The vast majority of Americans are working harder and longer, making less,
and falling further behind. CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our
seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their
medications.

You wouldn’t know it from listening to my GOP opponents though—all they do
is yell about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue
and expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and
Dr. Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter.

It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or
Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio
a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education.

Republicans are trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear
because they know that when it comes down to the issues that actually make
a difference for working families, they’ll lose every time.

That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the
resources to get our message out over all this GOP nonsense.

I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing
alone. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $25 so we can
carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers
in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1012&amount=25&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1013&amount=50&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1014&amount=100&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1015&amount=200&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1016&amount=250&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9164?t=1008&amount=30&akid=2840%2E3611125%2Ek7YJUO ]Other Amount

Thanks for your support,

Tim

Friend,

body:
Check out our newsletter! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/elections-have-consequences-15926815?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | March 17, 2022 Hi Friends, It’s almost here and it’s going to be awesome. The Freedom Tour will be coming next Monday and Tuesday, March 21-22 and I want YOU to be there. It’s time for us all to Reclaim, Restore, and Renew our nation, our faith, and our hope. I’m honored to share the platform with my good friends Rick Green and Rob McCoy. These are two men who I hold in great respect, and I want YOU to hear the important message they have to share. Rick is the founder of “Patriot Academy” and is known as “America’s Constitution Coach.” Rick Green has an important message for every American today. You’ll learn about the secrets that have created the amazing nation in which we live and the importance of sharing these truths with our children. America’s future is at stake. Rob McCoy has been the Senior Pastor of Godspeak Calvary Chapel in Thousand Oaks, CA for the past 17 years. He also has an extensive history in upper level corporate management and is the former mayor of Thousand Oaks. No one I know has a better handle on the intersection of faith and public policy, and I’m excited to have you hear his vital message for our nation. I’m proud to be friends with these two men and so honored to have their endorsement. I want ALL of you to hear their wisdom as we head into the heart of my Congressional campaign for Washington’s CD3. Bring your children and your friends. You don’t want to miss these important events. Please help me get to Congress by **[_donating today_](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=6133dcd012&e=b0bcc6b4f9)**. We’re coming up to our March 31 fundraising deadline!

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, SW Washington_
Standing Up For What We Believe

clean_body: Check out our newsletter! | | | | | | | | | | March 17, 2022 Hi Friends, It’s almost here and it’s going to be awesome. The Freedom Tour will be coming next Monday and Tuesday, March 21-22 and I want YOU to be there. It’s time for us all to Reclaim, Restore, and Renew our nation, our faith, and our hope. I’m honored to share the platform with my good friends Rick Green and Rob McCoy. These are two men who I hold in great respect, and I want YOU to hear the important message they have to share. Rick is the founder of “Patriot Academy” and is known as “America’s Constitution Coach.” Rick Green has an important message for every American today. You’ll learn about the secrets that have created the amazing nation in which we live and the importance of sharing these truths with our children. America’s future is at stake. Rob McCoy has been the Senior Pastor of Godspeak Calvary Chapel in Thousand Oaks, CA for the past 17 years. He also has an extensive history in upper level corporate management and is the former mayor of Thousand Oaks. No one I know has a better handle on the intersection of faith and public policy, and I’m excited to have you hear his vital message for our nation. I’m proud to be friends with these two men and so honored to have their endorsement. I want ALL of you to hear their wisdom as we head into the heart of my Congressional campaign for Washington’s CD3. Bring your children and your friends. You don’t want to miss these important events. Please help me get to Congress by . We’re coming up to our March 31 fundraising deadline! name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: While Democrats Lie, Putin Gets Stronger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
**LYING DEMOCRATS!** Peter, For four years Democrats kept us focused on Trump's Russian Collusion HOAX, saying he was "owned by Putin," and weak on Russia. In just one year at the helm, Biden and the Democrats have led us into an international crisis by allowing Russia to gain the upper hand. The bombshell Durham Report revealed what we knew all along; Hillary Clinton's campaign infiltrated Trump's servers and orchestrated the "Russian Collusion" hoax. _The media and the democrats relentlessly nurtured this false narrative to take down a sitting president!_ **Hillary Clinton said this is a FAKE SCANDAL!_When will the lies stop??_** **What else will Democrats do to win an election?** **[We MUST DRAIN THE SWAMP in order to protect our American values of Life and Liberty and I need your help to succeed!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59860174:JpmdqQocN:m:1:3103520637:65487F5FF021AAAF7856D6763BEC1C6A:r "We MUST DRAIN THE SWAMP in order to protect our American values of
Life and Liberty and I need your help to succeed!")** Thanks to DEMOCRAT lies, we are now saddled with the DISASTROUS Biden-Harris administration, a crumbling United States and we are headed towards a world war. Open borders, spiking crime, lawlessness, catastrophic fentanyl drug overdoses, outrageous gas prices, helpless parents battling militant school boards, UNVETTED illegal immigrants being flown all over the United States in the middle of the night, and law-abiding American citizens being treated like criminals. **[The time to FIGHT BACK is NOW! Your donation of $100, $50, $25, whatever you can afford, is necessary for us to PUT AN END to the Democrats' corruption!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59860174:JpmdqQocN:m:1:3103520637:65487F5FF021AAAF7856D6763BEC1C6A:r "The
time to FIGHT BACK is NOW! Your donation of $100, $50, $25, whatever you can afford, is necessary for us to PUT AN END to the Democrats’
corruption!")** I am Congressman Andy Biggs, co-Chair of the Border Security Caucus, and there is nothing more important to me than **stopping the Democrats from destroying America.** Mandates, vaccine passports, children forced to wear masks and an ever-increasing socialist school system, _of which parents are told they should play no part._ All of this, orchestrated by the Democrats to control our lives and it's backfiring. **[WE MUST STOP THE DEMOCRATS from fundamentally transforming our country._Isn 't it already unrecognizable?_ JOIN ME in taking our country BACK!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59860174:JpmdqQocN:m:1:3103520637:65487F5FF021AAAF7856D6763BEC1C6A:r "WE MUST STOP THE DEMOCRATS from fundamentally
transforming our country. Isn’t it already unrecognizable? JOIN ME in taking our country BACK!")** In the past few weeks, we watched in disbelief as Canada changed overnight, and an unprovoked Russia started a horrendous war with Ukraine. **It 's only a matter of time before it happens here IF WE DO NOT DO SOMETHING NOW TO TURN THE TABLES ON THE DEMOCRATS!** As the Durham Report showed us, the Democrats are full of deceit and will stop at **NOTHING** to get what they want. And what they want is for us to shut up, sit down and fall in line. **[Donate $100, $50, $25 or anything you can, in this critical battle to restore our GOD GIVEN liberties!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59860174:JpmdqQocN:m:1:3103520637:65487F5FF021AAAF7856D6763BEC1C6A:r "Donate $100, $50, $25 or anything you can, in this critical
battle to restore our GOD GIVEN liberties!")** The time to act is NOW. America First, Andy Biggs
Congressman, Arizona's 5th District
---

---

name: Dinner with President Trump via Team Scalise
subject: Congratulations: Confirm Your Selection Immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This calls for the celebration of a millenia
Peter, if you could sit across from President Trump at the dinner table while being served fine wine in the nicest restaurant in Texas, _what would you talk about?_
Until now, many could only dream of meeting their America First hero...
But that all changes today for you, Peter, because we're extending you an opportunity that any proud Republican would take in a heartbeat.
**Would you like to dine with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump?**
_Your Reservation with President Trump:_
[**PENDING**] _Trump Patriot:_
[**CONFIRMED**] ****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862929:Jkyt4QoNP:m:1:3253819041:5C7F23DDDA25C058CFF10B81224DC45C:r)****
---
Few Republicans have been selected for the potential to win this prestigious honor. And only ONE will sit face-to-face with President Trump.
That could be you Peter, but we'll never know if you're the lucky winner unless you confirm your interest right now. The sole winner of this prestigious honor will be selected soon, and we would hate to see you miss your chance.
****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862929:Jkyt4QoNP:m:1:3253819041:5C7F23DDDA25C058CFF10B81224DC45C:r)****
_**If dining with President Trump isn 't enough to convince you, maybe this will...**_
_We 'll pay for your flight to Dallas, Texas. We'll pay for your hotel. AND we'll cover every penny of your VIP dinner experience with Donald J. Trump._
Imagine the smile on your face when you dine with the man who always puts our country first.
_THAT is an experience no one could ever forget._
[**Make it a reality today and confirm your interest in dining with President Trump, before you lose your chance forever.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862929:Jkyt4QoNP:m:1:3253819041:5C7F23DDDA25C058CFF10B81224DC45C:r)
In kind,
**Dinner with President Trump Notifications** | _Sent via Team Scalise_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003
---

name: Donald Trump
subject: Miss me yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | Peter,

I've got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: Do you MISS ME YET?

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. Guess what? I was right! I hate to say it, but I was right.
It's painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that's what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.
Take a moment to let me know if you miss me and the AMERICA FIRST policies my team and I put into place during our FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.
****[MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59863285:6_2eOQomN:m:1:3317145305:BBFF9BCAADB3AD7EB393A6F9599A2515:r)** **
I'd like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. tonight so don't wait - let us know if you want us back in office.
I'd ask my supporters the same question I'm asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn't like what I had to say! Wonder why he hasn't banned Putin yet...
Thanks for your support, Donald Trump
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
Leftist teachers groomed her children
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ccimivk0106nsr9ghd0235jbrmcg6b6fsu0omg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdnmkqj5cph6eq39o9lm6qm8t9nmpijcpthe6pj3cjlegq38pdiedh74tll65rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephhmiqjadtiedj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi8pn5lltsn9iqv25d0g2jst8eum9gmh2n169p90_) Dear Fellow Conservative, Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she’s a “boy” and hid it from her mother... So, we’re dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children. [**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I’m asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can’t brainwash any more children.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhdnrshjf3a70gv0qq3scg9igm7onseb3cd93jeg_) In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you. One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a “boy.” What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual. Her daughter didn’t even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs... The teachers recruited Jessica’s daughter to join their “Equality Club” where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual. The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom. They even created a “Gender Support Plan” for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother’s knowledge. And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica’s daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn’t be “trusted**.” The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening... They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children’s education. Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control... It’s disgusting. It’s awful. And we have to stop them. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. [**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fpefd91aqeho2clcmf81bm6bk9208abfblsd98_) You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions... Because the only way we’re going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court. The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica’s daughter is just one example. We know the California Department of Education and the teachers’ associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents... Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned? Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views. And we have an opportunity to stop it. This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court**! They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual. But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case... That’s why I’m asking for your help immediately today. [_**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?** _](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfrefqokundvuv2jlnd4nt7ev940vgjonerel6o_) And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits -- we **WIN****** them!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends**. I’ve been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We’ve already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court. We’re also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it’s one we cannot afford to lose. [**That’s why, I’m asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv01hj6sufnotqfdgo95j2fp6dvlahe2fh9im41g_) So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they’ll know that we’re watching and are ready to drag them into court... That is the only way we’re going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions! With your help, we’ll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we’ll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won’t get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights. Thank you in advance for your support. **God Bless,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs57k32hob2rarf3k1e55soras74u9j3c2s0aj08_) P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual. They helped her change into a “boy” with a new identity a new name and new pronouns -- **and told her to hide it from her mother.** Now we’re dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win. [That’s why I’m asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children. ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmi32u52kbr71dljj01lnid10ddeso3jr0pgnpg_) We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too! [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3sjdllqnhk4igfb5bim5aki3bklg3v76kbbkfu0_) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3g2am3fr6dgejqhg151iq4v6eakp4uhf91t2sn8_) [**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsrmn6llbuibns89p5l66sh5s7c2c5njeinavmv8_) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5vunfggqlc6d7olr2dmn906h9j1thgrld44d1lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor6clh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: I won't back down to BLM!
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-r/) Friends,Do you remember what happened to me?

In June of 2020, 350 to 500 Antifa rioters attacked my home while my wife, daughter, and I were there alone. We exercised our 2nd Amendment right and held off the mob.

Many in the same situation would likely have left their home, but I didn't back down. I doubled down, protected my family and secured my home.

Check out my conversation with Tucker Carlson about it: [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-y/) But the mob wasn't done yet. 1000 rioters came back days later. With the help of almost two dozen armed patriots, we stood up for what is right despite the dire personal risks! We turned back the mob and achieved peace through superior firepower when they reached our house the second night.

Now, as a lifelong strong Christian constitutional conservative, I am running for US Senate in Missouri to defend our country with the same strength that I defended my family and home!

**I will never** **back down** and I **will never let the socialists achieve their goals.**

**But I need your continued help. Will you send in a generous contribution of **[**$10**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-j/)**, **[**$25**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-t/)**, **[**$50**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-i/)**, **[**$100**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-d/)**, or **[**even $200**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-h/)** TODAY?**

Patty and I are outsiders. I am the only person running for US Senate in Missouri that is not now and has never been a politician. And the day of the career politician is over.

The politicians have failed us too many times!

We are the greatest country on earth. At our core, we are designed to completely reject the socialist policies of the Biden administration. But we need leaders willing to fight to get us there. I promise you, I'll be that **_leader_**. I'll be that **_fighter_**. **Will you help me get there?** [HELP AN OUTSIDER DEFEAT THE FAILED ESTABLISHMENT](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-o/) [DONATE NOW](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-b/) Thank you in advance,
Mark McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-n/) _McCloskey for US Senate_ [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-p/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-x/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-m/) | [McCloskeyforSenate](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-typdudy-bjututkitk-c/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108-2103 [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-typdudy-9A790A88-bjututkitk-q) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-typdudy-bjututkitk-a/)

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: Would I fight or flee?
body:
I served as a U.S. Army intelligence officer in Ukraine, and I know first-hand how brave the Ukrainian people are. They are
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeb5v7f4bfnh69q51vg5kilk5333ghg5v80m1iko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq72sj4mgp66s73epqecpjgserjeoj669r36ptmcho7ccr6etgb9orjeqrb9d5gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd1getjmcc9kmdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jmap77cdi60oh5u)
Fellow conservative, I served as a U.S. Army intelligence officer in Ukraine, and I know first-hand how brave the Ukrainian people are. _They are fighting on the front lines of combat to defend themselves from the merciless Russian aggressors, and are showing the rest of the world what it means to be a leader._ _ _ Here at home, I’m afraid the Woke Left takes our country for granted. A recent poll showed over half of Democrats would rather flee the country than fight for America. They’ve forgotten the sacrifices of Americans before us who fought for our opportunity at liberty and the pursuit of happiness. **[Let me pose this question. If America were under attack, would you rather stay and fight, or flee the country? ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcfei5drk25c2kuv08eq7it14as9huoug5h6gdvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor4c1h2bs)** [**Stay and Fight for America**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg1kffergpn4regg82o9g0upjk94acfui83sdeug_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor4c1h2bs) [**Flee the Country**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm379a3skfrl050slrbi96v5cqkf393j9q7vvle8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor4c1h2bs) This is an ideological conflict that will shape the future of America. We cannot allow the Woke Left to indoctrinate our nation’s children and strip them of national pride while Russian aggression threatens our allies abroad. We must remind them how America came to be, and we must elect leaders who are willing to fight for our country the same way generations before us fought for the America we know. **As a U.S. Congressman, I will ALWAYS be on the front-lines fighting for OUR America.** **Can I count on your support? ** [**Donate**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdra2fi4mk62ttbstgfk188qd8tdo8j1lqcgiig_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor4c1h2bs) Thank You, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zned3ibv0kpbbqpd0h05roddaomsrq45ln4gp9r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clieeor4c1h2bs) Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: We need to talk...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

Joe Biden's allowed over **2,000,000 illegal aliens** to invade America.

Human traffickers, drug smugglers, and violent criminals pour into our nation.

Being America First means securing America's border first.

But, the crisis at the southern border is about to spiral out of control.

**That's because Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer just rammed a $1.5 trillion-dollar socialist spending spree through Congress.**

And this big government blowout does not spend one penny for the border wall.

I fought alongside President Trump to build the wall when the RINOs and Democrats tried to sabotage the centerpiece of the Make America Great Again agenda.

Now I need your help to fight to finish Trump's wall and slam the brakes on Joe Biden's open borders lawlessness.

**[Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 to help me elect a pro-Trump America First majority that will fire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r)?**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) [_**Help Me Elect an American First Majority to Congress - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) 200,000 illegal aliens invade our country on a monthly basis.

**_And what is Joe Biden's response?_**

Proposing amnesty to lure millions of more illegal aliens to America in hopes of stealing the next election by making them all voters.

But I put securing America's border first, and I make no apologies for doing so.

I don't just talk the talk. _That's what RINOs do_.

I understand that the role of Congress is to support and defend the Constitution... of the United States. Not of another nation.

_That means leading the fight to_ :
---
*** **OPPOSE** all amnesty for illegal aliens. *** **DEFUND** lawless sanctuary cities like San Francisco. *** **FINISH** the wall.
**[Will you stand with me in the fight to put America First and end the illegal alien invasion by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r)?**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) [_**Help Me Elect an American First Majority to Congress - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) **Standing for America First makes you a marked man in the swamp.**

The Deep State staged a coup against Donald Trump, inventing the Russian collusion hoax because President Trump dared to say the forgotten men and women of America were his highest priority.

**And now the Democrats, Never Trumpers, fake news media, and Big Tech are after me.**

Adam Schiff, Liz Cheney, and the rest of Nancy Pelosi's handpicked stooges on the sham January 6 Committee want to block America First conservatives like me from running for office.

_I'm facing the worst type of cancel culture imaginable_.

And it's all because I told the truth that Congress must secure our border first and stop Joe Biden's illegal alien invasion.

**This is a fight you and I can win.**

But not without your help.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r).**

Thank you for all that you do. [_**Help Me Elect an American First Majority to Congress - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) | | | [ Chip in $10 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) |
---|---|---
| [ Chip in $25 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) |
| [ Chip in $50 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) |
| [ Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) |
| [ Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59817719:Wper3XHNG:m:1:2365227053:55E269F15088A0D51751E1520368CA51:r) |
Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

This staggering number proves it. The Left's army of Trump-hating megadonors will do anything to defeat us and Democrats are CASHING IN. We can still defeat them but only with the support from EVERY LAST ONE of our Pro-Trump American Patriots.
When the stakes are this high, even just ten bucks can make a huge difference. Can I count on you to help save the day? I certainly hope so.
**[Pitch In Ten Bucks >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59865190:JTr_gQoNW:m:1:3317145305:B9B0BBD281BA311A700FC33472FA3A52:r)**

Look, I can't stand asking you for money. If there was another back-up plan, I would not be emailing you right now. **Unfortunately, this is an emergency.**
Democrat fundraising is SURGING and we are completely out of options.
If you consider yourself a Pro-Trump American Patriot, here's how we win: [**everyone reading this _\-- including you --_ must pitch in a few bucks by tonight. Can you help?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59865191:JTr_gQoNW:m:1:3317145305:B9B0BBD281BA311A700FC33472FA3A52:r)
To victory,

name: Great America Update
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6747%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cKZe5ppKhBsL5ytBOKA8eg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ofS8tISbGPyci2rchi2uWQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69327%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cw%2fLw7htSfccR1qrXygJ9Q&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ofS8tISbGPyci2rchi2uWQ&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69328%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8rcO1Jg0f6%2fGc5Sd5UoMAA&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6747%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cKZe5ppKhBsL5ytBOKA8eg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6747%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cKZe5ppKhBsL5ytBOKA8eg&sysid=1)

| Newhouse Votes for Anti-gun Bill--Again.
---
| | |
---|---
|

Late last week, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi dropped at [2,700-page Omnibus Spending Bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017MXuWwVrL3hYR5KmzXahxp26M7bCZvT_TQ26OSTtvTPvCpOVPtuYypgnwt4g62NyapdQGSpEoKMQSpnowujIO1v8L3RTaHUcGa8xlImLVZNJd8ZoR_mWNzNvtE5hNERCjAF8TD9VhKohnqFt3ZuNkfFfIyBjQHSU&c=jyuwD3LcBCsa5JDv6If6BTRsDCneMrh7qb8cWQkrSd6XxjlLdc2gXw==&ch=dIes_xdLKj6MRHR6-4vreFQnhorMxkgBcRz-vfzdwGl5QpmKWqcHvw==) filled with all types of financial goodies for the political insiders and special interest groups, and anti-gun legislation in the middle of the night (1:30 AM to be exact). Within 48 hours BOTH the House and the Senate passed a bill they hadn't even read. In an election year where he represents the most conservative Congressional District in Washington State, you'll never guess how Congressman Newhouse voted: He was 1 of only 39 Republicans to vote Yes on a bill he hadn't even read and support Pelosi and the Democrat gun grab efforts (in addition to spending $1.5 Trillion of money we don't have. And you and I will be the one to pay for it). I believe he's lost his mind. That or he is simply planning to retire and not run for re-election.

Our friends at the [Gun Owners of America](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017MXuWwVrL3hYR5KmzXahxp26M7bCZvT_TQ26OSTtvTPvCpOVPtuYypgnwt4g62NykSBqELMyWT6saJBR5Vy_X55ROaYxNLh2tgC0OLNnKLLBCbAi551_7bhcCauLztPMpXnMDDPIYmFSupKBSmar0FEwgVEE3HsUBWxEB9czidQ=&c=jyuwD3LcBCsa5JDv6If6BTRsDCneMrh7qb8cWQkrSd6XxjlLdc2gXw==&ch=dIes_xdLKj6MRHR6-4vreFQnhorMxkgBcRz-vfzdwGl5QpmKWqcHvw==) have led the charge against this terrible legislation. On Wednesday at 1:30 AM, the House of Representatives dropped a 2,700+ page, $1.5+ trillion spending bill containing the Violence Against Women Act Reauthorization Act (VAWA) and the NICS Denial Notification Act--both of which included gun control. In Washington State, two of the three Republican members of Congress voted with the Democrats. Only Representative McMorris-Rogers voted to protect gun rights; Representative Newhouse and Beutler voted with Nasty Nancy Pelosi.

Most Republicans stood tall against this bill: 171 House Republicans voted 'No', while 39 House Republicans voted with Nancy Pelosi. 31 Senate Republicans voted 'No', while 18 Republican Senators voted with Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden.

I'm mad. In fact, I'm beyond mad with those who constantly give away our rights and freedoms and screw the American people. That's specifically why I am running for Congress. Am I the only one mad? Are you mad too? There is ONE way to stop this type of nonsense: Win the House and the Senate in November 2022 and send Constitutional conservatives like me to replace the liberal Republicans and the RINOs.

[Will you contribute to stop Newhouse and these liberal Republicans?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017MXuWwVrL3hYR5KmzXahxp26M7bCZvT_TQ26OSTtvTPvCpOVPtuYyq-PAymid21c7W7DjJ7O9Dd5Kg_QwnNylDqAkSD1HguRWpskUE6MIKeLo5A6xvrYbz7_G9IfT6LP3LZC83RIwdid-76Ak0OidOvFb-EGA2CmDzq7qQKKS-Xg3fH62qYeB0F82Uzo7XP5xu8d9SW0N893YYPV1y5S4-NIsUMPMnzs2XhzAlrrViWp4qzPT6J3C-PrDDid-fO_&c=jyuwD3LcBCsa5JDv6If6BTRsDCneMrh7qb8cWQkrSd6XxjlLdc2gXw==&ch=dIes_xdLKj6MRHR6-4vreFQnhorMxkgBcRz-vfzdwGl5QpmKWqcHvw==)

In Liberty,

Loren

name: Jim Jordan
subject: American Bravery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

The Ukrainian people's courage in resisting Vladimir Putin's invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian leaders, soldiers, and civilians fight for their freedom, we should ask ourselves - what do we fight for?
Thank God the United States faces no foreign military attack, but that doesn't mean our freedom is secure. Under Joe Biden's hapless "leadership," our borders, our paychecks, and our constitutional rights are more vulnerable than they have been in decades.
Peace can only be won through strength; freedom can only be won through vigilance. Democrats will use any excuse they can to seize more power. They never stop, so we can't either. Americans must fight for our freedom, or we will lose it.
Please support the House Freedom Fund and their group of conservatives running for Congress this year!
No people ever stayed free by letting elites have their way. Big Business, Big Tech, Big Government are all working overtime, all the time, to collude, censor, and coerce America into wokeness and weakness. Just look at Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's record, in just one year of
power:
▶︎ They spent so much it triggered strangling inflation. Now they say we need more spending to fight inflation.
▶︎ They opened the border because they said walls didn't work. Now there are so many illegal immigrants they say it's too late to build a border wall.
▶︎ Joe Biden wants to spend $30 billion more on Covid, but states still have $800 billion from last year that hasn't been spent yet! It's all a scam, just like their mask mandates, school closures, vaccine mandates, and refusal to allow American energy independence.
America may not be at war, but we still have to fight for our freedom:

To speak the truth about God, men, and women.
To know the truth about the origins of Covid-19.
To have fair and transparent elections.
To produce our own oil and natural gas.
To be patriotic conservatives on social media.

Today, all those things and more are under attack - not from bombs but with algorithms and bureaucracy. They don't just want to rule the economy - they want to control our whole lives.
The only way they will succeed is if we let them.
Americans are inspired by the bravery of the Ukrainians defending their country - but now we need to do the same!
Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their group of candidates running for Congress this year.
You can donate to multiple candidates with a single transaction. HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to their grassroots campaigns.
Thank you for standing strong for freedom. Together, we can stop the Left and secure America's future.

Sincerely,

JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

 

END OF THE MONTHCOUNTDOWN

 

ELECT HOUSE CONSERVATIVES

DONATE

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7p8hio5t49o7jkflp5uk307mvqvgd7jk4u7ugjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp64p9m65qrbcth61r34ohksgpred9ic9pm8ojnmkq36pb1m8o6ccpnckon8sr7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbcr7mpi6cdj2mdg6fc5lclp2bs)

# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_" Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---
Mike B. writes...

_" Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbf8rrmjd9q4tfnhbtj7imnrv66d39gh10in0ooo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze51a7ld3l3etcnc1a2flsvlkkegcnuf5g9283tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_" I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zem5cmh1ccnbubo6ju0r9d879sbrgtbhcf8i3cb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9a2sldt9ibgkjvk66vhl165tlssg94cdef25390_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo2seo673t1s8hv7f5nnfh2s07kc76tgm0at49r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg62o76c1h2bs)

* Results may vary. Everyone's experience with this product is different. Lee's name changed for privacy.
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z73jjjbf4478iqvhnjoen8boephn93ohiok83lb8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hello,
This week, Team Franken filed over 7,000 petition signatures and officially put my name on the ballot against Chuck Grassley. This November, we _will_ retire Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue in ‘22.
This is a race we can win. The polls all show Chuck Grassley”s vulnerability is higher than ever before. His approval ratings have sunk to a low not seen since 1982! **And political pundits are saying that if we win here in Iowa, Democrats are guaranteed to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
We’re running an incredible grassroots campaign – over 31,000 donors like you and not a dime of corporate PAC money. But Mitch McConnell has called in the ‘big guns’ to raise millions of dollars into Super PACs to attack me. We must prepare to fight back.
**We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight to stay on track with our fundraising goals, but right now, we’re still $9,890 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to chip in $5 or more now before our midnight deadline – no amount is too small – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43095375/335697242/-42398318?refcode=em20220318am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTQzYTg1NS1iYmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QhpTzt2Ph5SBiug2Vqm0-zfKmxYEHJXd_V852ci0j4=)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: 12 conservatives canceled by the Left
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Cancel culture runs rampant in America today. Even the slightest critique of any of the Left's sacred beliefs is enough to draw the attention of an angry mob, get you fired, or run your family out of town. It seems that there's no stone they won't overturn to hunt down those who don't fall in line with their way of thinking:
* A 10-year-old tweet that mysteriously resurfaces.
* A past campaign donation.
* A fair and innocent question during a panel discussion at a public university.

More and more people are being "canceled" by the left. And the reality is, it can happen to anyone. It can even happen to you.
---
| | That's why I'm sending you this email today.I'm told that you are a conservative who is concerned about the rising trend of cancel culture. And today, I want to give you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's brand-new eBook, _12 People Canceled by the Left After Expressing Conservative Views_.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-9V8CdkKZdv8rY8g)
---
| | Inside, you'll read the stories of 12 people who were targeted by the Left for what they believe, including:
* An actress who drew historical comparisons to the current political climate breeding hatred and shunning from society.
* A creator of a popular video game series who donated money to several candidates deemed conservative by the Left.
* A student who was banned from campus after questioning a speaker's definition of 'micro-aggressions'.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/twelve-people-canceled-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._1qAysDggT9Uhn4qPZ6glg)** And please share it with your family and friends. If we're going to stop the rising trend of cancel culture, we must inform as many people as possible about its dangers. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development **P.S. As you'll read about in this book, any conservative can be "canceled" for any reason. It doesn't matter if you're a Hollywood actress on a hit television show, a creator of a popular video game series, or a university student exercising free speech on a public campus. Be sure to get your free copy using this secure link right now:[ https://secured.heritage.org/twelve-people-canceled-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDc3LTkwNWFlZmNjYzRiNDRlYmU5NTMzMTA5MTgwYjUzMzIxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/-SAK3n_a9d-Cjd2OarhhuQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Who's side is Liz Cheney on?
body:
Even before she voted to impeach President Trump, fist-bumped Joe Biden, and declared conservative patriots like you to be a dan
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo4kam8u81abt0915oa6ud0c5rb4usqc0p43qui8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj4mhobapbh6aor9or7clo61dbh68or6t9h6do7aohkmgq6ao3jegr6ao9meorjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephh6spm8pti69j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsi5umkldfqr20n5f31ddnli9d985gj3iaffl5qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow Patriot, Whose side is Liz Cheney on? Even before she voted to impeach President Trump, fist-bumped Joe Biden, and declared conservative patriots like _you_ to be a danger to the country, **Liz Cheney was a DC insider working for the establishment elite, not**** _we the people_****.** Is it any wonder the squishy establishment like Paul Ryan, John Boehner, and John Bolton are now working day and night to funnel _millions of dollars_ to her campaign coffers? Or that she's even accepting _Democrat_ donations in her bid to keep power – including donations from billionaire left-wing donors? **Friend, it's clear Liz Cheney long ago sold out**** _we the people_****for her own agenda, including her obsession with the Military Industrial Complex. ** And it's clear that you and I must act quickly to defeat her and take back the Republican Party from people like Cheney, who've put their fealty to the power brokers in Washington, DC and Northern Virginia before our Republic and our Constitution. [**So I must ask: Will you help my primary challenge to defeat Cheney with a $35 or more campaign contribution?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zor4vtkue351djf51o5ojhhfbaaumhomm6450ivo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [**YES, the establishment elite must be stopped**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbrtk93v1nubfip27cqmvgjj0lesua23p1vbrs30_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [**No, I am okay with our country being sold out**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs9ssfbubhnr8ls8qt1f6dfsflearv42q0cbd768_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) Friend, with Cheney raking in millions last quarter, my campaign desperately needs your financial support. But I'm getting ahead of myself. Before you decide to donate your hard-earned money to my campaign, let me tell you who I am and why I need _your_ support now. My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home. Growing up on a ranch outside of Ft. Laramie, I learned from an early age the values of family, faith, community, hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. I tell you this because these aren't just _Wyoming_ values, they're _American_ values, too. They led me on a path as a constitutional lawyer, fighting for the civil rights and property rights of my fellow citizens. I have been fighting back against government overreach—and out of control federal bureaucrats—for decades, having fought head-to-head with everything from Clinton's Forest Service, to Barack Obama's EPA. That's the thing about me. I've dedicated my entire career to **_fighting for the people_** of Wyoming, and not caving to the agenda of the establishment elite or to the demands of the powerful in Washington, DC. The same can't be said for Cheney, who has used the people of Wyoming to advance her own agenda. And ever since President Trump (whose endorsement I proudly have!) left office, she's shown more interest in carrying out _Nancy Pelosi's vendettas_ than she has for standing up for the American people. After all, Liz Cheney isn't investigating what happened in Afghanistan. Liz Cheney isn't investigating MS-13 and our open southern border, Liz Cheney isn't investigating Dr. Fauci and his gain-of-function research. Liz Cheney isn't investigating any of that – _**because she's too busy "investigating" Trump supporters in Nancy Pelosi's Soviet-Style hearings**!_ Well, as one conservative to another, I hope you'll join me in telling Liz Cheney that her days of serving Nancy Pelosi are coming to end. [**And I hope you'll make a $35 or more campaign contribution so I can prevail in this year's Wyoming Republican Primary.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z01dcipiaa3tt4c3rp2otbrpuvtn05914vuj87d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [**DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbkjkf7jd35v66nltu4gea04u3m67uo2ik8sdl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) Over the past few months, Cheney has capitalized on the media's hatred of Donald Trump – hatred only rivaled by her own – to raise millions from Democrats for her campaign war chest. In fact, donor reports show that she even accepted tens of thousands of dollars from the left-wing _billionaire_ cousin of Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker! My friend, I don't know how _any_ Republican can defend taking that kind of money from Democrat donors – nor can I remember a "Republican" who spends more time insulting conservatives than she does rebuking Joe Biden's petty tyranny! But to beat Cheney, and to stand up to Biden and Pelosi in Washington, I'll need your help – especially your financial help. [**So please, would you commit a $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or FEC maximum $2,900 donation to my campaign?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlellr9pammebflj7j633ut4p3u7ru8tlkfhrd6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) I don't want to think about what will happen if Cheney wins this race. Not only will she continue to enable Biden and Pelosi in Congress, but she'll funnel millions to the anti-Trump establishment across the country. [**With so much on the line, know that if you're able to give a larger gift – such as $500, $1,000, or the FEC maximum $2,900 – it will go a long way to sticking it to billionaires backing Cheney, and go a long way in helping us – and Wyoming to win this race.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfo0uj793d527os26kdn05brbofcdgk3jqi8vka8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [**DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2eilerk7905thm0e5l6duosemu6qrhtb1vh70o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) _But no matter how much you can give, please know the most important thing is that you give. And that you do so right away._ My friend, our Republican Party is at a crossroads. _Do we go back to the days of Bush and Romney?_ **Or do we fight for "we the people" like President Trump taught us?** I hope that, by making a donation to FIRE Liz Cheney today, you'll make your voice heard loud and clear. Respectfully, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zetflap0j5su2lviouu9dhbf8gmhod7pdq8f92eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) Harriet Hageman America First Conservative for Congress (WY) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcqvkkjjmnrjkhqtnl8ei6efmtpf6o3f0jnom9e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) **P.S.** It is horrible to see Liz Cheney teaming up with Democrats to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grab in Congress. It's even worse to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America. [**No more – will you give a $35 or more donation to my campaign to defeat her in this year's Republican primary?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrs6k1gdc5mfa1ubqds7hl6s5qpq0f1qtmptbvm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [**DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hs9niq94kqvcsao15244deb9kbtkdmod6tj6k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) [Privacy Policy](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5mtbulsl0vaapi45df96conp8c2ku637io7dabo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdg61ob2cjh2bs) | 2020 All Rights Reserved | info@HagemanforWyoming.com | |
