name: Ashley Ward
subject: Getting Ready for Early Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Hi Peter,
I’ve been very careful not to bombard my mailing list with requests for fundraising. However I’m reaching out now because this is an important moment in the campaign. Early voting begins on April 28th. As exciting as that is, it also means we must prepare now to meet our outreach goals!
Connecting with voters is key to any successful campaign. Outreach materials are expensive for a district that covers FIVE counties with over 100,000 Democratic primary voters! For example, mailing postcards to only 10,000 of those voters is over $5,000. In order to have our outreach materials prepared before early voting begins, we must purchase those materials today.
Would you consider making a donation to my campaign? If you’ve already donated, I thank you. If you’ve been meaning to donate or thinking about donating, I ask that you please send your donation today! Time is critical.
Thank your for your past support! It is crucial that you support this campaign NOW with your donation of $1-$2,900 so that we can reach as many voters as possible before early voting begins.
See you on the campaign trail!
Ashley
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States

# **John Kovacs Feb. - March 2022 Newsletter**
---
|
---
---
**Hello Fellow Patriot!** Thank you for your support in helping me bring my America First conservative agenda to Washington. This newsletter is the fourth in a series that will be sent out to inform supporters about our campaign’s activities, major issues, and events taking place in Nevada, in the Third Congressional District (CD-3), nationally, and around the world. February and early March were a great success, and I hope to build upon this success in the coming months. In the sections that follow, I will highlight our new Election Integrity Center, our new campaign digital ad, top campaign events from February and March, and significant issues facing Nevada and the country. I will then mention our plans for late March and early April, which will see the continuation of our push to win the June primary.
---
[DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f400411ba9fe95fa/6db158fa1aa5dc28c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

---
|
---
# _**The Election Integrity Center: Our Contribution to the Fight for Fair Elections**_
---
For months, Nevada voters have expressed concern about the integrity of the state’s election process. Our campaign shared their concerns and decided to take action to address them. As such, we are proud to introduce our Election Integrity Center, which is now live on our campaign website! It has links to documents and web pages that explain all about the election process, online portals that allow people to register to vote or check their voter registration, and forms that allow people to sign up to be poll workers and mail-in vote counters. It also provides a comprehensive list of key dates leading up to the June primary election. Become informed and get involved in the election process today!
---
# _New Campaign Digital Ad_
---
In February, our campaign launched a new digital ad highlighting all of the important things that make me the best Republican candidate in
CD-3. Click below to learn more.
---

# _**February/Early March-TOP EVENTS**_
---
On February 10th, I went on Kevin Wall's radio show for the first of two interviews during the month. We discussed Governor Steve Sisolak’s decision to lift Nevada’s mask mandate, the Democrats’ political pivot on COVID-19 policies and defunding the police, the Democrats’ politicization of January 6th, 2021, the water crisis in Southern Nevada, and the Beijing Olympics. Click below to listen.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f400411ba9fe95fa/7cd5dbd24a5befa4c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
# [__](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f400411ba9fe95fa/b07feb1af3af99f1c3d6b838967d376c/37373)[_Or Click Here To Listen On YouTube._](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f400411ba9fe95fa/2784505f6fbdbe07c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
On February 24th, I sat for another interview with Kevin Wall. We discussed the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Biden’s weakness on the world stage, the Conservative Political Action Conference in Orlando, and four key issues facing Nevadans: inflation, crime, illegal immigration, and election integrity.
---

---
On February 19th and 26th, as well as March 12th, our campaign’s volunteers knocked on doors, thus beginning what will be a regular occurrence throughout the rest of the primary. These efforts are the most effective way to spread my America First conservative message to the people of CD-3.
---
---
---
On March 9th, I delivered my first major address of the campaign to the Las Vegas Conservative Town Hall Group at the Ahern Hotel. I informed the audience about my background, my policy stances, and my qualifications, and I even took a few questions at the end. It was a fantastic opportunity to push my message, and the crowd really enjoyed what they heard.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f400411ba9fe95fa/6f4d5fc868b356a6c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---

---
On March 10th, I formally filed my candidacy for CD-3. This means that I paid a filing fee, filled out the necessary paperwork, and am now all in to represent the district's residents in Congress.
---
---
Also on March 10th, I returned to Kevin Wall's radio show for yet another interview. We discussed my official filing for CD-3, the Russian invasion of Ukraine, the massive rise in gas prices that the country has experienced, and the need to increase oil and gas production to bring down those prices. Click below to listen.

We look forward to attending and hosting more events in March, April, and beyond!

# **_Major Issues and Events_**
---
While many major issues and events are impacting Nevadans and Americans more broadly, there are seven that have stood apart in the past few months:
---
**Inflation/Unemployment:** Inflation continues to be a great danger to the American economy, as supply-chain bottlenecks limit the amount of available goods and government stimulus drives demand beyond what the economy can bear. And February and March saw no sign of relief. Inflation rose by 7.5 percent between January 2021 and January 2022, and by 7.9 percent between February 2021 and February 2022. Both of these percentages are records dating back to 1982, and they forced the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates at its March 16th meeting. This action will begin to ease rampant inflation, but it will do so at the high price of slowing economic activity and increasing unemployment. As such, the economy is in for a rough time in the coming months, trapped between continued high inflation and the tradeoff of higher unemployment. I hope we will be able to avoid a recession, but that outcome seems increasingly likely.
---
**Russian Invasion of Ukraine:** Because Joe Biden has shown himself to be an absolute disaster in the realm of foreign policy (especially after the pullout from Afghanistan), Russian President Vladimir Putin has decided to fulfill his long-term ambition to recreate the Russian Empire. To this end, Putin has ordered troops to invade Russia’s western neighbor, Ukraine, in the hopes of installing a puppet government and taking control of the country’s resources. While his gambit has not succeeded thus far, this move is extremely damaging for the United States because it shows that we don’t have the will to deter countries that want to invade weaker neighbors. The signal will now go out to the Chinese government that they can pursue their own territorial ambitions, such as taking control of Taiwan. Joe Biden’s fecklessness has endangered American interests globally and ensured that the world will become a much more dangerous place.
---
---
**Skyrocketing Gas Prices:** While closely intertwined with inflation and the Russian invasion of Ukraine, gas prices in the U.S. have increased so substantially since Joe Biden took office in late January 2021 that they deserve their own mention. During this period, the average price of gas in the U.S. has risen from $2.46 to $4.11 per gallon, an increase of 79 percent. Seeking to avoid voter anger, Biden has blamed the price spikes on Vladimir Putin's military actions. An analysis reveals that while the invasion caused a sharp uptick in prices over the last month, they had actually been rising long before then. When Biden became president, the average price of gas in the U.S. was $2.46 per gallon. On the eve of the conflict in late February of this year, the price was $3.62 per gallon. This means that the price of gas had increased 47 percent (a majority of the overall increase) before the invasion of Ukraine even commenced. As such, the biggest culprits for high gas prices are Joe Biden's policies, namely his stifling of oil and gas production on federal lands, his cancelation of the Keystone XL Pipeline, and his inflationary COVID-19 relief bill. All of these actions reduced the supply of oil and gas or increased demand for them, which caused the massive price spikes that are making life difficult for middle- and low-income Americans.
---
---
**COVID-19/Mask Mandates:** In January, the battle over COVID-19 policy centered on the courts, as Republicans and conservatives sought to overturn Joe Biden’s vaccine mandates. February, however, saw action abruptly shift to the states. Many Democrat Governors, finally realizing that anger over strict COVID-19 mandates could hurt them at the polls in November, announced either a gradual or immediate end to statewide mask mandates. Among them was Governor Sisolak, who lifted Nevada's mandate on February 10th, effective immediately. In addition to Democrats in the states pulling back on COVID-19 restrictions, February also saw Republicans go on offense. Virginia’s new Governor, Glenn Youngkin, won his battle against pro-mask mandate forces and convinced the State Legislature to prevent school districts from requiring students to wear masks, starting March 1st. This victory was all the more remarkable given the fact that Democrats control the Virginia Senate. The developments from February clearly show that momentum is very much with those who want to lift restrictive COVID-19 policies such as mask mandates and establish a return to normalcy.
---
---
**Canadian Truckers’ Convoy:** In January, Prime Minister Justin Trudeau mandated that all truckers in Canada get vaccinated against COVID-19. Given that they are isolated in cabs for most of the day and that they had previously been exempt from vaccine mandates, this move infuriated many truckers, including those who had already been vaccinated. In response, they led a convoy to the national capital, Ottawa, and set up blockades of U.S.-Canada border crossings in Windsor, Ontario, and Coutts, Alberta. Trudeau’s government reacted by denouncing the protestors as racists and Nazis, as well as invoking emergency powers to shut down protests and cut off funding to the truckers. Ultimately, the protests were cleared and Trudeau called off the invocation of emergency powers, but the standoff left a permanent scar on Canadian society. While this political drama took place to the north, it drew huge interest in the United States because of the similar concerns about how governments here have usurped personal freedoms during the COVID-19 pandemic. This could be seen in the massive number of small-dollar donations that Americans made to the truckers, as well as the formation of a copycat truckers’ convoy in California that later traveled to Washington, D.C. As such, the Canadian truckers’ convoy will certainly have an impact on the midterm elections.
---
---
**Parents’ Revolt Against Left-Wing Education Officials:** Since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, there has been a nationwide parental uprising against the reluctance of many government officials to open public schools for in-person learning, heavy-handed mask mandates in public schools, and the left-wing nature of the public school curriculum, especially on racial and gender issues. The latest major flare-up happened in one of the least likely places: San Francisco, a city well-known for its strong brand of political liberalism. On February 15th, the city held a recall election to decide the fate of three far-left school board members, and all were removed from office by between 69 and 77 percent of the vote. The voters, led by parents, took this action after a long list of transgressions by the school board that included not reopening schools quickly after the initial wave of COVID-19, trying to rename 44 schools in the city that had “problematic” (read: racist, colonialist) names, trying to change the admissions process at the prestigious Lowell High School from merit-based to a lottery, and expressing bigoted language toward Asian Americans. The results show 1) that parents are rising up to protect their children from the designs of political officials, and 2) that even the most liberal places in the country are tired of strict COVID-19 policies and woke ideology. Democrats across the country, including in Nevada, should take note of the outcome in San Francisco and be very concerned about their prospects in the midterms.
---
---
**Joe Biden’s Pick for Supreme Court Justice:** In late January, Justice Stephen Breyer, a member of the Supreme Court’s liberal wing, announced that he would be retiring at the end of the 2021-2022 term. This development led Joe Biden’s staff to begin the search for a nominee. Normally, this process is beneficial for a president’s approval ratings, as it allows him to rally his party’s base and bring dejected supporters back into line. Biden, however, squandered any benefit he might receive by saying that he would only appoint a black woman to the Court. The public did not want the pick to be chosen based on skin color and gender, as evidenced by a poll showing that 76 percent of Americans, including a majority of Democrats, wanted all potential nominees to receive consideration. Then, when Biden finally announced Ketanji Brown Jackson (a staunch liberal) as his pick, he did so as media coverage was totally focused on the Russian invasion of Ukraine. As such, while the nomination of a Supreme Court justice will be an issue in the midterms and Biden will likely get a political win in the end, his clumsy handling of the process will prevent him from using the pick to improve his political standing.
---

# **_March/April Events_**
---
Our campaign will continue to meet with constituents and local Republican groups throughout late March and early April. We will also hopefully be able ramp up our door-knocking operation and meet with even more voters one-on-one.
---
Our activities in the coming month will showcase our strategy to win the June 14th primary. Things are really starting to ramp up!
---

clean_body: | | | John Kovacs Feb. - March 2022 Newsletter | Hello Fellow Patriot! Thank you for your support in helping me bring my America First conservative agenda to Washington. This newsletter is the fourth in a series that will be sent out to inform supporters about our campaign’s activities, major issues, and events taking place in Nevada, in the Third Congressional District (CD-3), nationally, and around the world. February and early March were a great success, and I hope to build upon this success in the coming months. In the sections that follow, I will highlight our new Election Integrity Center, our new campaign digital ad, top campaign events from February and March, and significant issues facing Nevada and the country. I will then mention our plans for late March and early April, which will see the continuation of our push to win the June primary. | | The Election Integrity Center: Our Contribution to the Fight for Fair Elections For months, Nevada voters have expressed concern about the integrity of the state’s election process. Our campaign shared their concerns and decided to take action to address them. As such, we are proud to introduce our Election Integrity Center, which is now live on our campaign website! It has links to documents and web pages that explain all about the election process, online portals that allow people to register to vote or check their voter registration, and forms that allow people to sign up to be poll workers and mail-in vote counters. It also provides a comprehensive list of key dates leading up to the June primary election. Become informed and get involved in the election process today! New Campaign Digital Ad In February, our campaign launched a new digital ad highlighting all of the important things that make me the best Republican candidate in CD-3. Click below to learn more. | February/Early March-TOP EVENTS On February 10th, I went on Kevin Wall's radio show for the first of two interviews during the month. We discussed Governor Steve Sisolak’s decision to lift Nevada’s mask mandate, the Democrats’ political pivot on COVID-19 policies and defunding the police, the Democrats’ politicization of January 6th, 2021, the water crisis in Southern Nevada, and the Beijing Olympics. Click below to listen. On February 24th, I sat for another interview with Kevin Wall. We discussed the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Biden’s weakness on the world stage, the Conservative Political Action Conference in Orlando, and four key issues facing Nevadans: inflation, crime, illegal immigration, and election integrity. This Interview Is Exceptionally Informative, So Please Be Sure To Click Below To Listen. On February 19th and 26th, as well as March 12th, our campaign’s volunteers knocked on doors, thus beginning what will be a regular occurrence throughout the rest of the primary. These efforts are the most effective way to spread my America First conservative message to the people of CD-3. On March 9th, I delivered my first major address of the campaign to the Las Vegas Conservative Town Hall Group at the Ahern Hotel. I informed the audience about my background, my policy stances, and my qualifications, and I even took a few questions at the end. It was a fantastic opportunity to push my message, and the crowd really enjoyed what they heard. On March 10th, I formally filed my candidacy for CD-3. This means that I paid a filing fee, filled out the necessary paperwork, and am now all in to represent the district's residents in Congress. Also on March 10th, I returned to Kevin Wall's radio show for yet another interview. We discussed my official filing for CD-3, the Russian invasion of Ukraine, the massive rise in gas prices that the country has experienced, and the need to increase oil and gas production to bring down those prices. Click below to listen. We look forward to attending and hosting more events in March, April, and beyond! | Major Issues and Events While many major issues and events are impacting Nevadans and Americans more broadly, there are seven that have stood apart in the past few months: Inflation/Unemployment: Inflation continues to be a great danger to the American economy, as supply-chain bottlenecks limit the amount of available goods and government stimulus drives demand beyond what the economy can bear. And February and March saw no sign of relief. Inflation rose by 7.5 percent between January 2021 and January 2022, and by 7.9 percent between February 2021 and February 2022. Both of these percentages are records dating back to 1982, and they forced the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates at its March 16th meeting. This action will begin to ease rampant inflation, but it will do so at the high price of slowing economic activity and increasing unemployment. As such, the economy is in for a rough time in the coming months, trapped between continued high inflation and the tradeoff of higher unemployment. I hope we will be able to avoid a recession, but that outcome seems increasingly likely. Russian Invasion of Ukraine: Because Joe Biden has shown himself to be an absolute disaster in the realm of foreign policy (especially after the pullout from Afghanistan), Russian President Vladimir Putin has decided to fulfill his long-term ambition to recreate the Russian Empire. To this end, Putin has ordered troops to invade Russia’s western neighbor, Ukraine, in the hopes of installing a puppet government and taking control of the country’s resources. While his gambit has not succeeded thus far, this move is extremely damaging for the United States because it shows that we don’t have the will to deter countries that want to invade weaker neighbors. The signal will now go out to the Chinese government that they can pursue their own territorial ambitions, such as taking control of Taiwan. Joe Biden’s fecklessness has endangered American interests globally and ensured that the world will become a much more dangerous place. Skyrocketing Gas Prices: While closely intertwined with inflation and the Russian invasion of Ukraine, gas prices in the U.S. have increased so substantially since Joe Biden took office in late January 2021 that they deserve their own mention. During this period, the average price of gas in the U.S. has risen from $2.46 to $4.11 per gallon, an increase of 79 percent. Seeking to avoid voter anger, Biden has blamed the price spikes on Vladimir Putin's military actions. An analysis reveals that while the invasion caused a sharp uptick in prices over the last month, they had actually been rising long before then. When Biden became president, the average price of gas in the U.S. was $2.46 per gallon. On the eve of the conflict in late February of this year, the price was $3.62 per gallon. This means that the price of gas had increased 47 percent (a majority of the overall increase) before the invasion of Ukraine even commenced. As such, the biggest culprits for high gas prices are Joe Biden's policies, namely his stifling of oil and gas production on federal lands, his cancelation of the Keystone XL Pipeline, and his inflationary COVID-19 relief bill. All of these actions reduced the supply of oil and gas or increased demand for them, which caused the massive price spikes that are making life difficult for middle- and low-income Americans. COVID-19/Mask Mandates: In January, the battle over COVID-19 policy centered on the courts, as Republicans and conservatives sought to overturn Joe Biden’s vaccine mandates. February, however, saw action abruptly shift to the states. Many Democrat Governors, finally realizing that anger over strict COVID-19 mandates could hurt them at the polls in November, announced either a gradual or immediate end to statewide mask mandates. Among them was Governor Sisolak, who lifted Nevada's mandate on February 10th, effective immediately. In addition to Democrats in the states pulling back on COVID-19 restrictions, February also saw Republicans go on offense. Virginia’s new Governor, Glenn Youngkin, won his battle against pro-mask mandate forces and convinced the State Legislature to prevent school districts from requiring students to wear masks, starting March 1st. This victory was all the more remarkable given the fact that Democrats control the Virginia Senate. The developments from February clearly show that momentum is very much with those who want to lift restrictive COVID-19 policies such as mask mandates and establish a return to normalcy. Canadian Truckers’ Convoy: In January, Prime Minister Justin Trudeau mandated that all truckers in Canada get vaccinated against COVID-19. Given that they are isolated in cabs for most of the day and that they had previously been exempt from vaccine mandates, this move infuriated many truckers, including those who had already been vaccinated. In response, they led a convoy to the national capital, Ottawa, and set up blockades of U.S.-Canada border crossings in Windsor, Ontario, and Coutts, Alberta. Trudeau’s government reacted by denouncing the protestors as racists and Nazis, as well as invoking emergency powers to shut down protests and cut off funding to the truckers. Ultimately, the protests were cleared and Trudeau called off the invocation of emergency powers, but the standoff left a permanent scar on Canadian society. While this political drama took place to the north, it drew huge interest in the United States because of the similar concerns about how governments here have usurped personal freedoms during the COVID-19 pandemic. This could be seen in the massive number of small-dollar donations that Americans made to the truckers, as well as the formation of a copycat truckers’ convoy in California that later traveled to Washington, D.C. As such, the Canadian truckers’ convoy will certainly have an impact on the midterm elections. Parents’ Revolt Against Left-Wing Education Officials: Since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, there has been a nationwide parental uprising against the reluctance of many government officials to open public schools for in-person learning, heavy-handed mask mandates in public schools, and the left-wing nature of the public school curriculum, especially on racial and gender issues. The latest major flare-up happened in one of the least likely places: San Francisco, a city well-known for its strong brand of political liberalism. On February 15th, the city held a recall election to decide the fate of three far-left school board members, and all were removed from office by between 69 and 77 percent of the vote. The voters, led by parents, took this action after a long list of transgressions by the school board that included not reopening schools quickly after the initial wave of COVID-19, trying to rename 44 schools in the city that had “problematic” (read: racist, colonialist) names, trying to change the admissions process at the prestigious Lowell High School from merit-based to a lottery, and expressing bigoted language toward Asian Americans. The results show 1) that parents are rising up to protect their children from the designs of political officials, and 2) that even the most liberal places in the country are tired of strict COVID-19 policies and woke ideology. Democrats across the country, including in Nevada, should take note of the outcome in San Francisco and be very concerned about their prospects in the midterms. Joe Biden’s Pick for Supreme Court Justice: In late January, Justice Stephen Breyer, a member of the Supreme Court’s liberal wing, announced that he would be retiring at the end of the 2021-2022 term. This development led Joe Biden’s staff to begin the search for a nominee. Normally, this process is beneficial for a president’s approval ratings, as it allows him to rally his party’s base and bring dejected supporters back into line. Biden, however, squandered any benefit he might receive by saying that he would only appoint a black woman to the Court. The public did not want the pick to be chosen based on skin color and gender, as evidenced by a poll showing that 76 percent of Americans, including a majority of Democrats, wanted all potential nominees to receive consideration. Then, when Biden finally announced Ketanji Brown Jackson (a staunch liberal) as his pick, he did so as media coverage was totally focused on the Russian invasion of Ukraine. As such, while the nomination of a Supreme Court justice will be an issue in the midterms and Biden will likely get a political win in the end, his clumsy handling of the process will prevent him from using the pick to improve his political standing. | March/April Events Our campaign will continue to meet with constituents and local Republican groups throughout late March and early April. We will also hopefully be able ramp up our door-knocking operation and meet with even more voters one-on-one. Our activities in the coming month will showcase our strategy to win the June 14th primary. Things are really starting to ramp up! How To Get Involved Our campaign is eager for Nevadans to help out in any way they can. Here are some options: Visit our website at sign up to volunteer. Like us on, and. Donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or whatever amount you can give. February and early March were great, and we look forward to further success in late March and early April. Thank you for your support! – John Kovacs | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS

name: Blue Iowa 2022
subject: is 47 years too long?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
**Peter: Senator Grassley (R-IA) has been in Washington for nearly half a century – and in that time, he turned his back on working-class families in favor of whatever extremists like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump asked him to do. **
Sen. Grassley voted to defund Planned Parenthood, tried to take away health care from millions of Americans and schemed with Mitch McConnell to ram through extremist Supreme Court nominees. **Now, he has somehow reached a new low: defending Trump's attempts to overturn the results of the election and enabling conspiracy theorists!**
**The good news is this:** brand-new polling from The Des Moines Register shows 55% of Iowans either DISAPPROVE of or aren't sure of how Sen. Grassley is doing, and Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to defeat him. Sen. Grassley had already been in Washington for _13 years_ when Abby was born, and 34 years later, she's going to send him packing.
It's time for Chuck Grassley to go – but Abby needs your help to win. **Please, if you're with her to flip this Senate seat blue and EXPAND our Senate majority, respond to our live grassroots poll NOW before it closes at 11:59 p.m. Hurry! We're still waiting on another 522 responses – including yours, ****Peter:**

name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m fighting to hold Putin accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XQZ0DQrNet7Dc-0X7sJlMexJ_VLL-ntHfmu_UI4InZA=/e4fVGvB2WdlJngTDnR95-lnqgl_0Suu5nmeQrhEdXSg=) | Peter, My heart breaks for the people of Ukraine as we continue to witness the tragedy and violence inflicted by Vladamir Putin. Kids and mothers on stretchers. Attacks on innocent civilians trying to escape bombings. Just devastating. **I agree wholeheartedly with what President Zelensky told Congress this week: we must do more to stop Putin 's war.** I have been working on a few important steps we're now taking to support Ukraine.
* First, through my work on the House Appropriations Committee, we are immediately sending almost $14 billion in humanitarian and defensive assistance to Ukraine. This will mean food, medicine, and energy supplies to help with the growing humanitarian and refugee crisis - along with new weapons, armor and equipment for the Ukrainian military to improve their defense capabilities.

* Second, we are hitting Putin and his Russian oligarchs where it hurts - their bank accounts. That means instituting severe sanctions on their wealth, seizing their yachts and foreign homes, and freezing their foreign bank accounts.

* Finally, my team is working around the clock, in real time, to evacuate constituents out of Ukraine and get them to safety. If you're interested in reading more or providing direct assistance to the people of Ukraine, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XQZ0DQrNet7Dc-0X7sJlMexJ_VLL-ntHfmu_UI4InZA=/e4fVGvB2WdlJngTDnR95-lnqgl_0Suu5nmeQrhEdXSg=)

Pam and I are praying for a peaceful end to this brutal war. \- Josh

| [TOM KEAN IS THE EMBODIMENT OF A CROOKED POLITICIAN, LET’S SEND HIM PACKING ](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=12f863f3c1&e=f7e301a8ae "TOM KEAN IS THE EMBODIMENT OF A CROOKED POLITICIAN, LET’S SEND HIM PACKING ")
---
| America First means putting the elite on watch, draining the Swamp, and standing up for the people when our politicians sell us out. **Tom Kean has been selling out NJ for over 20 years.** But we’re exposing his liberal track record and the **crooked lie** that he is a “Republican” and a “conservative.”
---
| [IT’S TIME TO UNMASK THE REAL TOM KEAN ](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=1e89011692&e=f7e301a8ae "IT’S TIME TO UNMASK THE REAL TOM KEAN ")

| Tom Kean **doesn’t represent our values**. But the elite party bosses of NJ have been protecting and defending Tom Kean at every turn so that he can go behind our backs and sell us out for whatever **terrible and disastrous policies they want him to vote for** :

* Tom Kean voted to [FORCE public and private schools](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=cc17bad5f4&e=f7e301a8ae) to allow men who identify as women to use women’s locker rooms, showers and other gender specific facilities.
* Tom Kean voted to [EXPAND Woke Critical Race Theory](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=b617de60fd&e=f7e301a8ae) in NJ Schools.
* Tom Kean voted to [EXPAND Obamacare](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=3e60f4fb6b&e=f7e301a8ae) and provide further abortion services in NJ.
* Tom Kean voted to [PROHIBIT oil production](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=913fe84fb4&e=f7e301a8ae) in NJ, raising gas prices.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871540:6pueusoiN:m:1:3317145305:79768DB829CDDFB65B0EF267771591A3:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871540:6pueusoiN:m:1:3317145305:79768DB829CDDFB65B0EF267771591A3:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871540:6pueusoiN:m:1:3317145305:79768DB829CDDFB65B0EF267771591A3:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871540:6pueusoiN:m:1:3317145305:79768DB829CDDFB65B0EF267771591A3:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871540:6pueusoiN:m:1:3317145305:79768DB829CDDFB65B0EF267771591A3:r)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: 🚨 Lawsuit Update
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Our lawsuit against the Tennessee Republican Party is moving forward, with Tennesseans who have been affected by these maps serving as plaintiffs. Republicans are trying to rig the game for themselves, ensuring another decade of regressive control — only if they go unchallenged. We will not let them win.

We are able to take on the Republican machine because of you. We’ve raised the funds to begin this process, but we have a long road ahead. Lawsuits are expensive, and if we want to win, we have to fully fund our efforts through to the end.

We are going to give this lawsuit our all, but we need your help. Can I count on you to chip in now and make it recurring to help us see this through to the end? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We will not allow Republicans to stop progress. They may have tried to rig the system, but democracy is worth fighting for. We won’t stop until we get equal representation for everyone in this state.

Can you chip in now to help us fight back? Recurring donations keep us going, so consider making it monthly if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

We can do this,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Jim Jordan
subject: American Bravery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8tcfss3rvv4g5rpkgrrpr09kseaagf7cg6j9ga0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1obac3nm1h36dtiekp34sj7cqrj7c9m6tinas74egoj2d33c3i78ddh6eqe1dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqr6ptimdj31cllm9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cthm4pj4ctgm49fg)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian leaders, soldiers, and civilians fight for their freedom, we should ask ourselves – _**what do we fight for?**_
Thank God the United States faces no foreign military attack, but that doesn’t mean our freedom is secure. Under Joe Biden’s hapless “leadership,” our borders, our paychecks, and our constitutional rights are more vulnerable than they have been in decades.
**Peace can only be won through strength; freedom can only be won through vigilance. **

Democrats will use any excuse they can to seize more power. They never stop, so we can’t either. Americans must fight for our freedom, or we will lose it.
**[Please support the House Freedom Fund and their group of conservatives running for Congress this year!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcsvmhpfa43ds2qt72134orroibbo1r3fm3tf36g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdh6cp37c5h2bs)**
No people ever stayed free by letting elites have their way. Big Business, Big Tech, Big Government are all working overtime, all the time, to collude, censor, and coerce America into wokeness and weakness. Just look at Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s record, in just one year of power:
▶︎ They spent so much it triggered strangling inflation. Now they say we need more spending to fight inflation.
▶︎ They opened the border because they said walls didn’t work. Now there are so many illegal immigrants they say it’s too late to build a border wall.
▶︎ Joe Biden wants to spend $30 billion more on Covid, but states still have $800 billion from last year that hasn’t been spent yet!

It’s all a scam, just like their mask mandates, school closures, vaccine mandates, and refusal to allow American energy independence.
America may not be at war, but we still have to fight for our freedom:
---
* To speak the truth about God, men, and women.
* To know the truth about the origins of Covid-19.
* To have fair and transparent elections.
* To produce our own oil and natural gas.
* To be patriotic conservatives on social media.

---
Today, all those things and more are under attack – not from bombs but with algorithms and bureaucracy. They don’t just want to rule the economy – they want to control our whole lives.
The only way they will succeed is if we let them.
Americans are inspired by the bravery of the Ukrainians defending their country – but now **we need to do the same!**
**[Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their group of candidates running for Congress this year.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrkbg3pthel5g01rnlcc118gndt9sqkmjjijspo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdh6cp37c5h2bs)**
_You can donate to multiple candidates with a single transaction. HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to their grassroots campaigns._
Thank you for standing strong for freedom. Together, we can stop the Left and secure America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
JIM JORDAN U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio
---
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN**
---
---
|
---

---

HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Defending American Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziq7sofvb83jvst8gbp22hop5vjngh1vlloddr00_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo64ttmclrb7cr2mio60opmmqr73dr0mgq70s9kcsp38o35cer61cb4c1h61ob0cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbcr7map6cdj4mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm6oj2c3i61oh5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian leaders, soldiers, and civilians fight for their freedom, we should ask ourselves – _**what do we fight for?**_
Thank God the United States faces no foreign military attack, but that doesn’t mean our freedom is secure. Under Joe Biden’s hapless “leadership,” our borders, our paychecks, and our constitutional rights are more vulnerable than they have been in decades.
**Peace can only be won through strength; freedom can only be won through vigilance. **

Democrats will use any excuse they can to seize more power. They never stop, so we can’t either. Americans must fight for our freedom, or we will lose it.
**[Please support the House Freedom Fund and their group of conservatives running for Congress this year!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhuck292gm8c73jbunnec75d1he3u13a31arqf28_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdh64o74c3h2bs)**
No people ever stayed free by letting elites have their way. Big Business, Big Tech, Big Government are all working overtime, all the time, to collude, censor, and coerce America into wokeness and weakness. Just look at Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s record, in just one year of power:
▶︎ They spent so much it triggered strangling inflation. Now they say we need more spending to fight inflation.
▶︎ They opened the border because they said walls didn’t work. Now there are so many illegal immigrants they say it’s too late to build a border wall.
▶︎ Joe Biden wants to spend $30 billion more on Covid, but states still have $800 billion from last year that hasn’t been spent yet!

It’s all a scam, just like their mask mandates, school closures, vaccine mandates, and refusal to allow American energy independence.
America may not be at war, but we still have to fight for our freedom:
---
* To speak the truth about God, men, and women.
* To know the truth about the origins of Covid-19.
* To have fair and transparent elections.
* To produce our own oil and natural gas.
* To be patriotic conservatives on social media.

---
Today, all those things and more are under attack – not from bombs but with algorithms and bureaucracy. They don’t just want to rule the economy – they want to control our whole lives.
The only way they will succeed is if we let them.
Americans are inspired by the bravery of the Ukrainians defending their country – but now **we need to do the same!**
**[Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their group of candidates running for Congress this year.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zks530rraohs54qk4aof01aa58n6qk9ndgf100k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdh64o74c3h2bs)**
_You can donate to multiple candidates with a single transaction. HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to their grassroots campaigns._
Thank you for standing strong for freedom. Together, we can stop the Left and secure America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
JIM JORDAN U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

---

---

body:
Here’s how it all started...
#

[**Please make a contribution to Giffords PAC—$3 or whatever you can afford—to help us elect a Congress with the courage to stand up to the gun lobby, one that will pass legislation that will make us safer from gun violence.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1706_3935704_mFyAMH&akid=1706%2E3935704%2EmFyAMH)
Here’s how it all started...
**FIRST:** There was the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
**THEN:** NRA Chief Wayne LaPierre stood up and told the nation that the only thing that would stop mass shootings was “a good guy with a gun.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1706_3935704_mFyAMH&akid=1706%2E3935704%2EmFyAMH)
**NEXT:** Gabby Giffords launched our organization to make our communities safer from gun violence and has since passed 465 new gun violence prevention laws in states across the country.
**NOW:** Our work is not done. Far from it. There are more than 40,000 people killed with a gun each year, and we are still fighting the gun lobby tooth and nail for change.
So please:

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: RSVP: Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're hosting our first ever Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank with John + Gisele Fetterman next week — and you’re invited!
#
It's official, Derek!
We are now TWO months away from the Pennsylvania Democratic primary. And in order to win, we need to scale up field operations all across PA.
**That’s why we are hosting our first ever Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank with John + Gisele Fetterman on Wednesday, March 23 at 6:00 PM ET** — and you’re invited!
[**_Can you please RSVP now to let John know if you can make it? This is a virtual event on Zoom that is open to the public._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=1&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=2&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)
**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=3&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)**
The event starts with remarks directly from John + Gisele. Then, we’ll jump right into the phone bank training and start making calls to folks all across PA!
Our Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank is the next step in expanding our grassroots movement in all 67 PA Counties. After all, **having conversations with PA voters is the #1 way we build support for John + our campaign across the Commonwealth.**
We can’t wait to see you soon!
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛
**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=4&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220318-5019-footer&t=5&refcode2=5019_434096_9Dul7H&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=5019%2E434096%2E9Dul7H)

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871708:6-u_2soIN:m:1:3253819041:2A8D3EA9F7DD754068E71177053F4DED:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871708:6-u_2soIN:m:1:3253819041:2A8D3EA9F7DD754068E71177053F4DED:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59871708:6-u_2soIN:m:1:3253819041:2A8D3EA9F7DD754068E71177053F4DED:r)

Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck

name: Team Stanton
subject: Investing in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OCYU1DMteB7gEuWfrdFM-YVu35tbhzkbHBUY8WeqZes=/YWJvmrALUXtO8xaOTbTlY27Jlga-NIbFdxPpdmrQ14g=)
Friend,

Last week, the House passed a massive bipartisan funding bill. **Thanks to Greg 's hard work, the bill includes funding for key Arizona priorities, like:**
* $25 million to address Arizona's ongoing drought

* $4 million to invest in the water infrastructure of communities and tribal nations

* $1.8 million to help restore the Salt and Gila Rivers' ecosystems

* Over $4 million for key projects in Chandler, Mesa, Tempe, and Phoenix

Greg knows that investing in Arizona means a stronger economy, cleaner water, and better lives for working families. That's why he'll always fight to make sure Arizona gets the funding it deserves.

[**_Greg is in one of the toughest races in the country. Will you chip in now so he can keep bringing home results for Arizona?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OCYU1DMteB7gEuWfrdFM-YVu35tbhzkbHBUY8WeqZes=/mneolaWPIslsj0qizRQuheV5wbG9RzKAxDwQ2s-pL0g=?refcode=X_031822_InvestInfrastructure)

Thank you!

-- _Team Stanton _

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OCYU1DMteB7gEuWfrdFM-YVu35tbhzkbHBUY8WeqZes=/Uy1iYdTXYnx7fUWXvHP5b-h8BDXLp_4BabUsLYnI7RQ=?refcode=X_031822_InvestInfrastructure)

* * *

Team -- President Biden is 100% right when he calls Social Security "the bedrock of American retirement."

More than 70 MILLION Americans collect Social Security every month and use their benefits to pay for housing, health care, groceries, and other day-to-day expenses. And unlike Trump and McConnell who spent YEARS threatening cuts to Social Security, President Biden is committed to _strengthening_ Social Security for years to come.

We're conducting a LIVE public opinion poll to assess whether residents of 18326 support President Biden's call to strengthen Social Security ‐‐ **_but we just checked our records and see no response on file for you._**

**TELL US BEFORE MIDNIGHT:****Do you support President Biden's call to strengthen Social Security?**

clean_body: I look forward to supporting my trusted friend and fellow patriot Guy Ciarrocchi in his campaign for congress. Guy has the experience and courage to be an effective congressman for Berks and Chester counties. | | Friend, I look forward to supporting my trusted friend and fellow patriot Guy Ciarrocchi in his campaign for congress. Guy has the experience and courage to be an effective congressman for Berks and Chester counties. Guy has spent his career standing up for our freedom and against Big Government, for our children, for our small businesses and for the America we love. Guy is a problem solving conservative and will stand up for Pennsylvania and our country in Washington and be highly accessible at home. | Signed, Dan Meuser | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY OUR GUY FOR CONGRESS Our Guy For Congress, P.O. clean_body: Since the primary election, our fundraising has slowed down a bit. | | | Peter, After we announced that we were advancing to a runoff against Henry Cuellar, our fundraising skyrocketed. But as of this morning, our fundraising has started to take a dip. We can’t afford to fall a penny short. Our team has been working overtime to raise as much as we can to help send Jessica to Congress. But to actually be prepared and able to win this runoff, we must fund our planned budget to defeat Henry Cuellar. We can’t slow down now. Henry Cuellar is counting on corporate and special interest donors to fund his campaign. While we may not have his corporate or special interest money, we do have the grassroots support of thousands of small-dollar donors. And we’re relying on our supporters to propel us to victory. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you much for your support, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

From working with Senator Bernie Sanders on raising the minimum wage to holding the Trump administration accountable, Doyle has the progressive experience to get the job done.

We’re about to tell you more [ but first, could you please chip in $5 to help power Doyle Canning’s grassroots campaign for Congress? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116859/335784324/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116860/335784332/1169961532?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=)
---
| | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116861/335784339/1169961532?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=)
---
For the past twenty years, Doyle has been a leading voice in people-powered movements. She is exactly the type of leader we need in DC. [ Just look at her MIGHTY list of victories for working people!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116862/335784346/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=)
* * *
[Workers’ Rights:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116863/335784348/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) In the midst of the pandemic, Doyle Canning fought for essential workers left behind by government policies. She helped take on huge employers like Amazon and Walmart, ensuring that their employees had access to sick leave, fair pay and PPE.

[Fair Wages:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116864/335784349/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) Canning worked with Sen. Bernie Sanders to advance the _Raise the Wage Act_ for a $15 minimum wage.

[Pro-Union:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116865/335784351/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) Doyle advised the Worker Power Coalition to pass the _PRO Act_ , which protects and expands the right to collective bargaining for working people.

[Legal Scholar:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116866/335784376/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) Doyle wrote a widely cited analysis that held the Trump administration accountable for their terrible fossil fuel policies!

[Climate Champion:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116867/335784379/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=) Doyle is a national leader to protect our climate. She’s advised leading climate groups like Greenpeace, Oil Change International, Rainforest Action Network, and Physicians for Social Responsibility amongst many others! That’s why her campaign is endorsed by every environmental group in this race!
* * *
Doyle’s depth of experience, strong working relationships, and commitment to justice are exactly why we need her in D.C. Put simply: [Doyle Canning is the real deal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116868/335784380/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220318_FR_REALDEAL_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZDI4NS1lNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PR1gl54VTLfbVw6pWAa0S9FzqjSy1-VDY5fMJcjWnvw=)

But right now — Doyle is being attacked by status-quo politicians who want to hold us back. They’re committed to “business as usual” and a bold, independent thinker with people power behind her like Doyle Canning scares them and their big donors.

name: Team Oakley
subject: Here’s the real problem with Rep. Payne Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

For the past few months, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. and his team have been leveling disgusting, sexist attacks against Imani — degrading her record, ignoring her work for our communities, and calling her unqualified.

And you know what? We think that’s pretty ironic, coming from a man who’s never finished anything he’s started. His track record is one of squandered opportunity.

Sure, Rep. Payne Jr. got himself elected to Congress on his father’s coattails.

But he barely shows up — and at times when he does, he can’t even be bothered to get dressed for work.

And sure, when he was younger, he got into college with his tuition covered.

But he quit.

And now, he’s trying to attack Imani — a woman who grew up struggling to make ends meet, earned three degrees, and built a career for herself improving the lives of people who’ve been left behind by a corrupt system . . . the same system that let people like Donald Payne Jr. get ahead without putting in the work.

Enough is enough. It’s time for us to elect a proud, qualified , progressive leader who knows what it means to put in the work, and who will ALWAYS put in the work for us in Congress. Click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=317payne]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=17&refcode=317payne] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=317payne] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=317payne] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=317payne] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=317payne] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=317payne]

This is a pattern, Peter. Donald Payne Jr. has no follow through. He's willing to start something, but he doesn’t put in the effort to finish it. And instead of delivering results for our community, he tries to belittle Imani and call her unqualified, when she’s the one who’s earned everything she’s ever gotten.

See — in New Jersey, it doesn’t really matter what qualifications you do or don’t have. It only matters that you have the right name, the right friends, or the right ring to kiss. And Donald Payne Jr. is living proof of that.

But Imani is ready to break through all of the corruption and make a difference for everyone who’s been left behind. If you’re with her, click here to chip in $27 right now and help her win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=317payne]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Oakley

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Here we go again? Republicans want to strip away healthcare coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTiljEbT-b0ecpR9_Z4E1ynT_6szuUBVNmnkhb60awg=/Oy8qiFCXWfO82JJxNo6rUQVHZxM12caMAYbkdlLABsk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220318-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

On our way out of a global pandemic, the GOP has its sights set on repealing the Affordable Care Act - stripping millions of Americans of their healthcare coverage and removing protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

_**Yes, you read that correctly.**_
---
_**Sen. Ron Johnson has said that - if Republicans retake control of the White House and Congress - the GOP should be ready to repeal the ACA.**_
We cannot let that happen. I'm striving to protect Virginians with pre-existing conditions, preserve Medicaid expansion, and lower healthcare costs. **I need your support to continue this mission in Congress. [_Will you consider contributing to my campaign today?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTiljEbT-b0ecpR9_Z4E1ynT_6szuUBVNmnkhb60awg=/Oy8qiFCXWfO82JJxNo6rUQVHZxM12caMAYbkdlLABsk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220318-1-EM&amount=25)**
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTiljEbT-b0ecpR9_Z4E1ynT_6szuUBVNmnkhb60awg=/Oy8qiFCXWfO82JJxNo6rUQVHZxM12caMAYbkdlLABsk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220318-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Virginia - and our entire country - deserves lower healthcare costs, not weak attempts by national Republicans to score political points.

Their plan to do away with the Affordable Care Act is a sobering reminder of what's at stake this fall. With your support, I can continue advocating for smart healthcare policy and defend against those who want to take care away from Americans.

Abigail

body:
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870587:6lCEosoyN:m:1:3299561967:E3E015CD5498C1E3BC89DEEEF9BF2085:r)
You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870587:6lCEosoyN:m:1:3299561967:E3E015CD5498C1E3BC89DEEEF9BF2085:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870587:6lCEosoyN:m:1:3299561967:E3E015CD5498C1E3BC89DEEEF9BF2085:r)
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870587:6lCEosoyN:m:1:3299561967:E3E015CD5498C1E3BC89DEEEF9BF2085:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870587:6lCEosoyN:m:1:3299561967:E3E015CD5498C1E3BC89DEEEF9BF2085:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

clean_body: | | | | Don’t let Shapiro take away your rights. | Peter Willis, With crime on the rise across Pennsylvania and the Democrats working to defund our police; law-abiding Americans need constitutional carry to ensure their safety. Lou Barletta has always consistently supported constitutional carry right here in Pennsylvania, as well as concealed carry reciprocity between states. Josh Shapiro is hellbent on stripping us of our Constitutionally protected 2nd Amendment rights, but Lou is determined to stand up and fight back! Lou Barletta has and always will be a strong advocate for our 2A. As governor, he will protect our rights from Biden and Shapiro’s illegal gun grabs. Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

subject: 1st
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We are writing today to humbly ask if you would make your first donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
#

Friends —
We are writing to humbly ask if you would make your first donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
We are trying to get to 1 million individual donors before the end of the month, and if you chip in, we’re going to reach this goal.
The amount doesn’t even matter. It can be $5, $10 — or anything you can afford. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
So, please. Join the club. Help us get to 1 million individual donations before the end of the month.
That’s how we re-elect Mark Kelly.
Together.
[**Can you make your first contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? Help us reach our goal of 1 million individual donors.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-15-pd&t=1&refcode2=2381_6688874_5OvArP&akid=2381%2E6688874%2E5OvArP)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-15-pd&t=2&refcode2=2381_6688874_5OvArP&akid=2381%2E6688874%2E5OvArP)**
Thanks,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2381%2E6688874%2E5OvArP).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. subject: Big news -
body:
Today, Republican Delegate Kim Taylor (VA-63) announced... | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=3b770b3d3d&e=ae0ea222da)
---

---
| **Delegate Kim Taylor Endorses Tina Ramirez for State Senate **
**Chesterfield, VA** \- Today, Republican Delegate Kim Taylor (VA-63) announced that she is endorsing Tina Ramirez for the Republican nomination in Virginia’s 12th Senate District. Del. Taylor is best known for her large upset victory in 2021, which secured a Republican majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. This major endorsement is the first from a sitting member of the House of Delegates in the 12th District race, which is an open seat following redistricting.

**The following quote is attributable to Del. Kim Taylor:**

“Tina Ramirez was instrumental in helping us flip House District 63 from blue to red, which gave Republicans a majority in the House. When few believed in us, Tina went above and beyond to aid our campaign. Tina knows how to get things done. Having her in the State Senate will provide us with a true fighter and a proven Conservative to counter the obstructionists that are currently standing in the way of Governor Youngkin’s vision and the work we are doing in the House of Delegates. I am proud to endorse Tina Ramirez in the Republican Primary for State Senate in Virginia’s 12th District.”

**The following quote is attributable to Tina Ramirez:**

“I am humbled and honored by the endorsement of Delegate Kim Taylor. Kim is a strong conservative leader and has taken her business owner mentality to the House of Delegates, where she has proven to be a difference-maker. This is exactly what I am seeking to do in the State Senate, so I am proud to have earned her support. I look forward to working with her in the Virginia State Capitol to pass meaningful conservative legislation to improve the lives of and defend liberty for all Virginians.”

We saw some incredible momentum behind this people-powered campaign, Peter – but we can't falter now.

A couple of days ago, I sent out an email asking for your help to fill my 2022 Election Year Fund. The immediate response was _overwhelming_. Fearless fighters from every corner of New York and across the country eagerly answered my call. Within just hours, we had received hundreds of donations and were hopeful that we would not only hit our donor goal, but _surpass_ it.

**But then we saw this initial support start to fall off. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105180/335738538/379053316?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk379-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTUzMzQ5Ni1jOGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKmX0bmoO8K9HILAyFhsP37dxH4IO6Px6nM9-nYPgSM=)
This campaign isn't a sprint, Peter – it's a marathon. That's why it's so important to keep the momentum going. And, with my 2022 Election Year Fund closing at midnight, I’m worried that we won’t hit our essential goal – a goal we _must_ hit now that I officially have a Republican running against me.

**My team set a goal to receive 1,000 donations before MIDNIGHT tonight, but we’re falling behind. Will you make one of the 259 donations I need to reach this goal?

[Please, rush $15 or more to my 2022 Election Year Fund to activate your Team James membership and help me defeat my Republican opponent at the ballot box.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105181/335738539/379053316?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk379-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTUzMzQ5Ni1jOGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKmX0bmoO8K9HILAyFhsP37dxH4IO6Px6nM9-nYPgSM=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Burril?=
subject: Western North Carolina is ready for change.
body:
Are you? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/burrilforcongress/burril-for-congress-15926623?e=80f8383115)
---
| | [ ](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=dbbe452587&e=80f8383115)
---
| | Hey Folks,

Burril for Congress is accelerating!
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| It is clear my message of Conservative, Christian, Businessman is resonating with folks in Western North Carolina.

Madison Cawthorn has been a disappointment as our Congressional Representative–I hear that everywhere I go. His divisive influence among other members of Congress has limited our district’s access to federal resources in law enforcement and infrastructure.

Cawthorn's decision to leave the 11th district and now return has created frustration and confusion among constituents. His use of our Congressional seat to become a national political brand has not helped us here at home.

President Biden’s poor decision making and bungled foreign affairs keep spiraling downward. Gas prices have exceeded even the most drastic economic forecast. The people of Western North Carolina are done with this Administration and the awful mess they have created.

The upcoming Republican primary election will determine who will represent the 11th district in Congress in 2023. _**It's the most important election of this cycle.**_

_That's why it's so important you, your family, your friends and your neighbors participate in early voting or visit the polls on election day. _

North Carolina's 11th district is ready to change their Congressional leadership. It's time to send a mature, reliable, experienced and solid faith-based leader to Washington who will tell Joe NO!

Thank you,
---
|
---
Matthew Burril
Candidate for U.S. Congress
| | | | | | | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=4c93cec591&e=80f8383115)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Progressives have the momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, no matter
what the Democratic establishment says, progressives can win elections
running on bold, popular policies like Medicare for All and a Green New
Deal. The Nation said it perfectly earlier this month after Justice
Democrat Greg Casar won his primary in Texas and Jessica Cisneros moved on
to a runoff against Henry Cuellar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&t=1002&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Headline from The Nation reads Democratic Insiders Keep Bashing
Progressives, but Progressives Keep Winning Key Elections

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Chip in $3 now to help us keep up this momentum vs. the
Democratic establishment »

Despite this reality, Democratic “insiders” have been pushing headlines
that endlessly cast doubt on our progressive fight. Just look at some of
these from the last few months:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&t=1004&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Headline from Axios reads Squad Politics Backfire

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&t=1005&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Headline from Morning Consult reads Democrats’ Drive to the Left
Threatens Their Grip on Power

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&t=1006&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Headline from the NY Times reads Vulnerable Democrats, Seeking Distance
from the Left, Offer a Midterm Agenda

It’s all frantic and misguided. What Greg Casar said about his race after
his primary victory is the reality: "$15 an hour won. Medicare for All
won. The PRO Act won. Reproductive rights won. Immigrant rights won. The
Movement for Black lives won. LGBTQIA+ rights won. Working families won."

The policies Greg, the Squad, and our 2022 slate all support are the
policies that can win elections, no matter what the corporate Democrats
and Wall Street donors say.

The people want economic, social, racial, and environmental justice, even
if the corporate executives and corporate PACs bankrolling the DNC and
DCCC want us to think otherwise.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]We need resources right now to keep up this momentum and expand the
Squad in Congress. Can you chip in $3 to get our
progressive message out and elect 6 new Justice Democrats this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97738?refcode=em20220318-22437&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1027&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1028&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220318-22437-footer&t=1029&refcode2=22437_1203867_GTeMPx&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1030&akid=22437%2E1203867%2EGTeMPx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
