Hi friends,

I wanted to make sure you saw this note from Ann.

There are so many strong and inspiring women putting in the work from Wisconsin, but Ann left out one very important woman: **_herself._**

Ann has been a teacher, a small business owner, a mother, and an engaged community member of this district for a very long time. And while she isn't in Congress yet, she's already putting in the work for the people of Wisconsin's first -- traveling across the district, talking to folks every day about the issues that matter most to them, and sharing her vision for a better Wisconsin. In fact, it's hard to keep up with her!

But before Ann can fight for Wisconsin in Washington, **she has to win this election, and for that, we need to raise our goal of $50,000 by the end of the month.**

**[Every donation goes a long way to powering our campaign efforts. Chip in $5 or more to help us reach our goal and get Ann in office>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105759/335740927/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)**

Thank you for being a part of this journey with us.

– Shibani Chakrabarty

Date: Thurs, Mar 10, 2022
Subject: The women who inspire me

Hi friend,

This women's history month, I would like to raise up some powerful women in our State government today. These are the women who inspired me to run, and having the chance to work alongside them would be an _absolute privilege_. I hope to honor each of them when I'm in Congress.

**Jill Underly, Superintendent of Public Instruction of Wisconsin**
Dr. Jill Underly is a life-long public school advocate, administrator, and teacher who is committed to ensuring that every child, every day, has the opportunity for a first-class public education in the State of Wisconsin. Her leadership and advocacy are making schools and the education system better for all children in Wisconsin.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105765/335740933/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)

**Jill Karofsky, Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice**
Justice Jill Karofsky was sworn into the Wisconsin Supreme Court in 2020, and her commitment to upholding the law and justice in our state is truly inspiring. Since her appointment, she has been a fierce and tireless protector of the rights of the citizens of the state of Wisconsin and of the rule of law. Her leadership is just what we need, as Justice Karofsky is ushering a new vision of what law and justice could be in our state.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105766/335740934/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)

**Greta Neubauer, Wisconsin State Assemblymember**
Greta has been a dedicated advocate for progressive causes for more than a decade. Some of her accolades include leading a statewide push to **increase access to affordable healthcare, supporting progress to reduce racial disparities in our health system, and fighting to increase education funding and bills that would create more jobs for Wisconsin's families.** She is a leading voice in our state and an advocate for policies and legislation that will move Wisconsin forward.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105767/335740935/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)

**Tammy Baldwin, U.S. Senator**
Senator Tammy Baldwin has dedicated her life's work to public service because she has a deep commitment to making a difference in the lives of Wisconsin’s working families. In the proud tradition of Wisconsin's state motto, _Forward_ , she believes that we must always work together to help provide fairness, equality, and economic opportunity for all.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105768/335740936/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)
---
**Gwen Moore, U.S. Representative**
Representative Moore is a trailblazer for the State of Wisconsin. In 2005, she became the **first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives.** Congresswoman Moore led the fight against racial profiling, domestic abuse, and voting rights violations. A tireless advocate for the working families of Wisconsin, the work she's done has particularly impacted low-income communities. Wisconsin is a better place because of her!

**These women are putting in the work for all of us here in Wisconsin, and I cannot wait to work alongside them as we all take steps toward a better future for the next generation of female leaders.**

**[Support our movement by donating $5 or whatever you can to my campaign today so that I can continue to push Wisconsin, and America, forward>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43105769/335740937/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220318_influentialwomenkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJiYzJiMS1jYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPdB4xVa-DE5I-Q24OdNGNyr3RwdvIDx5XLuM2ZB_q0=)**

name: Liz from Team Benson
subject: What I learned from the survey
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

The results from the Democracy Confidence Survey we sent earlier this week are really interesting.
The first question we asked was about the strength of democracy in America right now. Your answers were all over the place! Some people believe democracy is very strong while others believe it is relatively unstable. Some respondents were understandably pretty doom and gloom about the future of our democracy.

The funny thing is, I agree with everyone who responded. Some days I wake up as confident as ever about our American democracy. Other days, I read a story about some election wacko in Michigan and worry that if they are allowed to run state government, our democracy and our right to vote will go right out the window.

The next question we asked was about your level of confidence in democracy if Jocelyn is re-elected in November. Here, it looks like there is some universal agreement!

Like me, the men and women who responded to our survey are very confident that if Jocelyn is re-elected Secretary of State, our democracy will continue to be in good hands. That's why we're proud to support her!

So overall, here’s my takeaway from this survey: Despite the fact that 2020 was the most secure election in the history of Michigan, we’re all a bit unsure what direction our democracy is headed. That uncertainty comes from the fact that come this fall and into 2024, we don’t know how powerful the anti-democracy movement will be in Michigan.

What we do know is that if Jocelyn remains in charge of elections and voting, both will remain secure and our democracy will be as strong as ever. It’s a true crossroads. And we have the responsibility to choose the right path.

So let’s make it happen. Jocelyn’s campaign relies on concerned voters like you to ensure that our pro-democracy message is heard loud and clear throughout the state. Donate now to support her campaign, friend.

Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031822

Liz

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: A behind the scenes story rfom the Trump Administration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r)
---
I want to take you back to my time as President Trump's Director of the Central Intelligence Agency. I was America's most senior spy, leading the world's finest intelligence service.

On this occasion, I was climbing out of a plane in the dark of the night. I can't tell you exactly where I was, but I can tell you it was a very challenging part of the world.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r)
---

I'm greeted by a member of the ground crew whose name I never knew. Imagine my surprise when he welcomed me, reached out to shake my hand and placed in it a palm-sized, tattered Bible.

When I got in my vehicle, I read the hand-written note inside it: _**" Mr. Director, you have been a light to me and to the world. Bless you." **_

I later learned that this gentleman worked for the U.S. State Department.

I had no idea I would one day become America's 70th Secretary of State, having led him and his colleagues. But I did know that, for at least one person, I had been a light.

_**This little story is not about me though.**_ This story is about each of us and the mission we have to manifest reverence for our Lord in every single thing we do.

The challenge for each of us is to be that light, no matter where you are or what you do.

**_In order to be that light, we need to ensure that the federal government does not limit our ability to live out our faith. _**

I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn't a new idea.

_**Let's be clear: any nation that disregards the essential right of religious freedom cannot claim to be good in any other measure. Full stop.**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r)
---

Our founders regarded religious freedom as an absolutely essential right of mankind and central to our founding. Religious freedom is the first freedom according to the Constitution.

Sadly, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government. We've seen government mandates that have forced churches to close their doors and new laws that make it harder for Americans to live out their faith.

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, _**[I'm asking you to chip in today to help us elect more principled leaders who will always protect religious liberty.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r "I’m asking you to chip in today to help us elect more principled leaders who
will always protect religious liberty.")**_

---
| | [STAND FOR RELIGIOUS LIBERTY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r)
---

I'm calling on you to join me in defending religious freedom - both here at home and abroad.

Let us renew our commitment to putting our faith and America and our values first--because when we do, we prosper and the whole world prospers and is peaceful. When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59870757:6FhtGsoNK:m:1:3299561967:667A8D090438D7661FA0179EE87895D9:r)
---
Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State
---
|
|

He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Help rally even more support by giving today. Everything you give now will reflect in our numbers>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_031822_FundraisingDeadline_B]

I've championed affordable housing, expanded public transportation, and clean energy. I believe in creating a fairer future that allows working families to thrive rather than fall under the weight of wealthy corporations.
Wealthy corporations are more concerned with filling their own pockets than ensuring their workers have a better quality of life. They are threatened by our fight to strengthen labor unions and demand living wages. So to try and stop us, they’ve been funneling money into my opponent’s campaign and outside attack ads. However, an election is not something you can buy.
Will you chip in now to show our competitors the power of a true grassroots campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_031822_FundraisingDeadline_B]
Thank you so much!
-- Georgette

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Never give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | Most people don’t know this about me but I have seven tattoos, and each one has special meaning.

Every time I roll up my sleeves, I’m reminded of an important message written by my daughter: never give up. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119986/335798940/1092196856?refcode=20220318_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlhMDhkMy1mMWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FesKVmxhbsRHoVbpmzJgAcfxdLXBkBUn2tPcYR35tgw=)
_Greg’s ‘Never Give Up’ Tattoo_
---
Here’s the story: I lost my first race for City Council, but I didn’t back down. I ran again and won.

Because if you truly believe in something, you can never -- EVER -- give up.

**[In Congress, I’ll never give up trying to make our communities a better place for children and families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119987/335798941/1092196856?refcode=20220318_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlhMDhkMy1mMWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FesKVmxhbsRHoVbpmzJgAcfxdLXBkBUn2tPcYR35tgw=)**

**_[But to win this competitive race, I’m going to need your help. I’m up against one of the most radical members of Congress -- Steve Chabot -- who has already raised $500K to defeat us. I need 750 gifts before midnight to RETIRE Chabot and FLIP this seat for Democrats. Can you chip in $15? It would mean the world to me. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119988/335798942/1092196856?refcode=20220318_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlhMDhkMy1mMWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FesKVmxhbsRHoVbpmzJgAcfxdLXBkBUn2tPcYR35tgw=)_**
Against all odds, my daughter inspires me to never give up.

She inspires me everyday to fight for families in need.

She inspired me to run for Council again after that first loss.

And not surprisingly, she helped inspire me to run for Congress because of my core belief in public service and what is needed from our leaders in this critical moment for our country.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119989/335798943/1092196856?refcode=20220318_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlhMDhkMy1mMWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FesKVmxhbsRHoVbpmzJgAcfxdLXBkBUn2tPcYR35tgw=)
_Greg and his daughter, Maddie_
---
I’m running to retire Steve Chabot and give the people of our district the representation they deserve. Not because it’s easy, but because it’s the right thing to do.

**_[But I can’t do it alone. I need 750 supporters to step up before midnight to help me compete with Chabot’s massive cash flow, win this competitive race, and flip this seat blue. Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind.

Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district.

But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119998/335798952/1092196856?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlhMDhkMy1mMWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FesKVmxhbsRHoVbpmzJgAcfxdLXBkBUn2tPcYR35tgw=)** We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help.

Every time I roll up my sleeves, I’m reminded of an important message written by my daughter: never give up. | = Greg’s ‘Never Give Up’ Tattoo Here’s the story: I lost my first race for City Council, but I didn’t back down. I ran again and won. Because if you truly believe in something, you can never -- EVER -- give up. = = Against all odds, my daughter inspires me to never give up. She inspires me everyday to fight for families in need. She inspired me to run for Council again after that first loss. And not surprisingly, she helped inspire me to run for Congress because of my core belief in public service and what is needed from our leaders in this critical moment for our country. = Greg and his daughter, Maddie I’m running to retire Steve Chabot and give the people of our district the representation they deserve. Not because it’s easy, but because it’s the right thing to do. = | = = = = = Your support means everything to me. Thank you, Greg Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: out of reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
When people ask me why I'm running for U.S. Senate, my answer is consistent and simple:
#

Folks,
When people ask me why I'm running for U.S. Senate, my answer is consistent and simple:
I believe that government should work for working people and working families.
That means making America's basic bargain accessible to every single person in this country — the idea that you can have one job, backed up by a union, and make enough to pay the bills and save for a rainy day.
It's the idea that your kids can go to a good school no matter your zip code. That if you get sick, you're able to see a doctor and afford the medications or treatments they prescribe.
It's the idea that if you want to start a small business, there's an environment for you to do it. And that you can retire with a level of dignity in a house that you were able to afford in the first place, in a neighborhood that is safe and clean.
I know that reality has been out of reach for so many families in Pennsylvania and across this country because it was out of reach for my family.
So I believe that if we're going to fix that and finally have a government that works for working families, we absolutely need a working person in the U.S. Senate.
That is why I'm running. And if you're like me and you think it's time for working families to get in on the basic bargain in this country, I need you today more than ever.
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? We're coming up on the final quarterly FEC deadline before our primary election, and we need to bring in a lot of donations this month to show the strength of our grassroots movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43110412/335753684/-358086307?refcode2=53cc3e60-d0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220318-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2NjM2U2MC1kMGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPdJ0ssKKFj0E3ug9nLB3z5nH5iGNkteRHU7Wbn9y4c=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43110413/335753685/-358086307?refcode2=53cc3e60-d0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220318-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2NjM2U2MC1kMGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPdJ0ssKKFj0E3ug9nLB3z5nH5iGNkteRHU7Wbn9y4c=)**
Thanks for helping me take our fight for working families to Washington. I couldn't do this without you.
All my best,
MK

While we believe in freedom and independence, the D.C. Swamp’s Maggie Hassan can’t say the same. _She’s so against having energy independence that she won’t even use her voice to stop our funding of Putin’s War Machine through relyi ng on Russian blood oil!_ Financing Vladimir Putin is **NOT** what putting our state and country first looks like - and it’s yet another reminder why we need to send Hassan packing this year. President Trump got it right – he put America First while Joe Biden and the Democrats continue to put America LAST.

The Left’s disastrous agenda has included closing our schools, firing workers over the vaccine, and allowing hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to pour into our country unchecked... just to name a few.

But NOW SOARING gas prices have crippled hard-working Americans and Joe Biden and the Democrats have **NO ONE TO BLAME BUT THEMSELVES. THEIR POLICIES AND THEIR INACTION ARE SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE PRICES WE’RE PAYING.**

clean_body: Everyday Americans are being forced to pay RECORD GAS PRICES and they deserve an apology. | | | Peter, President Trump got it right – he put America First while Joe Biden and the Democrats continue to put America LAST. The Left’s disastrous agenda has included closing our schools, firing workers over the vaccine, and allowing hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to pour into our country unchecked... just to name a few. But NOW SOARING gas prices have crippled hard-working Americans and Joe Biden and the Democrats have NO ONE TO BLAME BUT THEMSELVES. THEIR POLICIES AND THEIR INACTION ARE SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE PRICES WE’RE PAYING. Small businesses, families – the backbone of our country – are hurting because Joe Biden and the Democrats are refusing to put America First. The Left could change the course they’ve put America on – but they are refusing. Opting instead to play politics instead of serving the very people they were elected to protect. Enough is enough. Senator Joe Manchin is at it again, Peter Willis.
This week, he kowtowed to his Big Oil donors and shut down the nomination of Sarah Bloom Raskin to be the Federal Reserve’s top banking cop.
It’s not hard to connect the dots here: Raskin wants to force big corporations — some of the worst fossil fuel polluters in the world — to take responsibility and lead the way on the shift to clean energy. Her nomination was supported by progressives and climate activists, because she’s willing to do what’s necessary to bring polluters under control.
The corporate donors who bankroll Manchin (a millionaire coal baron himself) weren’t having it. **We HAVE to end this type of corruption in Washington and elect true progressives whose votes aren’t up for sale.[Can you pitch in before our critical end-of-quarter March 31 deadline?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAR0rnd43L15JoHhiZ82ndthsS20WuyUNs90qN_yav-5QE1jAGDwvJpeMn4FQoOcZS4OnBTLgkTh-yltMdHsVQCBPX6GOyIxeyQBI8QoArL8aWu6rB5AZ3MbNmiC4jfJCkBTwYmHOGz8I2Qa3kb1CCEEs6_Ku_u4v18pvOgC-0fTmsAIVyYMqwYo7-vPkGci_FzGFmsmAhWsaDtrdvLQhxIVvzc9yOSY1DIqkyEVjcFtm5zamGLotRu-V76utkpCzr8YoZEIjlm-1sucSfVT0oKAYKYUafJCDz2gyw3R0xTZZoU0G7WYJrOPwHdAMiRBkIrodJDk7FuRLNpWtZXfjvKTiErpbosKqojNxfdB5n2Ajw/3kg/kSdiTggYSo2CnBo3mH-ohg/h1/47zV1oK8ruB647uGTkSyrGAKqZ6WNBl68lv5t1Ggcxw)**

Let’s not forget, Manchin single-handedly killed the Build Back Better Bill, stopping desperately needed investment in climate action, and shattering Democratic campaign promises to lower prescription drug prices and pass universal paid leave.
**We must ensure that when we elect Democrats, we’re not electing more Manchins who will auction off their votes to the highest dark money bidder — he did it to Build Back Better, and now he did it again with Raskin’s nomination.**
We need true, unbought progressives in Congress, because the more the Democratic Party embraces corporate donors and lobbyist funding, the less it represents the interests of our families, our communities, and our planet.
That’s why I’m running: to get dark money OUT of politics. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC or lobbyist money. And I’ll do whatever it takes to protect our planet for future generations.
**[Can you pitch in TODAY to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and send a true progressive champion for families to Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAR0rnd43L15JoHhiZ82ndthsS20WuyUNs90qN_yav-5QNfZN2n6wuwBmuHk2FZyfVh_EAC23Jq7l2XYnQG8JV2N2feI9n-hv52UR08U0r-lI3RzmaoWIJ2_lDKCK8IsabCMQjBvN7JegbU4k8JflEeGkhqVGNczS8uS2uRNJkEJ7fq7UJHzbwlpWbik3kvKI_D_t507i5e9JCslw7NIQk5NVOkODQA5YWomQ_jlBtl8HYT9ZNxY-8PiRmNK0BMs7lCh2YoC4oqARhwRtVxdC9JbXh3hdGFthe6698XvC8X2CAiS8HoWUuVikNILK7dDGB5N9EXfqa9c7HXYl3LbfYyvWhziIqXkwgw49FvayLo5Pg/3kg/kSdiTggYSo2CnBo3mH-ohg/h6/pEOb08VLxebSU3-phJQggiXYwZNf1w_5hepwOjfwjI4) **

clean_body: | | | | Senator Joe Manchin is at it again, Peter Willis. This week, he kowtowed to his Big Oil donors and shut down the nomination of Sarah Bloom Raskin to be the Federal Reserve’s top banking cop. It’s not hard to connect the dots here: Raskin wants to force big corporations — some of the worst fossil fuel polluters in the world — to take responsibility and lead the way on the shift to clean energy. Her nomination was supported by progressives and climate activists, because she’s willing to do what’s necessary to bring polluters under control. The corporate donors who bankroll Manchin (a millionaire coal baron himself) weren’t having it. We HAVE to end this type of corruption in Washington and elect true progressives whose votes aren’t up for sale. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Let’s not forget, Manchin single-handedly killed the Build Back Better Bill, stopping desperately needed investment in climate action, and shattering Democratic campaign promises to lower prescription drug prices and pass universal paid leave. We must ensure that when we elect Democrats, we’re not electing more Manchins who will auction off their votes to the highest dark money bidder — he did it to Build Back Better, and now he did it again with Raskin’s nomination. We need true, unbought progressives in Congress, because the more the Democratic Party embraces corporate donors and lobbyist funding, the less it represents the interests of our families, our communities, and our planet. That’s why I’m running: to get dark money OUT of politics. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC or lobbyist money. And I’ll do whatever it takes to protect our planet for future generations. ** Thanks, Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. You Can Oppose School Covid-Vaccine Mandates without Opposing Vaccines
By Bobby Jindal
_Lower Covid risk for children, the temporary nature of Covid vaccines, and the practices of other countries all argue in favor of leaving this vaccination decision to parents._
Two New York City officials recently called on Mayor Eric Adams to require full Covid vaccination next school year as part of the standard vaccination requirements for public schools. Democrats such as Virginia’s Terry McAuliffe don’t think parents should have a say in what schools teach their children, and many also want those same schools to override parents’ role as their children’s first and most important caregivers. Yet mandatory Covid-vaccination policies for schoolchildren worry 53 percent of parents, and 76 percent of parents are concerned about long-term effects of the Covid vaccine in children.

California, Louisiana, and Washington, D.C., have issued...

body:
Peter,

For weeks, Nikki’s been calling out DeSantis and the Florida GOP for manufacturing a culture war and fanning the flames of hatred instead of addressing the real and urgent problems facing our state.

And this week, the Miami Herald backed her up on it! Check out what the Miami Herald Editorial Board had to say about DeSantis’ failure to help struggling Floridians:

People across Florida agree that it’s time for a change — that it’s time for our government to start serving our interests instead of the interests of GOP mega-donors.

name: Gordon Center
subject: RE: Our deadline in 2 weeks

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220318?refcode=lpfe220318_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220318?refcode=lpfe220318_m]
Today, I want to talk about a big deadline we have coming up in two weeks: the first FEC fundraising deadline of the election year.
FEC deadlines are different from our usual monthly fundraising deadlines and goals. These are public reporting deadlines required by law.
As campaign treasurer, I will be keeping a close eye on our numbers the closer we get to the FEC deadline to make sure they’re tracking where they need to be. With the general election less than eight months away, we need to be prepared for weeks and months of organizing and outreach to connect with TX-07 voters (70% of them are new!) and tell them about Lizzie and the work she’s doing in Congress.
Here is a link where you can contribute before the FEC deadline: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220318?refcode=lpfe220318_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220318?refcode=lpfe220318_m]
Thank you for your generous support,
Gordon Center

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Let’s support Peter Welch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Defending our majority in the Senate is a top priority for 2022. We simply cannot afford to go back to the days where Mitch McConnell obstructed all progress.
That means playing offense and defense everywhere. There is an important election happening in Vermont, where Peter Welch is running to succeed my good friend Patrick Leahy. He needs our help today to make sure he has the resources to keep this seat blue.
**[Please chip in $5, $10, $20 or whatever you can today to support my friend Peter Welch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112119/335762717/1677397055?refcode=dd_em_220318_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh7BePKDyWKsaPkzkHeJqTGWzC6Glg3VjSthN9505ng=)**
Is this a safe blue seat? The answer is no. Vermont currently has a Republican governor. We cannot take this election for granted, especially when Peter’s opponent is a Trump appointee who would hand control of the Senate back to Mitch McConnell. Every seat matters.
Peter needs our support today. And even more – he deserves it. He’s a progresslive leader who has been Vermont’s Congressman since 2007. He’s an advocate for lowering the cost of prescription drugs, making child care more affordable, and protecting our democracy.
**[Peter is the kind of leader we need in the Senate. I know he will make Vermont proud – and help us defend and expand our Democratic majority. Please chip in $5, $10, $20 or whatever you can to help elect Peter Welch and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112122/335762725/1677397055?refcode=dd_em_220318_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh7BePKDyWKsaPkzkHeJqTGWzC6Glg3VjSthN9505ng=)**
Thank you,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112124/335762727/1677397055?refcode=dd_em_220318_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh7BePKDyWKsaPkzkHeJqTGWzC6Glg3VjSthN9505ng=)****

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Hi, Peter – did you see my last message?
| | |
---
Hi, Peter – did you see my last message? I'm reaching out again because I'm falling short of my midnight goal at the worst possible moment.
From December through the beginning of March, I was presiding over legislative sessions and my team wasn't allowed to fundraise because of state regulations. That means I entered my reelection year without raising _a single dollar._
Now, the GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and I need all hands on deck to catch up on my fundraising goals. **[Please, if you have $5 to spare, will you donate to help me reach my midnight goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112206/335762985/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8S4bxjBbT-CzaZWl5RW-i8q83BaF6TZVMdYEHJN0ofg=)**
Thanks for your support,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Michelle Lujan Grisham**
Date: Thu, Mar 17, 2022
Subject: We've started off behind
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112208/335763014/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8S4bxjBbT-CzaZWl5RW-i8q83BaF6TZVMdYEHJN0ofg=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $5, Peter – but first, please let me explain why I need your support:
I was in a total fundraising blackout for the first two months of my election year, and now we're behind, Peter.
I just started fundraising again last week, and it's going to take a huge push to put me back on track. That's why I set an emergency goal to inspire 5,000 supporters – including you – to become Election Year Members before the end of this week:
**[Will you please rush $5 to become an Election Year Member before Sunday at midnight? I can't keep New Mexico blue without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112209/335763015/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8S4bxjBbT-CzaZWl5RW-i8q83BaF6TZVMdYEHJN0ofg=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112210/335763016/-341899999?refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8S4bxjBbT-CzaZWl5RW-i8q83BaF6TZVMdYEHJN0ofg=)
Grassroots supporters are the cornerstone of this campaign. Because of your support, I have been able to enact bold, progressive policies like legalizing cannabis, acting on climate change, and providing free higher education.
We've accomplished so much, but all of our progress could be undone in an instant if the GOP flips our state red. There's no doubt that if more Republicans gain power here, they will try to restrict voting rights and personal freedoms, just like the GOP did in Texas.
**I'm fighting as hard as I can to defend our state from the GOP, but I'm behind on my goals right now because of the fundraising blackout. I can't keep New Mexico blue alone, so I need 5,000 people to become Election Year Members before the end of this week:**
**[I need your help to defend New Mexico from the GOP: Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now to become an Election Year Member?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43112212/335763022/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTZiOWUyZS1kNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8S4bxjBbT-CzaZWl5RW-i8q83BaF6TZVMdYEHJN0ofg=)**

clean_body: Hi, Peter – did you see my last message? | | | Hi, Peter – did you see my last message? I'm reaching out again because I'm falling short of my midnight goal at the worst possible moment. From December through the beginning of March, I was presiding over legislative sessions and my team wasn't allowed to fundraise because of state regulations. That means I entered my reelection year without raising a single dollar. Now, the GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and I need all hands on deck to catch up on my fundraising goals. = Thanks for your support, Michelle Lujan Grisham \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Michelle Lujan Grisham Date: Thu, Mar 17, 2022 Subject: We've started off behind | | | = I'm about to ask you for $5, Peter – but first, please let me explain why I need your support: I was in a total fundraising blackout for the first two months of my election year, and now we're behind, Peter. I just started fundraising again last week, and it's going to take a huge push to put me back on track. That's why I set an emergency goal to inspire 5,000 supporters – including you – to become Election Year Members before the end of this week: = = Grassroots supporters are the cornerstone of this campaign. Because of your support, I have been able to enact bold, progressive policies like legalizing cannabis, acting on climate change, and providing free higher education. We've accomplished so much, but all of our progress could be undone in an instant if the GOP flips our state red. There's no doubt that if more Republicans gain power here, they will try to restrict voting rights and personal freedoms, just like the GOP did in Texas. name: Team Latham
subject: The momentum is building
body:
Georgia voters want an experienced fighter
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

We're off to the final sprint towards the primary election on May 24th and the momentum for our campaign is mounting. I've been on the road a lot the past couple of weeks talking to voters and everywhere we go I've been converting them to Team Latham. Folks in Georgia are ready for experienced leadership in Washington D.C. and to have someone who will fight for them every step of the way. We kicked off the beginning of this final stretch in Watkinsville last night with a free concert and rally. The room was full of Georgia patriots who are ready to win this primary and help us take on Raphael Warnock in the fall. Special thanks to The Kinchafoonee Cowboys for their awesome performance!
---

|

| Last weekend I made two appearances on Fox News to discuss the ongoing situation in Ukraine and Putin's massive miscalculation. Watch a clip from the segment below.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NbntcDicMfVpQOYBuFQx0X1nkI4B7k-xu5vfwAWPEgshBrw_-gFoN1QIEDmAUMvV025eWEmaSTcLlA1ft_2fRWc8M0LcHlYcZWY-tpNobWou-mwyMXvrIlVDhiE7Pb_Ax7yHb_5WjliEpKLj0Jekueg6VK7fJWTcQFK4azccVexVi2lz7zzDpw==&c=RSVjRzcFyDRyaJYRouUFCU834ZuHEn_YHoOlMoPXisdeFlhN-2xIBw==&ch=ptBhxj7R0I_dUWex_YaEzGSiJCR6F4TLyAUadwldxX9L3tklRWJW5A==)

|

| [The other segment ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NbntcDicMfVpQOYBuFQx0X1nkI4B7k-xu5vfwAWPEgshBrw_-gFoN1QIEDmAUMvVLowGioTEVukAZHEbn61Uh89U1-w4wteX2MGhPrdQZ_D7BU9kSRnrKBr1VV5KoSYd3Te0SRPXw-4mUUlVtkjme9rOwy7m9BorShJiVVUZefIOM2frOY0hjii98K5GzB4KD-wgCeqRtgL4ApEzBavyPd38lhX9-Va8ccD6-cONIlA=&c=RSVjRzcFyDRyaJYRouUFCU834ZuHEn_YHoOlMoPXisdeFlhN-2xIBw==&ch=ptBhxj7R0I_dUWex_YaEzGSiJCR6F4TLyAUadwldxX9L3tklRWJW5A==)was with Fox News Foreign Correspondent Benjamin Hall. A couple of days later he was wounded on the ground in Ukraine, while Fox cameraman Pierre Zakrzewski and their Ukrainian colleague Oleksandra Kuvshynova were killed in the same attack. We are praying for Benjamin's recovery, and for the families of the two Fox journalists who tragically lost their lives. This has been a reminder of the horribly dangerous situation this world is in when we have evil, authoritarian leaders in power. Putin's war crimes won't go unanswered.
---
| I also joined the crew over at Xtra 106.3 to share some good stories from SEAL training, how my time in special operations has prepared me for this race, and why this isn't an opportunity for me--it's a mission. Watch the short clip below, and [listen to the full interview here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NbntcDicMfVpQOYBuFQx0X1nkI4B7k-xu5vfwAWPEgshBrw_-gFoN7hJaYcGI-VQ6VYGPjzyrrhkGwm6nIUwRkZdXpvUxhhOsKuaH9XyOcRc37-Jz_qSQFv69Sbpzb2yZnIH5NcN2-IINPj7SaFrc5UDzlnG0vcgBv4hTDI1-bZ6VQKM7bNygwwDF339DHDuB9iSuOxLgUkGklwbfxVDVg==&c=RSVjRzcFyDRyaJYRouUFCU834ZuHEn_YHoOlMoPXisdeFlhN-2xIBw==&ch=ptBhxj7R0I_dUWex_YaEzGSiJCR6F4TLyAUadwldxX9L3tklRWJW5A==)

We had some fun events last week, starting with a meet and greet at Nine Line Apparel, an awesome veteran-owned company right here in Georgia. It was a great time meeting fellow veterans and Georgia patriots who are ready to send Warnock packing.
---

Then we went over to the Rattlesnake Roundup and Wildlife Festival in Claxton, where the boys got a kick out of seeing a real rattlesnake!

| The time to vote is coming soon!
Mark your calendar to vote and be sure to encourage your family and friends to do the same!
Early Voting Begins May 2nd
Final Primary Election Day is May 24th
[Request an absentee ballot here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NbntcDicMfVpQOYBuFQx0X1nkI4B7k-xu5vfwAWPEgshBrw_-gFoNxa9cefeTjvZtetkGJGyr3OzOlzuCkuKgIowlR79PhVamYx8j9o2gILXvmCKxcbEfWk1NMZiO7i4_xIdYXa-lPM1RpZKrigesxcjIy7dUENRcwNQW4npBng=&c=RSVjRzcFyDRyaJYRouUFCU834ZuHEn_YHoOlMoPXisdeFlhN-2xIBw==&ch=ptBhxj7R0I_dUWex_YaEzGSiJCR6F4TLyAUadwldxX9L3tklRWJW5A==)

We need to make sure that every Republican in Georgia hears our message and is able to see that I'm the only candidate in this race with the experience to defeat Raphael Warnock and fight for Georgians everyday. Early Voting Begins May 2nd Final Primary Election Day is May 24th == | | As we inch closer to election day, we're working to reach our critical fundraising goal in time to launch our television ads. We need to make sure that every Republican in Georgia hears our message and is able to see that I'm the only candidate in this race with the experience to defeat Raphael Warnock and fight for Georgians everyday. == | == | | | Above all, thank you for all of the support that you've shown me as we work to take back our country. Make sure you stay up to date with our campaign by following us on ==, ==, and ==. Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. NE, Suite A #288, Atlanta, GA 39319 | | Sent by mailto:info@lathamsaddler.com

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 18th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 18th, 2022**
Peter,
This was another exciting week as over 30,000 workers at SEIU Local 500 and 32BJ SEIU joined #TeamPerezSneed. Marylanders deserve a Governor who understands that when unions thrive, we all thrive. Under a Perez-Sneed administration, unions will always have a seat at the table.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121107/335807019/-499464890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
We are so proud of the coalition of labor support that we have on our team, and we look forward to working together to create a state where all Marylanders have access to jobs, justice, and opportunity.
Thank you so much for your continued support.
Cheers!
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121108/335807020/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Last week, Shannon kicked off her weekend speaking at Black Men Unifying Black Men’s 93rd consecutive monthly meeting. Thank you for allowing Shannon the opportunity to share our vision and for all of the work you all do to create a better Baltimore.
Tom spent last weekend in downtown Frederick with Delegate Ken Kerr. They even got to make a special pit stop for some Trefoils thanks to Girl Scout Troop 37158.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121109/335807021/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
It was great to have a packed room for our event at Tenth Ward distillery in Frederick. Special thanks to County Executive Jan Gardner, Councilmember Jessica Fitzwater, and Delegate Ken Kerr for joining us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121110/335807022/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Thank you to the Milford Mill Community Association for welcoming Shannon at their meeting last week! We have an opportunity in this election to bring jobs, justice, and opportunity to all Marylanders, and we must seize this moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121111/335807023/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Tom had the great pleasure of participating in a climate forum hosted by Maryland Matters and the Maryland League of Conservation Voters where he was able to lay out his plan to fight climate change and bring environmental justice to our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121112/335807024/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Prior to the forum, #TeamTom volunteers got together to show their support for Tom as he headed in.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121113/335807025/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Throughout her career, Shannon has fought for workers by supporting collective bargaining, fair wages, and strengthening workers’ voices on the job. She was proud to testify in support of bill SB831 and educational support professionals across the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121114/335807026/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Tom had the privilege of joining members from the Lower Shore Progressive Caucus on Monday, where they discussed how we can work together to create a Maryland where zipcode never determines destiny.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121115/335807027/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Tom proudly stood alongside Casa de Maryland activists this week to fight for a Maryland where our immigrant communities have access to jobs, justice, and opportunity.
* * *
**Endorsements**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121116/335807028/1858686430?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121117/335807029/262474749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121118/335807030/-1245710119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
* * *
**In the News**
**[Perez Receives Union Endorsements for Governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121119/335807031/-1542971874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“Perez, also a former state and U.S. labor secretary, received endorsements from the Service Employees International Unions Local 500 and 32BJ that represent more than 30,000 education support personnel, janitors, security officers and airport workers in the state.”_
**[Service Employees International Union Locals Endorse Perez in Democratic Gubernatorial Primary](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121120/335807032/902840825?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“Tom Perez has an unmatched track record of protecting immigrants and helping workers win back wages and jobs when they were wronged,” Jaime Contreras, executive vice president of 32BJ SEIU, said in a statement. “What sets Tom Perez apart is that he experienced the struggles facing immigrant families and devoted 35 years to protecting the civil rights of minority communities and ensuring working-class families get their fair share. We will do whatever it takes to make the difference in this campaign because the difference he’s made in people’s lives cannot be overstated.”_
**[Maryland Electrical Workers Endorse Tom Perez for Governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121121/335807033/531241867?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“Tom Perez fought for Union electricians on the Montgomery County Council, as Maryland Secretary of Labor, and as U.S. Secretary of Labor. Now we’re ready to fight for him,” IBEW Local 26 Political Director Tom Clark said. “Tom is a staunch supporter of creating middle class careers and stands out as a ‘Champion of Labor.’ The International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 26 enthusiastically endorses Tom Perez to be Maryland’s next governor.”_
**[Candidates for Maryland governor discuss reducing state’s carbon footprint](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121122/335807034/-1142508510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc5Y2FiNC1mN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMBqfMHHxlF3PE516yo950e8I_Wa1S37E0mUhfUAkao=&emci=1380002b-c9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9379cab4-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“Time is running out to tackle the challenge of climate change,” said Democratic candidate and former U.S. Labor Secretary Tom Perez, who called for making Maryland an “offshore wind capital of the United States,” as well as the nation’s “solar capital.”_

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 18th, 2022 Peter, This was another exciting week as over 30,000 workers at SEIU Local 500 and 32BJ SEIU joined #TeamPerezSneed. Marylanders deserve a Governor who understands that when unions thrive, we all thrive. Under a Perez-Sneed administration, unions will always have a seat at the table. We are so proud of the coalition of labor support that we have on our team, and we look forward to working together to create a state where all Marylanders have access to jobs, justice, and opportunity. Thank you so much for your continued support. Cheers! Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Last week, Shannon kicked off her weekend speaking at Black Men Unifying Black Men’s 93rd consecutive monthly meeting. Thank you for allowing Shannon the opportunity to share our vision and for all of the work you all do to create a better Baltimore. Tom spent last weekend in downtown Frederick with Delegate Ken Kerr. They even got to make a special pit stop for some Trefoils thanks to Girl Scout Troop 37158. It was great to have a packed room for our event at Tenth Ward distillery in Frederick. Special thanks to County Executive Jan Gardner, Councilmember Jessica Fitzwater, and Delegate Ken Kerr for joining us. Thank you to the Milford Mill Community Association for welcoming Shannon at their meeting last week! We have an opportunity in this election to bring jobs, justice, and opportunity to all Marylanders, and we must seize this moment. Tom had the great pleasure of participating in a climate forum hosted by Maryland Matters and the Maryland League of Conservation Voters where he was able to lay out his plan to fight climate change and bring environmental justice to our state. Prior to the forum, #TeamTom volunteers got together to show their support for Tom as he headed in. Throughout her career, Shannon has fought for workers by supporting collective bargaining, fair wages, and strengthening workers’ voices on the job. She was proud to testify in support of bill SB831 and educational support professionals across the state. Tom had the privilege of joining members from the Lower Shore Progressive Caucus on Monday, where they discussed how we can work together to create a Maryland where zipcode never determines destiny. Tom proudly stood alongside Casa de Maryland activists this week to fight for a Maryland where our immigrant communities have access to jobs, justice, and opportunity. Endorsements In the News “Perez, also a former state and U.S. labor secretary, received endorsements from the Service Employees International Unions Local 500 and 32BJ that represent more than 30,000 education support personnel, janitors, security officers and airport workers in the state.” “Tom Perez has an unmatched track record of protecting immigrants and helping workers win back wages and jobs when they were wronged,” Jaime Contreras, executive vice president of 32BJ SEIU, said in a statement. “What sets Tom Perez apart is that he experienced the struggles facing immigrant families and devoted 35 years to protecting the civil rights of minority communities and ensuring working-class families get their fair share. We will do whatever it takes to make the difference in this campaign because the difference he’s made in people’s lives cannot be overstated.” “Tom Perez fought for Union electricians on the Montgomery County Council, as Maryland Secretary of Labor, and as U.S. Secretary of Labor. Now we’re ready to fight for him,” IBEW Local 26 Political Director Tom Clark said. “Tom is a staunch supporter of creating middle class careers and stands out as a ‘Champion of Labor.’ The International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 26 enthusiastically endorses Tom Perez to be Maryland’s next governor.” “Time is running out to tackle the challenge of climate change,” said Democratic candidate and former U.S. Labor Secretary Tom Perez, who called for making Maryland an “offshore wind capital of the United States,” as well as the nation’s “solar capital.” ICYMI Schedule subject: The media is lying about Ukraine and Russia
body:
Did you think the propaganda surrounding Covid-19 was bad? We’re about to see worse—Ukraine is the next media propaganda sh
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjalemmfdivjd91bghc1ke0pt7r4k9jhsvrs4gg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9geasljehhnadj5mpiefdpjc3h72o73mmor1cjgecoj0or1m6rjctj2eerm0tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncooj5cr2c1p76phkc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cthmcob7cpg649fg)

Hello Friend,

Did you think the propaganda surrounding Covid-19 was bad?

We're about to see worse--Ukraine is the next media propaganda show.

The media's talking heads are already starting the show.
* White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki is spouting administration rhetoric by **blaming rising gas prices on the conflict in Ukraine** even though prices were already on the rise before.

* Stephen Colbert, a CBS comedian, said,_ "A clean conscience is worth a buck or two," _and that he'll _" pay $15 a gallon because I drive a Tesla."_ A multimillionaire with a Tesla may not care about the cost of gas, but we do. That shows how out of touch they are with the average person.

* _The View 's_ hosts are now calling for a federal investigation because Tucker Carlson dared to question the mainstream narrative.

**The propaganda is worse than ever, but the Media Research Center (MRC), America 's premier media watchdog, is fighting back.**
[_**Will you support TRUTH in media, STOP radical propaganda, and EXPOSE media liars by donating $25, $50, $100, or any generous amount? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zknvf0mrp56936bmv3m8r6h1sff001kbtmqi7hr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj62pr6c1h2bs)

Let me introduce myself briefly. I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media.**

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.

**I am asking for your immediate support today to help me raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcav2c39kn8mud0t7j8er6lediu0ua07l1hqriqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj62pr6c1h2bs)

These celebrity talking heads are oblivious to the true harm war between two nuclear powers can cause.

They are trying to blame Biden's failures-- inflation and sky-high food and energy prices-- on Ukraine.

They callously discuss escalating conflict and rising gas prices as if it was no big deal. _**But these lies affect real people**_. So the MRC is exposing them for the liars they are.

I refuse to stand idle and let lies reign in America.

Will you stand with me? **Click any link below to donate.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3v7ri5hi6bsh875bc20no22qtg5g7r63v90q0d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj62pr6c1h2bs)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlv95uo45r6ovdu7eb34739vh8c3v3gshehrcu4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj62pr6c1h2bs)

The leftwing media protects politicians... MRC exposes the truth about them.

The leftwing media tries to hide Biden's failure with inflation and jobs... MRC spreads the truth and exposes the media bias.

Donald J. Trump March 17th, 2022
Speaker Robin Vos, of the Great State of Wisconsin, just said there was “widespread fraud” in the 2020 Presidential Election, but that the State Legislature cannot do anything about it. Wrong! If you rob the diamonds from a jewelry store, if you get caught, you have to give the diamonds back, votes should be no different. There is already a very powerful resolution in the Wisconsin State Assembly that calls for the decertification of the 2020 Election and reclaiming of Wisconsin’s 10 electoral votes. There is so much fraud, as Vos knows, that this should be done quickly and easily. The highly respected Special Counsel, Michael Gableman, has exposed so much already, including election bribery with Mark Zuckerberg’s $8.8 million, horrific fraud stealing votes from the elderly in nursing homes, and rampant ballot harvesting and phantom votes. Far more votes than is needed for the Republican candidate, me, to win. Our Country would not be in the mess it’s in if Republicans had the courage to act. name: Phil Rizzo
subject: Be a Distinguished Guest on 4/28, New Jersey Needs Strong Patriots. Interested?
body:
Through our voices, we can make basic civil liberties and a thriving economy a reality once again in our state.
Dear Peter,

Jersey Rising is sponsoring a very special event on April 28th in Somerset, NJ and I want you to join me!

Please [RSVP to join us today](https://app.officeslabs.com/index.php/campaigns/ra657tc3v3aad/track-url/bg359b0b2r1e8/6828ed3fddb3d767da7ad6a83ebeeec420ecf1b1) with code "JERSEYRISING10" for a discount off your ticket.

[A Seat At The Table](https://app.officeslabs.com/index.php/campaigns/ra657tc3v3aad/track-url/bg359b0b2r1e8/6ebf2eb3cb78a79bd7490ac2a106866b4a748e51) was founded by New Jerseyans who believe influence is for all of us. New Jersey will see a resurgence when everyday citizens have a seat at the table. Thorugh our voices, we can make basic civil liberties and a thriving economy a reality once again in our state.

You'll get to hear from and also have the opportunity to join in discussions with national, patriotic voices like Matt and Mercedes Shlapp, Gordon Chang, Sebastian and Katie Gorka, Paul Teller, and more as we talk about real solutions for the state and nation. Bill Spadea and Senator Ed Durr will also be there along with many of our Congressional Candidates!

Don't wait, seats are selling quickly.

Join me for A Seat At The Table!

\- Phil Rizzo

To stop receiving these emails, please go [here](https://app.officeslabs.com/index.php/campaigns/ra657tc3v3aad/track-url/bg359b0b2r1e8/e470b11db897feb41175afca2ea09724744ee19e)

With the candidate likely to win the GOP nomination pandering to Trump and focused on nothing more than hero worship of his far-right extremist policies, we don’t have a moment to lose. = Thank you, Bri Begin Forwarded Message: This week, I’m busy working in the hospital, but I had to send a quick message to let you know we have an incredibly important deadline approaching. The candidate filing deadline is this month , and marks a critical turning point for our campaign. However, I can’t miss work – which is why I’m asking for your help. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Meanwhile: Katie Arrington is continuing to showcase her hero worship of Donald “Big Daddy” Trump at events like last weekend’s Trump rally and MAGA-palooza. Nancy Mace also won’t say a bad word against Trump, despite him calling her a “loser” and “crazy.” On the weekdays, I’m working to keep our kids healthy and safe, and on the weekends, I’m connecting with our community. And now, I’m advocating for a suspension of our federal gas taxes because people are struggling with record-high gas prices. It’s clear: One candidate is focused on Lowcountry families, and it isn’t one of my Republican challengers. = Thanks for your help, Dr. Annie | = | = ** Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress PO BOX 1431 Johns Island, SC 29457 United States **

**Walker 47% -- Warnock 44%
Walker 48% -- Warnock 46%
Walker 49% -- Warnock 48%**

name: Leora Levy
subject: Why we must fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_t=qs21v9Z1m1lL7bDx1Xj5ZU5R9PPZWXV8wv7xlb_2za1rqFKliWW_dTn9zba4lL6IHmU00yc8OcaGmGYAeZFbAQWh8UhilxPskuh6GQa_oUtIP78JaaHwPU4EG0ZrrsCSetuXI2bAnwC4CyhSoWYAmcBcmgoD8sqQQ3OguBK9h1w%3D).

[
](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETVi2x7m5PCuv6FKGpsqjjarsLB0ersHGB3xz5IqPPzbbGDr5FZyaBOU-i6vQaaovC-bwxBwW6RYTx9ZKyfatQVhkzieYvcuVJ2_UusJXQHZMnW1TPvy-Q2qMozsxjhdDXzTakKKrTb7ywdhEyZtMnVZ_QHlJAa2mRezeQhNke_EwLzyyJt79VzfQJ3nvNEbnOFFPthPylWUJeoInFzY_CN2w%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Peter - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETV0VqZ4ZtmoNYWkNeuIojPSvwpy9D-S3Di5dNoYYKUe2H-Wv1LZ2HfetGaL6CssmuXvLkl9CUnqS1U5qjssez18i5IY4__LAQP1t-w2m_GIzrIP3BarWR6cZSrcmH5ElPOD_NS12DozRi6wc1mVCiIFR7xIn90LEv6IrmToT3uLmj1zKVWgjs9y1ej7WoOF5HIlJey5aclkAGB9AC6sjHLtw%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETV8jt1sArMc_21lWVNfY94y9V2Kz_jR_z-JjfFMkz21LN2hrm7JngjQGQxd223JnIkkkqY465ixy_XKZAtHRcOKZf7gPgG3VAKNVWKPJaQiFaDRx1vOtjCStO046NUT_qn3VolsiM-RvM9FZ8M3pNSAMQWx2Sj8dNhXeubIs6lZnDTEKdcYHjGTF8sJOAxm9ODE2xBnovxXI9PVWmwFG69hg%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETVjyJESW9KFfqez0YTiFF3DVk6jaq94Tk3bVP8x6WCV1RNuVYVc_FkuVWzfjrL9KnEK26HNy4X_yoFLQlU3DOabdrNgmzLMU5_YEfbIeKLMKFN0Z8eDtkvF6GM0IgVusg-g1SBixd8_hjOTc4HbjYtGr85QBaTP_YlBwxLRyJePcbVTWH8yG_jDSi-VoeB1ipKle1JRXs2fJQbiE-mwgtqUQ%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETVHHpUS3hDKR4sYHEvXBQTaTOWI6ZEZ0h-ANJZpHzPQFyXuSTfNDHLfyg4CI19FdD-fVsNXo_hvDrJ9-LjbuZ-oN6dARKXtTVVtEvBEJUqv6cZwpOO114LCol80GfRhfK2zKngGP5eFMS_uAJ9dCI7tnwxuPBNb6XiCamcUwP-Zxeo1WMFx3rh2Me6Woih72myAk8WM8RrHJnX9IVI1VwUiw%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETViLr4FT8hxCi11My8BzP3tBphKy28NcevPgUY_mn7Grp0v_eGDFpAQJ91vMmKpxgh2ioslU89tnrHZ9hlCbGvIo5WW51IuuzyXGOiwvnbUHuJHpHFMyJLHUvNuADf-CZpGMooSYjBeYTVZEsYqoaM5SXllxp-H9pAhkJvyXPVP8M2VwTheDBay5QezKwjZ6eHIWDKA2EueZqyxgfOlwNn5A%3D%3D)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_e=xgCB8ubtuTqL8z-tv6YMqzC_rAgcD7XgNs59wBYVEfVXbjJbRSC9gjq_jltlzgIDLu_Jj6lEorc4454cXiWo6YA2VZr_-THHobx19CioiGE5NWUgTcKSaIPYZsig0cVayfG1XAjqYaPSwHbnpqUEKkpThkksvWFCABRtV3B8Rw1o-3mnv9d2CcTbEHl3OQQE7eLhUR_uqCMVoY9CZcPC1VAtKx2OgBIO35pfa6pk5pwVQpP29KqoQ90EjvXEvETVjBb-oMtA9Zfmwe0qopqnTsCA8MAiNKfTrPJ51X_BX-kqIDlLg5XV2ipF73GYfJcgyx8CtLprCmoIeaMcs_8h3IFWAPK7VKWy7ZNMtuxNhnv0GmKtLTTKxAGtbwDPQkhKYukRnR5BjksfXBUAdD1yx9jEfVWWO93Cw5U6XS6RWH3LgbQyEWccVL-5SyydBzNDofRJiefyLBMWq3KHG-GJCQ%3D%3D)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

---
| Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc.
---

If this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate...[**unsubscribe here**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=861e4826b2134217a9bda8c140a74181&_t=qs21v9Z1m1lL7bDx1Xj5ZU5R9PPZWXV8wv7xlb_2za1rqFKliWW_dTn9zba4lL6IHmU00yc8OcaGmGYAeZFbAQWh8UhilxPskuh6GQa_oUtIP78JaaHwPU4EG0ZrrsCSetuXI2bAnwC4CyhSoWYAmcBcmgoD8sqQQ3OguBK9h1w%3D).

name: Team Jazz
subject: rehabilitative justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo]
INSTANT POLL
Do you agree it’s time to reform our judicial process and move towards a system of rehabilitative justice?
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/lPHSuvp6u0W3X293IU1-Ew2?contactdata=gI4ACdkSHrSnJtC0eyw05m890q02XI5RtMgA89DzzdzpKdGfyjCl1Q0vvXCE5ZS2xH8FpZHbpheREq3NaabTAy2euqplDwkMGqyX0zwYxWcapO%2B%2Fb8jovBdahsMo5kcqODQ3FQYvqThDns81J08IPJ74dFwTl4JJA3zLXMkEEhI%3D&refcode2=top_btn-yes] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/lPHSuvp6u0W3X293IU1-Ew2?contactdata=gI4ACdkSHrSnJtC0eyw05m890q02XI5RtMgA89DzzdzpKdGfyjCl1Q0vvXCE5ZS2xH8FpZHbpheREq3NaabTAy2euqplDwkMGqyX0zwYxWcapO%2B%2Fb8jovBdahsMo5kcqODQ3FQYvqThDns81J08IPJ74dFwTl4JJA3zLXMkEEhI%3D&refcode2=top_btn-no]
On this day in 1963, the Supreme Court held that the Sixth and Fourteenth Amendments guarantee a right of legal counsel to anyone accused of a crime. Only 59 years ago, Americans could be forced to represent themselves against the State if they could not afford an attorney.
Today, we must continue to fight to create a more just and equitable society. One of the ways that we’ll get there is by ensuring incarcerated Americans -- disproportionately people of color -- can reenter society as beneficial, contributing members of their communities.
Jazz has worked hard to pass criminal justice reform during his time in Annapolis. He’s banned solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women. He’s created second chances, like guaranteeing young offenders with a life sentence get a resentencing hearing after 20 years -- and ensuring that those returning to society get the resources they need to succeed.
Now Jazz is running for Congress because it’s time to give people who haven’t been given a second chance, or a first chance, a shot.
Do you agree it’s time to reform our judicial process and move towards a system of rehabilitative justice? Please, click here to let us know or select an answer below.
