clean_body: [] INSTANT POLL Do you agree it’s time to reform our judicial process and move towards a system of rehabilitative justice? YES » [] NO » [] On this day in 1963, the Supreme Court held that the Sixth and Fourteenth Amendments guarantee a right of legal counsel to anyone accused of a crime. Only 59 years ago, Americans could be forced to represent themselves against the State if they could not afford an attorney. Today, we must continue to fight to create a more just and equitable society. One of the ways that we’ll get there is by ensuring incarcerated Americans -- disproportionately people of color -- can reenter society as beneficial, contributing members of their communities. Jazz has worked hard to pass criminal justice reform during his time in Annapolis. He’s banned solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women. He’s created second chances, like guaranteeing young offenders with a life sentence get a resentencing hearing after 20 years -- and ensuring that those returning to society get the resources they need to succeed. Now Jazz is running for Congress because it’s time to give people who haven’t been given a second chance, or a first chance, a shot. Team, Jackie Gordon knows what it means to fight a tough fight.

She spent 29 years in the U.S. Army and was deployed four times over the course of her career. As an educator and school guidance counselor, she worked with her students to seize every opportunity available to them.

**But Jackie has a tough road ahead.** Top nonpartisan election forecasters recently rated NY-01 a “TOSS-UP” and a key district in determining the House Majority this fall. That means that what happens here could decide who controls Congress, and that this election is going to come down to the wire.

**I know Jackie is up for the challenge, but she’s going to need a full grassroots movement on her side to see this through.**

[**So if you’re able, please join me in supporting Jackie by helping her campaign fund the strategies it needs to run the toughest fight possible. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121792/335809913/1121121394?refcode=em_fr_220318gordon_n_rlbr_actives_8_ng_n_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM0OTRkYi1mYmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4izeq5LwuOtQJaZEWToHoNW1aNt2dlYBj6W-Qt6gnk=)

Thank you,

Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43121793/335809914/1121121394?refcode=em_fr_220318gordon_n_rlbr_actives_8_ng_n_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM0OTRkYi1mYmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4izeq5LwuOtQJaZEWToHoNW1aNt2dlYBj6W-Qt6gnk=)****

Friends,

In his farewell address to the country, George Washington spoke about the dangers of polarizing ourselves through parties. Today, too many of our leaders play partisan games with issues that impact our families and communities. Their desire to play politics instead of serving their constituents is beneficial to nobody but themselves.

Join me in telling Washington to put our country over partisan politics.

clean_body: Actions are greater than political games. Actions are greater than political games | | Friends, In his farewell address to the country, George Washington spoke about the dangers of polarizing ourselves through parties. Today, too many of our leaders play partisan games with issues that impact our families and communities. Their desire to play politics instead of serving their constituents is beneficial to nobody but themselves. Join me in telling Washington to put our country over partisan politics. As we inch closer to the 2022 election cycle, please consider donating to Team Cheney. | | ---|---|--- | | As someone dedicated to our Constitution, I understand that actions speak louder than words and games. I want to thank you for your actions in helping us put our country over party. Thank you, Liz Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming

name: Karen Bass
subject: A message for the people in your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Important. Please read.

Team —

I have about fifteen minutes of free time today, so I wanted to update you on our mid-month deadline.

We just _barely_ missed our mid-month goal. This deadline was the most important we've faced as a campaign since launch. It was our first deadline since I officially qualified for the June primary ballot and since another candidate broke the spending cap on this race by spending over $4.4 _million_ in his first month.

We're facing an expensive race and a crowded field, which means we can't afford to miss any goal we set. Right now, the polls show me with a lead. But, if I've learned anything from years of community organizing, a race isn't won until polls close and the ballots are counted.

I'm counting on this team to help us turn things around before tonight's extended mid-month deadline to show our opponent and anyone who's watching that we can make history this year. **[Will you chip in before tonight's extended deadline to help us reach our goal? We need at least nine people from your area to step up. I'm hoping I can count on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122136/335811260/-1030957994?ms=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=56pfNFeklJ6PVA9itdDPkFOGrhHZW6qA7Fwihm60dn1SOSm8OdSKoTjrdCeE%2Fvuf6Yd1bKlPTnzM3R1EUtGmEh%2FmGSlll%2BEnQVK1zCxE9s3E1jFI7amEQdBRlsCjvl4nMtpCm2%2FGkKxzQGIivV2N%2FA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM0YjliMS1mZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lurnbaV02oBboPLKrMbzuSv_VB1mEwNHPkw8L7ctOC4=&emci=523d99e9-a7a4-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a534b9b1-fda6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

---
I decided to run for mayor because I saw my city facing once-in-a-generation challenges and I asked myself, "How can I not do everything I can to help?" L.A. has called me home, and I'm ready to serve the people.

This campaign has what it takes to make history. We've seen proof of our momentum in the polls, in our recent endorsements (thank you Speaker Pelosi!), and in the face-to-face conversations we've been having with voters. But it's not over until it's over. And I'm counting on you to help us cross the finish line.

**[My team tells me we need at least nine people from your area to donate before tonight's extended deadline. I'm hoping I can count on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122140/335811264/-1030957994?ms=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=56pfNFeklJ6PVA9itdDPkFOGrhHZW6qA7Fwihm60dn1SOSm8OdSKoTjrdCeE%2Fvuf6Yd1bKlPTnzM3R1EUtGmEh%2FmGSlll%2BEnQVK1zCxE9s3E1jFI7amEQdBRlsCjvl4nMtpCm2%2FGkKxzQGIivV2N%2FA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM0YjliMS1mZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lurnbaV02oBboPLKrMbzuSv_VB1mEwNHPkw8L7ctOC4=&emci=523d99e9-a7a4-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a534b9b1-fda6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: John Fetterman
subject: Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s use the power of our campaign to stand in solidarity with striking nurses.
#
Derek,
**Nurses, like other frontline workers, are heroes of this pandemic.**
After everything they've done + all the lives they've saved, they shouldn't *need* to march in the streets for safe conditions and fair pay.
Yet, that’s exactly what’s happening here in Armstrong County, Pennsylvania.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45467?refcode=em20220318-5030&t=1&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)
Yesterday, I was honored to join the PA Association of Staff Nurses + Allied Professionals in their fight for the conditions and pay they deserve.
The union way of life is sacred, and we should *always* protect it. Weekends, the eight hour workday, benefits — we have all that thanks to unions and the centuries-long labor movement that built this nation.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45467?refcode=em20220318-5030&t=2&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)
In the face of unprecedented attacks on workers and the right to form a union, we must support our unions and pass the PRO Act — a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America.
**When you send me to the Senate this November, I promise you I will be the 51st Democratic vote to pass the PRO Act and other necessary legislation to support workers across PA + the country.**
[**_If you can, please consider chipping in to support my campaign so I can continue to support the Union way of life and fight for working families._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45467?refcode=em20220318-5030&t=3&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)
**[Chip in»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45467?refcode=em20220318-5030&t=22&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)**
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Our primary is in less than two months, but our last quarterly public FEC filing deadline before the primary is in just under two weeks from now. Pundits, our opponents, and the GOP super PACs will be watching our numbers to see the strength of our movement. **[We can’t afford to slow down — can you rush a donation today to help us end the quarter as strong as possible?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45467?amount=5&refcode=em20220318-5030&t=23&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220318-5030-footer&t=24&refcode2=5030_434096_el4nNP&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5030%2E434096%2Eel4nNP)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Booker
subject: 📲 It’s Charles!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

During this phase of a campaign, you’ll typically find a candidate
spending hours each week calling big donors for contributions. But not us
— grassroots donors are the heart of this movement, and together, we’re
working to make Kentucky a place where every single Kentuckian, not just
the rich and powerful, can thrive.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220318?refcode=em20220318&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1664_346206_7eVB7_&akid=1664%2E346206%2E7eVB7_ ]Peter, Charles
is calling donors who chip in any amount to this email. So please pitch in
right now — $5, $50, or anything you can — and he may give you a call to
say thanks!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220318?refcode=em20220318&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1664_346206_7eVB7_&akid=1664%2E346206%2E7eVB7_ ]Contribute $5

We believe Kentucky can thrive when we lift up the voices of hardworking
people from the forgotten places, and build a new coalition of people from
the hood to the holler. But we’re up against a lot,
Peter. The wealthy and powerful
have spent decades suppressing our voices and our votes; they’re not going
to back down without a fight.

We’re putting in the work across Kentucky, meeting voters where they are —
online, at events, and on their doorstep. Your support is key to running
our campaign and getting Charles to the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220318?refcode=em20220318&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1664_346206_7eVB7_&akid=1664%2E346206%2E7eVB7_ ]If you donate in response to this email, then you might just get a
phone call from Charles, thanking you for chipping in and powering our
grassroots campaign for Kentucky.

Thank you, and keep your phone on — you might just get a call from
Charles!

— Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220318-1664-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1664_346206_7eVB7_&akid=1664%2E346206%2E7eVB7_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1664%2E346206%2E7eVB7_

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Crystal Cavalier for Congress
subject: Can you give 10 minutes to Crystal this weekend?
body:
| [ ](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=1)
---
Friend -- There are 60 days until the May 17th primary, and thank GOODNESS we have you, and all the inspired folks signing up each day to help Crystal win. **Can you give 10 minutes to help the campaign this weekend?** **We need all of Crystal’s supporters to share/copy-paste our[UPCOMING EVENTS INFO (CLICK HERE!)](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kdWOxpTbWYtQKL0oAej53G2d3j9h8LsaRnvigwLNqkAcEE9kQSNFh7Hp-GWqT5AqjabM0_qXU34kGONyQECQqFc5yDelkEIj_0iMFbKSC3DT&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=2) with 1-5 people** **who live in NC District 4** = Orange County, Alamance County, Durham County, Person County, Granville County, and a section of Caswell County. Sharing via email, social media posts, phone calls and in-person conversations are ALL great. [](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEPyy39Y555AOGNlSJF9W1dy&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=3) _This is relational organizing_ , and it is the reason grassroots campaigns succeed. Think about it: if just 100 people reach out to 5 contacts each, that’s 500 connections! We are grateful for anything you can give this collective effort. In solidarity, Team Crystal Crystal Cavalier for Congress
[http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=4)
Crystal Cavalier for Congress · NC 27302, United States

You can also keep up with Crystal Cavalier for Congress on [Twitter](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNNDnqCJTTPwt2XTazggGMJ2tjMJ8nUphYEgLQPHRthUj&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=6) or [Facebook](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hKi9T2gEgzqocTncjoK-7Cbpo1uCcNsZXcxWLiy_Wo1&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=spread_the_word&n=7).

body:
Yesterday, Wexton tried to flip-flop her position on Green New Deal regulations and shirk responsibility for higher gas prices | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6a8c965f9e)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8710237eea&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

It's remarkable how quickly Democrats will flip-flop on their positions when election year comes around.

For years, my opponent Jennifer Wexton has done her best to adopt AOC's Green New Deal policies and cripple the oil and gas industry. You can see for yourself here:
---
|
---
| These policies have driven the cost of gas so high that Wexton knows she can't stay on the same path.

Just yesterday, she came out in support of Governor Youngkin's plan to suspend the Virginia gas tax.
---
|
---
| We can't let Wexton shirk responsibility for the crisis that she's caused.

Her Green New Deal clean energy policies have caused the price increases that are hurting hard-working Virginian families.

Wexton has pushed these policies for her entire career. If she wins re-election, she'll go right back to them and gas prices will continue to climb.

We can't let that happen. I'm running for Congress to put an end to the nonsensical and unaffordable energy policy of Jennifer Wexton and her radical party leadership.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign to help me restore American energy independence and bring a real solution to our energy crisis?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4d98c5377c&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=734d7a3e7b&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

---
|
Thank you for your support. Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives. Together, let's put an end to the costly agenda of Jennifer Wexton, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi and restore commonsense, affordable policies to our country.

Warm regards,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

body:
Peter , I have some exciting news for you! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122817/335814208/-366912648?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhYjgxMS0wMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiSZ-19R4XF32RlLB5xQseU7Gm84mFmImPm4HXAnv2M=)
Peter, I have some BIG news I'd like to share with you... If you haven't heard, the WI Supreme Court officially ruled in favor of Governor Evers' redistricting maps. This is a HUGE win and a good first step to having fair maps in Wisconsin. With that said, those maps have made many candidates re-evaluate their campaigns. For myself, the bad news is I was drawn a bit outside of the 5th Congressional District. After much thought, I have decided to make a change for my campaign. As sad as I am about it, I will no longer be running for Congress, but our work is not finished. I believe I will be able to best serve the State of Wisconsin by running for State Senate in the 5th District. Wisconsin deserves diverse, progressive leaders who are not afraid to get things done. Together, we are going to make some exciting things happen and move this state in the right direction. [**I encourage you all to check out my website to learn more about the State Senate campaign and how you can help!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122818/335814209/-2012316915?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhYjgxMS0wMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiSZ-19R4XF32RlLB5xQseU7Gm84mFmImPm4HXAnv2M=&emci=cbbfa89f-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c56ab811-00a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441) | **[Visit JessicaForWI.com »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122819/335814210/-2012316915?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhYjgxMS0wMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiSZ-19R4XF32RlLB5xQseU7Gm84mFmImPm4HXAnv2M=&emci=cbbfa89f-f7a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c56ab811-00a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)**
---
For those who are recurring donors... first off, thank you so much! Second, all recurring donations for my congressional campaign will be canceled. **If you would like to continue your support, please visit my State Senate campaign website!**
Thank you all so much for the amazing love and support. You have no idea how much your help meant to me. I cannot wait for this new adventure, and I hope you will join me for it. Stay tuned for more updates and announcements from my State Senate campaign.
Thank you again,
— Jessica

clean_body: Peter , I have some exciting news for you! | = Peter, I have some BIG news I'd like to share with you... If you haven't heard, the WI Supreme Court officially ruled in favor of Governor Evers' redistricting maps. This is a HUGE win and a good first step to having fair maps in Wisconsin. With that said, those maps have made many candidates re-evaluate their campaigns. For myself, the bad news is I was drawn a bit outside of the 5th Congressional District. After much thought, I have decided to make a change for my campaign. As sad as I am about it, I will no longer be running for Congress, but our work is not finished. I believe I will be able to best serve the State of Wisconsin by running for State Senate in the 5th District. Wisconsin deserves diverse, progressive leaders who are not afraid to get things done. Together, we are going to make some exciting things happen and move this state in the right direction. | For those who are recurring donors... first off, thank you so much! Second, all recurring donations for my congressional campaign will be canceled. If you would like to continue your support, please visit my State Senate campaign website! Thank you all so much for the amazing love and support. You have no idea how much your help meant to me. I cannot wait for this new adventure, and I hope you will join me for it. Stay tuned for more updates and announcements from my State Senate campaign. Thank you again, — Jessica | | Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin If you'd like to make a contribution to Jessica's grassroots campaign, please chip in = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin P.O. Box 14782 West Allis, WI 53214

| Hi Friends,

This is not a time to sit on the sidelines, I need your support. Centurion is the genuine warrior we need to send to WA DC. Centurion TAKE BACK AMERICA T-shirts are in and we plan on showing up in force at the Flowertown festival and local events across the District. Please RSVP for support at the Festival and we will assign you a task.

Upcoming Events:
* 3rd Thursday downtown Summerville at Hutchinson Square 5PM to 7PM, wear Centurion T-shirt, get names on clip boards. Pass out flyers.
* Edisto Beach One4Coffee House 22 March 5PM, 114 Jungle Rd Unit F, Edisto Island
* Candidate Forum - 2 Apr 830AM-10AM American Legion Post 166, 116 Howe Hall Rd Goose Creek.
* N Charleston Rotary - 2 May 12:00AM Hilton Garden 5265 International Blvd, N Charleston.

---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY (FULL FORCE) :
1\. Communicate with the Campaign. We need to know if you're showing up.
2\. Host a House Party.
3\. Let us know if you need a Sign.
4\. We are Door Knocking. Lets us know when you can walk with us. **

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion

[Folks, Speaker Nancy Pelosi is absolutely right.

**If you look at _history_ , Democrats’ prospects in the upcoming November elections look grim.** The president’s party loses an average of 26 seats in the midterm elections — but right now, we only control the House Majority by 6 seats.

**But if you look to the _future_ , it’s clear the stakes in this election are too high for us to fight with anything less than all we’ve got.** With a hoard of MAGA extremists, QAnoners, and literal January 6 insurrectionists running for office, it’s clear that a GOP takeover of the House would be a disaster. Plus, if Republicans win in 2022, Trump will use that momentum to jumpstart his 2024 presidential campaign.

**_Simply put, Nancy Pelosi is 100% right.

We’re so alarmed that we’ve activated a RARE 7X match! Please donate – any amount – to help us keep the House BLUE!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122867/335814490/910840266?refcode=20220318_em_f_3BP_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWE2MDQ3ZC0wMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odEB4CdO82LAwmq8S5AAdJk80n94lte1zKsCC1a-eH0=)

body:
[1]Erica Smith

I have wonderful news to
share with you:

Planned Parenthood Action Fund just announced that they’re endorsing me to
represent North Carolina’s 1st District in Congress. It means the world
that they know our campaign is in the best position to defend this
competitive, wide-open seat.

I’m proud to have worked to combat attempts to restrict access to abortion
and protect reproductive freedom while in the North Carolina Senate — and
I look forward to continuing the fight in Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45098?refcode=em20220318-1007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1007%2E3698%2ECQSNp_ ]Will
you chip in $5 or anything you can to our campaign? With
everything on the line in 2022, it’s important that Democrats win this
race and send a pro-choice champion to Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45098?refcode=em20220318-1007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1007%2E3698%2ECQSNp_ ]Donate $5

Policy is personal — and the fight to protect the right to choose is no
different.

I had my youngest son at 22 weeks. He was premature as a result of
preeclampsia and pregnancy-induced hypertension. At 16 weeks, my doctors
told me that if I continued my pregnancy I would be risking my own death.
And before his delivery, I had to decide on the priority of life.

Despite my infinite love for my children and family, I made the decision
for doctors to save my baby if they could not save us both. It was a
decision only I could make — no one else.

Nothing should stand in the way of our reproductive freedom. But from
Texas to North Carolina, there’s a rise in intentional and coordinated
attempts to overturn Roe v. Wade, making our fight to protect reproductive
healthcare more urgent than ever before.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45098?refcode=em20220318-1007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1007%2E3698%2ECQSNp_ ]My primary election is just 60 days away, and I’m up against an
anti-choice opponent. Your $5 contribution could make all
the difference in this race. Will you chip in to our campaign today?

Thank you,

Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220318-1007-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1007_3698_CQSNp_&akid=1007%2E3698%2ECQSNp_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1007%2E3698%2ECQSNp_

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

name: Courtney Geels
subject: Peter, Can I Ask You A Question?
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [](mailto:courtgeels@gmail.com)
---
| Hi Peter,
All along, I have been clear that my campaign is about putting people first. You deserve a representative who listens to your needs instead of tells you what they want. You deserve a politician from your community who knows the district and its people. And being born right here in Orange County, I know that I am that person. But still, I need to know your thoughts.
This election season has been especially difficult for voters because of time consuming redistricting delays that prevented you from knowing which district you are living in or even who will run to represent you. Even this week, the battle over North Carolina's maps rages on as state GOP leaders appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court for relief.
---
|
---
Luckily, there's an upcoming opportunity to fix this. In about a month, the Durham GOP will host a Congressional town hall where I will be able to share about my ideas for getting this country back on track. I am aware that a number of very important issues don't get the time they deserve in these kind of forums which is why I am asking you for your help.
Let me know which issues you think need to be discussed. My entire campaigns is about listening and understanding what concerns North Carolinians most. Hearing from you first-hand makes me a better candidates and stronger as a leader.
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtnHVFdhyBDmU2lj6KYE6NRxMn7xXDDHEdJlfJIHueONoYzBYElI57BVvJgD_uLxkns-U_r9jsAhO9eMdRblrG_YPWrNDhyf6g0jFfEO8Ut1CqCzKRQiC_HUrT_ziI6qy_Tc1I-6ihAU37gFOeUEWLMBnkm0eQHFifyMrmhT3HhjGoWb2aulNI9T-qAQeMVBikH1jtcO-wTrGC5SmAPt4wifgJ7Dzfk_sElBGc3mYdQeaAcdoK2PXJyr3MQZ5-RRKqhO61JXcBE=&c=OF3C1lc5DLMGKxEYXCnOMOp-nVc5kxdkAiVMy0hJp9RyRp_xSAqd5A==&ch=Tw-VkjFnGRcUY60OZ8TPQRe2rzPdxRCzlooPPZDB9T_XzSkVHgR1GQ==)
---
|
---
| Beating the Democrats in November is going to require a lot of work. Right now, I am focused on connecting with as many voters as possible and appreciate any help you can provide.
Do you have a campaign sign in your yard yet? If not, contact my team and let's show our neighbors that it is time for another Red Wave!
Thanks again, Peter.
-Courtney
---

subject: re: your feedback is requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=3369%2E9716520%2Eo6KLD6)
---
**" I'm personally asking you to help Democrats defend our Senate majority by giving just one minute of your time."
**
**\- CHUCK SCHUMER**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=3369%2E9716520%2Eo6KLD6)
---
Friend, I know I don't have to tell you how narrow our majority is. Mitch McConnell only has to flip ONE seat to take back power, and he's spending MILLIONS to make that happen.
But while the GOP caters to their wealthy donors, Senate Democrats are focused on middle-class families and small businesses. YOU are our priority -- and that's why it's vital to hear from you now.
**So today, I'm inviting the most engaged grassroots Democrats -- that includes you, friend -- to take our Strategic Majority Election Survey.**
| | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=3369%2E9716520%2Eo6KLD6)
---
**DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
---
| Priority: **CRITICAL**
Status: **INCOMPLETE**
---
Please, friend, taking just 60 seconds to respond to this exclusive priorities survey will help define how Democrats protect our Senate majority. **[Will you answer the first question right now?](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=3369%2E9716520%2Eo6KLD6)**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220318-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=3369%2E9716520%2Eo6KLD6)
---
Thank you,

Chuck Schumer

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking if you can contribute $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
What most people don’t know...
| | |
---
Friends –

First and foremost, thank you. I know we’ve sent a number of fundraising emails this week, and I appreciate you opening this one. Today is a big day.

What most people don’t know about our campaign is that most of the donations we receive come from people like you, chipping in what you can when you can. And that most of those donations come in response to emails like this one.
So, with our End of Quarter deadline right around the corner, I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please make your first $5 contribution, split between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43123128/335815444/-1369927540?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk758-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjVjNzE5Ny0wMWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hg2P2ZOGOfTbHqWBk7vgkxgjgbFoG7LdfsZrl1Vxx0=)

name: Leora Levy
subject: Why I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_t=AwAGem4Gq0bAPvjpjEuSMigQvqWLaJPRbUn9c6EmPMPxSwKgAxlYcYLYBJT44k7QeQUERrKevzJmWhQmy7buI7cPCZ3mPllR_FYqlbwVFa2UKgsT-zqwJ52p87PPZJ0kYkeEpDGy8qnwNI8nQjrMt9FOrgrMzjy63zY83krvRPU%3D).

[
](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS7XkuNTdacMvph0MvRYakc9hbcm2Ddw2h4ERohAAjrDG8JL1S_3EcMKP6cUQ9ldnIGhxwHe-PreTLaw_YK7KzD3bofDnxsnDscTBnT4fbjJakhfz6BTTVjAvl3tKugUOt_IPe7rVzc_5COdaLFuTLl3qG7hq1pN4rorcT0Lr8u_lu6EcNSU6Q2D10GvJF-_V-GqKYhc0V3ICQei7qsb1DrMasXSC6_z98SAhqI_l9MUXg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Fellow Conservative - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS4OVIqDd9aqK3gFgosffwXUfvm4f2c9AUetGuswwftVXsodE5hzMRFmjwW5nCc4VhSm-hqsMUAZ4JE-aBelV_Anv8kkRM-mdQY8Gg9YIVO3dKnsUjyICQk_QblbNngURbdSBER39W8wYTKOTD_acPwiSx50Udqs9XhC2C8Wbv3YUBNA3yihv77YqJeh5wxyeUXUF9_7EhnCfXLYQGl91Jz9C6gyvkbA4YE2QjlhnIGVVg%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS4bdRGCDAsUTY5tSwXyZqL6bXirl6ZGS7_-zTm1tEfhRMsGrz2dqKakPw0Tn9fP7cwlZ38_oicEgXCETCNo5uERfsRwKMxOMJhC9eo2REIc3vuUmYsGy0rq0FvSgMyzoSuHgfaKsQYubnybyu0vmHCRH231FkNuMrFlce98IVB395QZFX8U4huUZ7DBnJSER-G2ghgU2Ls5Nj57g1fa4oZcygcTee0Be4avUNC0JRFz_Q%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS5bOXb2fJpVoYkAo1imNWoQqimMPAK_wj2f61_Z9p8_u0oRSJ5bnDaNYTuc7zA7SOS27qpXQjqHN8A4JjuaDW4_xwhX9GiNnv4iwbSgKfrnT_uCxhmyO40OPQvJBsRcYEmnkW5_j23IlQIgmqYbSmvpPzH4F1Y52wxMSHA2vxvNIVgE3wa7zI7hNtT-oDHtu6ZUGieu0bBcalwcAJFoSR-5duVpHHdnDwue_llqjd0wAA%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS41syiY_wRnR44mhZCc2tuDtlAFpXoeP9awBZ5v0VCwn2mU8OGI8ljkLGVXXfN7lpdOSmiLWYOrzekM30Dtn05SgHvYdGJh-pAGsWn7OPYbG7seJCtvI-tp5QDlD3rQIlfsl881vIwpflJAl9DZIH37fTe_8KVv3u3C9Jdv7M_2ViUmzX-892YPvGEF2ECHKFRg4mmvkb8YFxI-SF0HMhbBs5r3lSSWMKit5In-ak96hQ%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS4rxpxwyd2t6NZbGLYdXd_3jPADnci3ZeeAjXDA5bHxQo4zhbeITZlcNbdPiDeumOxFrwxJCM6ZNoG3B7qNTdYUI0R-c7Set4vvzF5Bl-afu0GauwbNMpvqf1pu-KYcYx9sMolzRk1IPEksydTbIvxpe8whHdx9rTEATzccXUHmZIZKBQTSA1-eG-eUBRvZiddR5KFW7q3txN5oMjudEf_cr2Nc9rPLFMy3DWs9H1aq9A%3D%3D)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f1d5d74ba4b64dba89cbf0f52b1cce05&_e=hj0HaNslnUBW8BqGhWMUnllBeCJopq0J2bx8vqRW6IhGpGJ78CX-5hp_l8NZyP7SU9kXJcnJwv-jvIgNBGw0UgHql-yn_b6VRRC53wuLE5K_DiFPaANGL4Yy5R8JZhDmKsBObdEyRQxFdpSi0zOTL3JTczS5X5U00l7I6gotmm0n7FPHwpTjFhIH5eNLwUKYO1NwW3pocK7QZaOuqCDloOxvHF1oAJ1AyzYIlN2EeS7Ar13BThXGjiqSglFSNlhEI2zfeIFYVuT06ojheB8eFbgQxhb0JVHzjqLan24wJh9NvQHotYbzHj1iBSkrc0D2JsJOoA8voI_7HdJnoxA2pKwcOMH2hp4jx2jsGBONtiL0nbq41LeRv14w-gWyF2Q1aCEfHYJhPrmCtwT0ltWlCG8xldvlnMBN4zXDGb4Gl3PHX82cqesNjscsTuRCwRy-4ORCdvl6lgEBdDSW1cCXRA%3D%3D)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

---
| Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc.

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Pennsylvania Supreme Court’s ruling confirms that courts matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Big news this week, . Pennsylvania’s new legislative maps are lawful and ready to use in upcoming elections for the next decade. In the March 16th PA Supreme Court ruling, a four page court order [https://www.pacourts.us/Storage/media/pdfs/20220316/195610-lrcpetitonsforrevieworder.pdf] declared the new lines (approved last month by the Legislative Reapportionment Commission) are constitutional.
The PA Supreme Court’s ruling confirms that courts matter. The new maps give opportunities for new voices to rise and lead. The approved House map gives communities of color a chance to elect leaders who look like them, value what they value, and experience life in Pennsylvania as people of color do.
We commend Chairman Nordenberg and the Commissioners for a fair process. Pennsylvanians should be proud that we’re moving a step closer to a more representative and reflective democracy. Now we hope the people show up to polls this May and November and make their voices heard.
NPP IN THE NEWS AND ON THE AIRWAVES
Axios Hard Truths: Episode 7 - NPP’s Kadida Kenner, The New North Carolina Project executive director Dr. Aimy Steele, and Georgia gubernatorial candidate, New Georgia Project's co-founder Stacey Abrams discuss their strategies to focus on voter registration and education on the latest Axios Hard Truths podcast. The Stacey Abrams voter turnout blueprint (Yahoo! News)
The voter engagement movement Stacey Abrams spearheaded has proven so successful that it has inspired new groups built on her model and made fundraising easier for others.
Read more >> [https://www.yahoo.com/news/stacey-abrams-voter-turnout-blueprint-195459149.html]
Black Pa. voters delivered a Biden win in 2020. In 2022, they want 'receipts' for his work (York Daily News, also seen in Bucks Courier Times and Lebanon Daily News)
It's become a reliable part of campaign season to see a candidate stump in Pennsylvania's Black communities, often while making small talk and big promises.
But some Black leaders say once the election ballots are cast, those candidates seem to leave faster than they arrived.
"They ask for our vote, and then we don't see them again," said Kadida Kenner, executive director of the Lemoyne-based New Pennsylvania Project, a nonprofit that works to get more state residents registered to vote. [https://www.ydr.com/story/news/politics/elections/2022/03/14/black-pa-pennsylvania-voters-helped-biden-win-what-they-want-2022/9373906002/?fbclid=IwAR0QJMujxSAMh3u1Wv1tTwvjZKckW9uuDUbvSyTFzCQtDrD67VIsCgsw8wI] Read more >> [https://www.ydr.com/story/news/politics/elections/2022/03/14/black-pa-pennsylvania-voters-helped-biden-win-what-they-want-2022/9373906002/?fbclid=IwAR0QJMujxSAMh3u1Wv1tTwvjZKckW9uuDUbvSyTFzCQtDrD67VIsCgsw8wI]

Kadida Kenner explains why she's taken action on Supreme Court fights in the past - and what groups on the ground are doing to support the nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. Watch the full video interview here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r-mDVrerpoY] .

Team NPP registered over 1,000 new voters in February!
Even in challenging weather conditions, our growing staff and dedicated volunteers made it happen. Now it's your turn to make a difference, go out and register someone to vote this weekend.

STATE AND LOCAL NEWS
State Supreme Court upholds new House and Senate maps
After considering appeals to Pennsylvania’s new state legislative maps, the state Supreme Court ruled Wednesday that the maps comply with redistricting principles outlined in both the state and U.S. constitutions and will remain in place for the next decade.
Read more in City & State PA [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/content/state-supreme-court-upholds-new-house-and-senate-maps]
Supreme Court Allows Court-Imposed Voting Maps in North Carolina and Pennsylvania
State courts had ruled that earlier maps for congressional elections had been warped by partisan gerrymandering. Democrats stand to benefit from the justices’ decision.
Read more in The New York Times [https://www.nytimes.com/2022/03/07/us/supreme-court-voting-maps.html?referringSource=articleShare]
State courts had ruled that earlier maps for congressional elections had been warped by partisan gerrymandering. Democrats stand to benefit from the justices’ decision
In 1966, the first Black woman to sit on the federal bench began her service to the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York.
The federal judiciary’s been around for 233 years, but since Constance Baker Motley made history 56 years ago, only about 70 other Black female judges have marked similar career milestones.
Read more in Bucks County Courier Times [https://www.buckscountycouriertimes.com/story/news/2022/03/08/despite-historic-supreme-court-nomination-black-female-judges-rarely-reach-federal-level-diversity/6702566001/]
A landmark Philadelphia School District board resolution could help get its 18-year-olds to register to vote
After three years of youth advocacy, the Philadelphia school board is poised to pass a landmark voter education resolution codifying citywide efforts to register all 18-year-olds to vote and encouraging all students to be civically active.
Read more in The Philadelphia Inquirer [https://www.inquirer.com/news/teen-voter-registration-civics-education-philadelphia-20220223.html]

Kadida, Erika, and Angelique return for another insightful Truth Tellers Live on Thursday, March 31st at 1:30 p.m. Don't miss this virtual discussion streaming live on NPP's Facebook Page [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] . [https://secure.everyaction.com/XciR-l4970C67ViYKYUkzA2]
The Policy Corner: Income Inequality
Over the last 40 years, income and wealth has become increasingly more unequal in Pennsylvania like it has in the United States as a whole. Living through a global pandemic has only exacerbated this inequity.
Pennsylvania has one of the most upside down tax systems in the country where people at the bottom pay two times more than people at the top. The top 1% of Pennsylvania families, those with an average income of $1.6 million/household, pay 6% in state and local taxes. Whereas the lowest 20% of Pennsylvania families with an average income of $13,000 pay 13.8% and the middle 20% of Pennsylvania families with an average income of $54,000 pay 11.1%. According to a report by Americans for Tax Fairness, Health Care for America Now and PA Budget and Policy Center, the collective wealth of Pennsylvania’s thirteen billionaires jumped by $4.3 billion between March 2020 through January 2021. Over those same ten months, over two million hard working Pennsylavnians lost their jobs due to COVID-19.
Not only does Pennsylvania have an upside tax system where the top 1% continue to increase their wealth while so many Pennsylvanians continue to struggle, including many holding more than one job, Pennsylvania corporations are also taking advantage of our tax system through loopholes that allow them to essentially pay no corporate taxes.
Of the corporations that operate in Pennsylvania, 73% pay no corporate taxes, and are mostly giant, multinational businesses. Multinational corporations that are based outside the state arrange their books so that they show no profits in Pennsylvania. Instead, they show their profits in Delaware and other states that don’t have corporate taxes.
When you register to vote and make your voice heard by showing up and voting in every election, twice a year, you are voting your values. The candidates that you vote for can create the policies to address income inequality in Pennsylvania.
Help us reach our goal to register 50,000 voters in the Commonwealth
We can't do this important year-round work without you.
Will you help us defend democracy by expanding the electorate in Pennsylvania?
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

clean_body: [] Big news this week, . Pennsylvania’s new legislative maps are lawful and ready to use in upcoming elections for the next decade. In the March 16th PA Supreme Court ruling, a four page court order [] declared the new lines (approved last month by the Legislative Reapportionment Commission) are constitutional. The PA Supreme Court’s ruling confirms that courts matter. The new maps give opportunities for new voices to rise and lead. The approved House map gives communities of color a chance to elect leaders who look like them, value what they value, and experience life in Pennsylvania as people of color do. We commend Chairman Nordenberg and the Commissioners for a fair process. Pennsylvanians should be proud that we’re moving a step closer to a more representative and reflective democracy. Now we hope the people show up to polls this May and November and make their voices heard. name: Wes Moore
subject: Violent crime is on the rise
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43123550/335817153/492827243?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220318publicsafetyplan_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNjMTY1OS0wNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5LThUX5Ki8B49Nu81WzxOfXo8-9vQMLuyhPSE9xfOE=)
---
Friends, It’s an unfortunate reality that violent crime is on the rise across our country, including here in Maryland. Gun violence and homicides are skyrocketing, and lives are being taken in our streets. Young people especially are at risk, making this all the more tragic. Our ability to keep Marylanders safe is dependent upon having a governor who will be fully engaged and ensure crime is addressed with urgency in our communities. At the same time, we must rebuild trust between law enforcement and community members by increasing transparency and accountability. **That’s why Aruna and I recently introduced our public safety and criminal justice plan, with specific actions we plan to take to reduce crime and protect Marylanders when we’re in office.** **[Take a moment to read the highlights of our plan, then add your name to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43123551/335817154/173368225?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220318publicsafetyplan_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNjMTY1OS0wNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5LThUX5Ki8B49Nu81WzxOfXo8-9vQMLuyhPSE9xfOE=&emci=0ba69350-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4acc1659-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635485)** As Governor and Lieutenant Governor, Aruna and I plan to:
* **Combat gun violence** by building strong partnerships across state, local and federal law enforcement agencies, banning ghost guns, and investing in proven community-based violence intervention programs.

* **Reform Maryland’s probation and parole system** by filling every vacant position, ensuring strong supervision of high-risk individuals, and leveraging local offices to connect people to behavioral health treatment, housing, and employment.

* **Rebuild and strengthen relationships** between communities and law enforcement agencies by increasing accountability and transparency, funding community-policing initiatives and recruiting officers that reflect the diversity of communities they serve.

As an Army Captain and combat veteran, I was charged with serving and protecting communities around the globe. As CEO of one of the nation’s largest nonprofits fighting poverty, I oversaw an organization that funded national research on the long-term implications of crime, incarceration, and criminal convictions, and that work led to the passage of transformative legislation and policy. I also worked to rebuild trust between communities and law enforcement agencies. **As Governor of Maryland, I know I can make our state a safer place for our kids to grow up in and for all of us to thrive.** **[If you support my plan and want a governor who will prioritize public safety, add your name now to show your support →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43123552/335817155/173368225?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220318publicsafetyplan_wm_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNjMTY1OS0wNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5LThUX5Ki8B49Nu81WzxOfXo8-9vQMLuyhPSE9xfOE=&emci=0ba69350-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4acc1659-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43123554/335817157/173368225?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220318publicsafetyplan_wm_60da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNjMTY1OS0wNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5LThUX5Ki8B49Nu81WzxOfXo8-9vQMLuyhPSE9xfOE=&emci=0ba69350-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4acc1659-04a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635485)

clean_body: | = Friends, It’s an unfortunate reality that violent crime is on the rise across our country, including here in Maryland. Gun violence and homicides are skyrocketing, and lives are being taken in our streets. Young people especially are at risk, making this all the more tragic. Our ability to keep Marylanders safe is dependent upon having a governor who will be fully engaged and ensure crime is addressed with urgency in our communities. At the same time, we must rebuild trust between law enforcement and community members by increasing transparency and accountability. That’s why Aruna and I recently introduced our public safety and criminal justice plan, with specific actions we plan to take to reduce crime and protect Marylanders when we’re in office. As Governor and Lieutenant Governor, Aruna and I plan to: Combat gun violence by building strong partnerships across state, local and federal law enforcement agencies, banning ghost guns, and investing in proven community-based violence intervention programs. Reform Maryland’s probation and parole system by filling every vacant position, ensuring strong supervision of high-risk individuals, and leveraging local offices to connect people to behavioral health treatment, housing, and employment. Rebuild and strengthen relationships between communities and law enforcement agencies by increasing accountability and transparency, funding community-policing initiatives and recruiting officers that reflect the diversity of communities they serve. As an Army Captain and combat veteran, I was charged with serving and protecting communities around the globe. As CEO of one of the nation’s largest nonprofits fighting poverty, I oversaw an organization that funded national research on the long-term implications of crime, incarceration, and criminal convictions, and that work led to the passage of transformative legislation and policy. I also worked to rebuild trust between communities and law enforcement agencies. As Governor of Maryland, I know I can make our state a safer place for our kids to grow up in and for all of us to thrive. ** | Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. Tho
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcfj36vq79nfbet8mliu3isgho0n31k6469q6ec8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj69o36clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttn6ap7ccj6chi78crn6eqncd9ieuonat9gslge4tpjeoqb0tr0etgbeptiedgefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephh6apm9ptmcdj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7gs6rb82s7ad4dq5chl92ieus5d1s8u34uf23og_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj69o36clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6gadbl2uhlsgp656ssapms3df5immb2g71cg1gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj69o36clh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z62k9ad87n2jk9dmqcehb26epa14urmjrjjkkqvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj69o36clh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zopnmstu3sg5vk405l4jf8m8uadl54hmbr9sm0u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdj69o36clh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

Dear Peter,

The prices at the pump are getting outrageous!

I just filled up my tank and _saw my total soaring higher and higher._

I remember paying around $30 to fill my tank under the Trump Administration when our energy industry was flourishing.

Those were the days.

Now, we are all fully experiencing _**Bidenflation**_ — _**and this pain even puts tax hikes to shame!
**_
_**Even natural gas has risen from $1.75 to $4.89**_ Dollars per Million BTU. That’s a 279% increase.

But the Biden Administration doesn't care. They'll make us GIVE UP EVERYTHING for their Green New Deal utopia.

_**To Biden, it's our fault if we don't PAY UP and BUY a $55,000 electric vehicle. **_

I won't stand by and watch **Biden's** **gas and energy price-hikes harm America.** That’s why we are out in front opposing his efforts to decarbonize our nation and eliminate our energy independence.

Just two weeks ago, my Office argued at the U.S. Supreme Court against Biden’s costly climate agenda.

We are currently LEADING on several key legal initiatives to push back against Biden’s attacks on our energy security. _**When we succeed, it will keep our energy and gas prices LOW.**_
[
_**Will you take a stand with me and join our fight against this overreaching administration? >>**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMeZNvay271S9j45X5JTCVBiw-3D-3DpAQL_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6fpAiFk3xC5IIN7MDLuPb3J8oOp6n6wuGXuGnxRnJNKKqogMTxvw-2Bvd5LgFjBkElP0XijIQn6Z-2FBS28wiUebXoe37zQ5zPA-2FkTVNQ8JMvR-2FLP7iluq0ybzDilbMapI2llXdqNeHysArWpbSIdEa2KjlAhRYPjUA624aSyAxwgyRIZw-2B7vvZQGzm6EQDyN6CiWF7b6mAVc7xK61qCOyTjS0e2zlr21mf6aNHHfQs9puKEKQ59iH8H-2F-2FNDnvZn9Dl3KIfYR9o6fKNuq8xPEJToKA8Dc57Dsc99OmZtG1PtG-2B-2F7BlaDK2FhjeTZc1Q3mlsKBoc4jEYLwQo-2B-2B1GQFbI5tA1hDC40yHwL184JNqVAwNPA9qHC-2FJd75MVCCedYXObuzefaXkAaYPESOKcaGgDOHIaajIQ-2BSFml9eBEqte3OXkAUEeEeJkJypgOgipplyEVPe9hIhcb5-2BTNO5ABJRgHZ6Rk-2FiiPO0lcmEYfVq7yvGI211RNNvU7z-2FLHA-2BlbovtRkKkYfw7034-2F2xSDiAfhkbYXX1-2BeiUeCUEbLOZBLJPuGZTQK2pSfmtOn4P8h1exfinUiP28SaAlMYm80rdQujIQqiQejT0-2BzZCghUGQnhUZCPoKGhJ9If5Pl0ggk-2FM6OIqW31pQ2bxi9CG0nsa6NX9O8-2BF9rmWiVM69c2HHXZLoTtQrPr3BkRUEnw-2Fo4OeVV8TfaJU3MCCfIsV6hYsZD-2FxLrzE1INiZ7rI6IKJ8ZZGIKUTu7ZDEm3M6jiiKztAcH60p-2BDp71NL2oSJ6L2fqcBWWYJczvQgYykn4vYE0eRhy4P48-2F52twzoKpEGpoOL7m9fAaDyY9AGZ8gkPOxiTLEgJw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | The prices at the pump are getting outrageous! Dear Peter, The prices at the pump are getting outrageous! I just filled up my tank and saw my total soaring higher and higher. I remember paying around $30 to fill my tank under the Trump Administration when our energy industry was flourishing. Those were the days. Now, we are all fully experiencing Bidenflation — and this pain even puts tax hikes to shame! Even natural gas has risen from $1.75 to $4.89 Dollars per Million BTU. That’s a 279% increase. But the Biden Administration doesn't care. They'll make us GIVE UP EVERYTHING for their Green New Deal utopia. To Biden, it's our fault if we don't PAY UP and BUY a $55,000 electric vehicle. I won't stand by and watch Biden's gas and energy price-hikes harm America. That’s why we are out in front opposing his efforts to decarbonize our nation and eliminate our energy independence. Just two weeks ago, my Office argued at the U.S. Supreme Court against Biden’s costly climate agenda. We are currently LEADING on several key legal initiatives to push back against Biden’s attacks on our energy security. When we succeed, it will keep our energy and gas prices LOW. | | | | | | You're support would be a tremendous boost to our efforts. We're working hard to make America ENERGY INDEPENDENT AGAIN, and fight Biden's efforts to import more oil from Iran and Venezuela. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

name: Team Read
subject: KGW interview on homelessness
body:
We’re facing a homelessness crisis and Tina Kotek equivocated... again
---
| | Dear Peter, It’s not progressive or compassionate to have our own neighbors living unsheltered and vulnerable on the streets indefinitely – it’s not fair to them and it’s not fair to families and people who are trying to go to work every day and don’t feel safe. In an interview with KGW, **Tobias provided clear answers on how to tackle the homelessness crisis.** And when Tina Kotek was pushed for answers, she punted. **[Take a look at the side by side interviews with KGW.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116419/335782292/-1020455330?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEzYjFkZi1lNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MDa2HZGLyvYSg1G8cblJr1Wb0QpUKGJu0dvwJHHJzI=&emci=bd8982d9-e4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bba3b1df-e4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43116420/335782293/-1020455330?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEzYjFkZi1lNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MDa2HZGLyvYSg1G8cblJr1Wb0QpUKGJu0dvwJHHJzI=&emci=bd8982d9-e4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bba3b1df-e4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126) As our next Governor, Tobias has made it clear: He will stand up emergency shelter housing, accelerate new affordable housing construction, hold local governments accountable for doing their part, expand access to mental health and addiction services, and clean up our public spaces. **But he won’t allow unsafe encampments in our public spaces to continue indefinitely.** Tina Kotek, on the other hand, wouldn’t say whether she’d allow the encampments to remain indefinitely. The thing about being Governor is you have to make difficult decisions, and you need to communicate clearly with Oregonians. You can count on Tobias to do both. Onwards,
Team Read

clean_body: We’re facing a homelessness crisis and Tina Kotek equivocated... again | | Dear Peter, It’s not progressive or compassionate to have our own neighbors living unsheltered and vulnerable on the streets indefinitely – it’s not fair to them and it’s not fair to families and people who are trying to go to work every day and don’t feel safe. In an interview with KGW, Tobias provided clear answers on how to tackle the homelessness crisis. And when Tina Kotek was pushed for answers, she punted. As our next Governor, Tobias has made it clear: He will stand up emergency shelter housing, accelerate new affordable housing construction, hold local governments accountable for doing their part, expand access to mental health and addiction services, and clean up our public spaces. But he won’t allow unsafe encampments in our public spaces to continue indefinitely. Tina Kotek, on the other hand, wouldn’t say whether she’d allow the encampments to remain indefinitely. The thing about being Governor is you have to make difficult decisions, and you need to communicate clearly with Oregonians. You can count on Tobias to do both. Onwards, Team Read * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

subject: Join Team Perez / Sneed for a March 19th Toast With Tom
body:
RSVP to join Team Perez / Sneed at Denizens Brewing in Riverdale!
#

Dear Peter,
After another exciting week, Team Tom will be holding the latest _Toast with Tom_ **TOMORROW, Saturday, March 19 at Denizens Brewing Co. in Riverdale Park from 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM.**
Please join us to celebrate another great day on the campaign trail and to learn more about Tom and Shannon’s vision for a Maryland that will fight for jobs, justice, and opportunity for every Marylander in every zip code.
If you’re interested in joining, please RSVP at [https://tomperez.com/denizens319](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43124056/335819207/1803035853?emci=3a39dca5-faa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjE5ZjA5ZC0wNmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Up7XaE_J0A_lzKM3ctRTOtnz2Lg_DXEbxK_C91oRyMk=) and feel free to share this with friends and neighbors. Thank you for your continued support and we hope to see you there!

Friends,

With Russia, China, and Iran threatening America and our allies across the world, Joe Biden’s Pentagon is focused on a witch hunt against members of our military because they won’t get vaccinated against a virus that, at this point, is no worse than the flu.

These are men and women who put their lives on the line every day to defend America and defend our freedoms. They’ve signed up to serve our country, and how does Joe Biden reward them?

This is the problem with Washington: career politicians and bureaucrats’ priorities are out of whack. Career Politicians, especially those who have never served a day in their life, have no clue what it’s like to support our military readiness and our troops.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate to stop insanity like this from happening. As a 22-year Army veteran and former POW (_you might know my story from Black Hawk Down_), I know what it takes to defend our country and support our military. I know that Joe Biden and the Career Politicians do not have what it takes.

clean_body: Here's what Biden is doing | - 🚨🚨🚨 Joe Biden’s administration is FORCING COVID vaccinations upon Navy SEALs. Friends, With Russia, China, and Iran threatening America and our allies across the world, Joe Biden’s Pentagon is focused on a witch hunt against members of our military because they won’t get vaccinated against a virus that, at this point, is no worse than the flu. These are men and women who put their lives on the line every day to defend America and defend our freedoms. They’ve signed up to serve our country, and how does Joe Biden reward them? By taking them to court over a flu vaccine. | These are some of the greatest warriors on Earth who are in top shape and great health. The Pentagon should focus on ensuring they’re prepared and ready to defend our country, not about forcing vaccine mandates on healthy individuals. This is the problem with Washington: career politicians and bureaucrats’ priorities are out of whack. Career Politicians, especially those who have never served a day in their life, have no clue what it’s like to support our military readiness and our troops. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to stop insanity like this from happening. As a 22-year Army veteran and former POW (you might know my story from Black Hawk Down), I know what it takes to defend our country and support our military. I know that Joe Biden and the Career Politicians do not have what it takes. I need your help today to beat the Career Politicians. We can’t let them win. Thank you and God Bless, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. **OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** ****Stars and Shields for Katie Britt Coalition Launches**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ0enaub4c-dYA4gtKJMCTmZARWblYI0LHdITg34c1Tq7rt1dWZp0T8lCPI6cq4ebO92fScl5uomMqEaorjRZQ6WuB1wcb0NJVddgoykDEFrcs8zEsU7Hlgo6a33IF5uZnmojaue_GjpgfcQoTZq6_CxXeKovPr10GX8YJengM8RbaY0E-0s55WyLzotnP7oYgHuFq2LBNhr05V9g2SHxxaKoH55HPaeOPO7EZqPy2MCSHXoh26NzfttptIg9xmKLR9FP45UuJjgALehk42XeUFe) We're excited to announce the launch of the Stars and Shields for Katie Britt coalition! In the Senate, I will always fight for the heroic law enforcement officers who keep Alabama families, neighborhoods and communities safe. These incredible men and women leave the safety of their homes every day so that we can return to and live safely in ours. Their sacrifice and dedication to serving others is something we can never take for granted, and we owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid. I am committed to being a proactive partner to our law enforcement officers in combatting crime, strengthening communities, and getting deadly drugs off the streets across our state. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ0enaub4c-dYA4gtKJMCTmZARWblYI0LHdITg34c1Tq7rt1dWZp0T8lCPI6cq4ebO_HYADkx6NEzreQau8gXX76G60IaC_pf1JnqJfCGIbkX5PEylPvLjUAU1Hanyxx0W8f7A2Eos0MQtmZ8_HHDRj1PjSCK2q0v4TVgqVsKPY5c6V9xBgq28BesALhAdgawbZQhKZd7LCBTwpY3pioXAv4RV3yB2n8GxHxeQUxOKHvJrWVkARqXmjiCj8vtd6VJuD5q9JRnR63aZPEvrMC8U8u) ****ENDORSEMENT AD: Shelby County Sheriff John Samaniego**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ0enaub4c-dYA4gtKJMCTmZcE8ULyR-hYKQ5o_FDeLHOk82zNfikE9NsHM9_p4Bp-qSxNxEBEXMqfrbnhC32f-8w07yUHy1dxOZw-iMtP_BlB4In2-c9IrFqiYFn5DJHTfax7hBpDWM941XMDgqKJxDaj6zQzMQIxS1Q8ahRvmrJQ4BgU0Nh2J5FvUDAClTH8PH9eAxWRkgHsF2JEr2Oa6Z51c1r1d_DM46blAaXh3qd5LEyQxfzU-JTWRR-Yx5UtR5Drg4sUGzr-uDOsG5p6i2) Shelby County Sheriff John Samaniego: “With the Biden liberals trying to defund our police, we need a Senator who’ll have our back, and that’s why I’m supporting Katie Britt. “Katie will get tough on violent criminals and fight for stronger borders to keep illegal immigrants and deadly drugs out of Alabama. Take it from me - Katie Britt is a strong conservative who will keep your family safe.” [**WATCH AND SHARE VIDEO**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ0enaub4c-dYA4gtKJMCTmZcE8ULyR-hYKQ5o_FDeLHOk82zNfikE9NsHM9_p4Bp-re7nnwPk73IU_PmFy7kG42gOPUUyQ-QpGVKOymqgCEcSLYB5elasrXxa3vXnfzVIlXRZZyZyz4nDfWHADMrB12aE8kmwRgp7bDttzDiRxdINYYdbmz4lkEU0S8zsaXVZJGAOOiT_7cficv-lzk0VvPlEHECQwxI65tPXPl4mVhg7t59ZPBMmhb2fH1k4E4--wjraybBluCoSbAtzHoXShH) ****VIDEO: Katie Promotes School Choice**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ3kMYSHY_vi56wwUVqFyeZ4h3x85BvsdDXtcr5hhuaAoedVPjkHsTKd_p68Hlz3bBtwhz36JhXWeO6fYEDkG0dA4IZw1XQMQJ9qHTLHixeQEliFSj8eu_oylgFXONBzhp0TFUR51BmNlypNJssnP7aJW7Ddr-edlEDhRZiInc6_4Gfzyu1fLbk-N1mI6E4uXEFRpMZIMNeSPtjCpIbAl94owUOBwpyVEIx7GSaST6jtjvM_Sr_QRcd5hOVmOMQ53pc%3D) Education is the key to unlocking the American Dream for every hardworking Alabamian. As Alabama's Senator, I will fight to ensure each child in our state has the opportunity to thrive, regardless of their zip code. [**WATCH AND SHARE VIDEO**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ3kMYSHY_vi56wwUVqFyeZ4h3x85BvsdDXtcr5hhuaAoSYVq7dHSGOONj5WgO_3SpeP1cKg-ggEadBeBnvgQUfs-_cG9VRomRK1nWvwz5HMYfuF_u2sEOkEFdRADuUY6L5uliHJA54UanJCPj29N33GmSPEuOfdY43Hg1_j5xtts7AEkjkkrfgbA2RaCCu8nKxLMKkplRX2rPj67YbLecitlT2Pk_TFfEkovLo-8afMINPdie2NdBC8BNhNmh8FynU%3D) ****NEW AD: “Rally”**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0280335040ed40f19feafc0263b3b3f1&_e=UjL5g1iQmPs0OUmtUHWCf0QobwaDdFDSm8Kk7RtjlZ0enaub4c-dYA4gtKJMCTmZrMjCF2hffniMHhETRh0y0OesdRL0VDgPV05lGIP_9xPIiH777ODpPY4SpMmRczcfPmtMhGsu2IqtbbVNnx_yNe2Ji0RczYPYAIiewPJRFR46kpSyZJNTfvz2RGSGskfNco90gbRVfersoGYdPUS8FdIPVDTmma4EpgodgnefA2WX6ecExqhlYbDCmUME1iSIN7gafBytHvgw_fVwWFx05VVnGry1hrPVrli4Xgvym3b7Mae0ZkR3DRCh31dE6WXM) I am proud to be bringing our Alabama First message directly to hardworking families in all 67 of our counties, and I would be honored to earn your vote on May 24! Together, we will save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children.
