clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **Stars and Shields for Katie Britt Coalition Launches We're excited to announce the launch of the Stars and Shields for Katie Britt coalition! In the Senate, I will always fight for the heroic law enforcement officers who keep Alabama families, neighborhoods and communities safe. These incredible men and women leave the safety of their homes every day so that we can return to and live safely in ours. Their sacrifice and dedication to serving others is something we can never take for granted, and we owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid. I am committed to being a proactive partner to our law enforcement officers in combatting crime, strengthening communities, and getting deadly drugs off the streets across our state. ENDORSEMENT AD: Shelby County Sheriff John Samaniego Shelby County Sheriff John Samaniego: “With the Biden liberals trying to defund our police, we need a Senator who’ll have our back, and that’s why I’m supporting Katie Britt. “Katie will get tough on violent criminals and fight for stronger borders to keep illegal immigrants and deadly drugs out of Alabama. Take it from me - Katie Britt is a strong conservative who will keep your family safe.” VIDEO: Katie Promotes School Choice Education is the key to unlocking the American Dream for every hardworking Alabamian. As Alabama's Senator, I will fight to ensure each child in our state has the opportunity to thrive, regardless of their zip code. NEW AD: “Rally” I am proud to be bringing our Alabama First message directly to hardworking families in all 67 of our counties, and I would be honored to earn your vote on May 24! Together, we will save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. WATCH: Food Security = National Security I believe that food security is national security. In the Senate, I will always fight for Alabama's hardworking family farmers. Katie on the Campaign Trail It’s always great to be in Marshall County! We enjoyed another incredible meet and greet in Guntersville. With 10 weeks left until the primary, our momentum continues to grow every day! Katie Reacts to Biden Officials’ Fear of “Mass Migration Event” The Biden Border Crisis is historically bad already. This would make it much worse. It's past time for the administration to end its war on American energy and start combatting illegal immigration. Have you gotten your limited-edition blue Katie Britt hat? **The only person standing between Mitch McConnell and a Senate majority is you, folks.**

If we’re going to have a chance in hell of defending the Senate, then we need you to step up right now. I’m personally asking: [**_Will you chip in toward Tim Ryan and Marcy Kaptur's end-of-quarter goals so we can buck the trend and expand our majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43124727/335822124/293024761?refcode=EM_FR_220318CarvilleTR_N_JC_90DO-donors_6_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3NmQ2Mi0wN2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdjAvNCxBAgfHFQZGym7zVlmq-DUbVvrlj7UkapT4hg=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43124728/335822125/293024761?refcode=EM_FR_220318CarvilleTR_N_JC_90DO-donors_6_NG_N_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3NmQ2Mi0wN2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdjAvNCxBAgfHFQZGym7zVlmq-DUbVvrlj7UkapT4hg=) Fundraising deadlines are a matter of life or death for campaigns — whether or not Tim has the resources could be the difference between meaningful progress or a negligent, hostile Senate under Mitch McConnell.

I’m personally asking: = = Fundraising deadlines are a matter of life or death for campaigns — whether or not Tim has the resources could be the difference between meaningful progress or a negligent, hostile Senate under Mitch McConnell. With a 50-50 split in the Senate, we have zero room for error, and that’s why I’m asking for your help right now. = = Let's do this, James Carville Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: a special request for Women's History Month...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, if you didn't know, March is Women's History Month. So today, I want to talk to you about a woman who inspires me. She's made history before, and she's about to do it again: my wife, Abby Finkenauer.
You see, in 2014, Abby won election to the Iowa State House at only 25 years old! But she was nowhere near done making history. Just four years later, she ran for Congress and became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. All along the way, Abby's been pushing for women's rights, defending the right to choose and fighting for her community.
Now, Abby is running to defeat Sen. Grassley and make sure that Iowans have a voice in the U.S. Senate. **If she wins, she'll become the youngest woman Senator EVER elected**. Abby's made history so many times before, and I _know_ that she's going to shatter another glass ceiling this November.
But nobody makes history alone. Abby will only win if people like you stand beside her 100%. Oftentimes, that means chipping in a grassroots donation. But tonight, I have a special request: **[We put together a short photo album to celebrate Women's History Month and mark Abby's glass-shattering achievements. Can you take a moment to look through it to learn more about Abby and build our grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43124731/335822238/1392225310?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk756-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjgxNjc3OS0wN2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8pnopm8eZ1OSvFXKULKT-VWn4hWK3DCrYOEe3FLW3k=&emci=caf14fa7-39a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ab816779-07a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)**

subject: Are you happy with record-high gas prices?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/gasprices?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1f4ec480d3&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Joe Biden has been a complete disaster for America. Thanks to Biden, our southern border is still wide open, we have skyrocketing inflation, and gas prices have reached an all-time high.

_Biden’s failure is going unnoticed by the Democrats because they don’t truly care about our country or you_.

**Hardworking, taxpaying Americans nationwide are being FORCED to pay for the consequences of Biden and the Democrats’ awful leadership**.

Our country is being destroyed right before our eyes. We need to take a stand. I am running for reelection so I can continue calling out Biden, Pelosi, and AOC on their dangerous policies.

[Support me in my fight so we can get this country back on track](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c9bc2a2038&e=645b3b1338)!

The mainstream media is not doing enough to keep Biden accountable for this. It is clear how disastrous his presidency has been for our nation. Gas prices are higher than they were in 2008! Our inflation is out of control and way higher than it was during the 2008 financial crisis!

The Biden administration, working with Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat establishment are making Americans suffer every single day. They NEED to be kept accountable for this. [A donation to my campaign will ensure I can remain in Congress and keep fighting for you](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=cc18e60e99&e=645b3b1338).
[**Donate $20
Donate $50
Donate $100
Donate ANY amount**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=104aeeeff0&e=645b3b1338)
America cannot survive if these Democrats keep up their work. If I remain in Congress, I can create an army of powerful, fearless Republicans to STOP Biden in his tracks. [The time for change is right now! Support me by donating TODAY](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=42c3db3ffc&e=645b3b1338)!

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e661a28657&e=645b3b1338)**_
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ef6c2394d1&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District

P.S.: _We have reached record-high gas prices and are facing skyrocketing inflation._

**Biden and the corrupt Democrats are laughing while they watch our beloved nation suffer!**

[_**Support my campaign so I can stop their disastrous agenda immediately. We need to start fighting for our country right now, before it is too late**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b81598cdbe&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance for your generosity!

clean_body: | | | Breaking news:Planned Parenthood Action Fund has just endorsed my campaign in the Sixth District because they know I will always fight to protect access to abortion care for all Americans. = As former state senator Ginny Burdick said, "I credit Andrea's tenacity and hard work for passing the Reproductive Health Equity Act, which guarantees all Oregonians the full range of reproductive options, in spite of attacks on abortion throughout this country. We can't become complacent when it comes to the fight to defend reproductive rights. Right-wing legislatures across the country are passing extreme anti-abortion laws in several states. Just this week, Idaho passed an extreme Texas-style abortion ban. In Congress, I will champion a federal law to guarantee abortion access in every state in this nation, no matter what the Supreme Court does to Roe v. Wade. In order to hit my big goal, I need 4 people in 18326 to contribute right now. = I am proud to stand with Planned Parenthood. I will always fight to protect reproductive rights for all Americans. subject: Failure to take action now will result in enormous harm
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Anyone who believes that climate change is not already here isn’t paying attention.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43117561/335787321/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220318-1-b&refcode2=08947781-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=nXWEjs3Pgesrow3esGNALt2OP3W2n6o+Unl54EWEz9sjzdua947Ad3nYVFrOXknW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0Nzc4MS1lNmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_l2U-ajCu_5jm-dDoQbM-12sSJlANH7jCisi--GO9U=)
Friend —
Anyone who believes that climate change is not already here isn’t paying attention. We don't have to look far to see the evidence all around us.
It's long past time to face the truth that failure to take real action now will result in enormous harm to communities here in Maryland and worldwide. And the poorest and most vulnerable, as always, will suffer the most and be the least able to adjust. We must all be in this struggle together.
Taking bolder, stronger action to tackle the climate crisis is not rocket science — and it’s not that hard.
By investing in clean energy, moving away from our dependence on big oil, and creating millions of home-grown, good-paying clean energy jobs we can change the trajectory of this threat to our livable planet. Sounds like a no-brainer, but the truth is that Republicans are opposing us every step of the way.
Any chance at making progress on climate action is at stake in this year's midterms, and I need your support to continue the fight for a clean energy future. That's why I have to ask:
**[Can you chip in $3 today to help me continue leading the charge for climate action and green jobs in the United States Senate? The time for us to take bold action is now, so we don't have a moment to waste.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43117562/335787322/-149995803?source=em220318-1-b&refcode2=08947781-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=nXWEjs3Pgesrow3esGNALt2OP3W2n6o+Unl54EWEz9sjzdua947Ad3nYVFrOXknW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0Nzc4MS1lNmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_l2U-ajCu_5jm-dDoQbM-12sSJlANH7jCisi--GO9U=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43117563/335787323/-149995803?source=em220318-1-b&refcode2=08947781-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=nXWEjs3Pgesrow3esGNALt2OP3W2n6o+Unl54EWEz9sjzdua947Ad3nYVFrOXknW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0Nzc4MS1lNmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_l2U-ajCu_5jm-dDoQbM-12sSJlANH7jCisi--GO9U=)**
Putin’s horrific war in Ukraine has highlighted the other negative consequences of our economic vulnerability to the global price of oil which is affected by any disturbance in oil-producing countries anywhere in the world. Let’s be clear: that gives autocrats like Putin power to hurt us.
The time is NOW for a major push for progress toward a clean energy future. We can’t afford to hesitate and we can’t afford to lose the Senate majority.
Thank you for helping seize this moment.
Onwards,
Chris

Friend,

Charlie Crist is exactly the leader we need in Tallahassee.

I was the Chief Financial Officer of Florida when Charlie was Governor, so I know from firsthand experience that he can unite our state and bring common sense and decency back to our leadership.

But I also know that it’s not going to be easy.

When I ran against Rick Scott in 2010, we came up short by one percentage point. _Just**one**_.

And all signs indicate we can expect this year’s race for governor to be just as close. So we need all hands on deck!

clean_body: | | | | = Friend, Charlie Crist is exactly the leader we need in Tallahassee. I was the Chief Financial Officer of Florida when Charlie was Governor, so I know from firsthand experience that he can unite our state and bring common sense and decency back to our leadership. But I also know that it’s not going to be easy. When I ran against Rick Scott in 2010, we came up short by one percentage point. Justone. And all signs indicate we can expect this year’s race for governor to be just as close. So we need all hands on deck! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = As partners in government, Charlie and I worked side by side to restore the voting rights of former felons, address the Deepwater Horizon disaster and the Great Recession, protect the state's Pension Plan, and preserve Florida's environment. From his time serving the people of Florida as Governor to his tireless service for Pinellas County in Congress, Charlie Crist has spent his career fighting for all Floridians. There is no doubt that he is exactly the leader we need back in Tallahassee. That’s why I am proud to endorse Charlie Crist to be our next governor of Florida. = Thank you, Alex Sink = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: This is a First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Reeling Supermajority](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorVjOVmw8Y95i9u4b5S13dEhFNKB5EaeQIkQh8IYPWzCg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=1) Democrats are in disarray at the California Capitol. As [one headline](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YEH3niOQlTOvDYn8ZfFqhyrrAGglmYRKsWtgV9cMtS8HD-INjduPsUn-boP63hHSMC9HuC7JLe9pUJtxR4lFSuK1aPija22moy7y05LxJmddQqx3rJHSnwvVYutn2KQvwX5sCmxjzjxVCO9_bUhE1tZc2gqnnQylFRQwB9K1h_M&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=2) put it: "**GOP Move to Suspend Gas Tax Puts Assembly Democrats on Their Heels** – _the move pushed by Assemblyman Kevin Kiley left San Diego Democrats scrambling for a coherent response._ " Spoiler alert: there was no coherent response. Some legislators told constituents they hadn’t read the bill (it’s two pages). Others complained about the procedure I used, failing to mention they used the same procedure for other bills that very day. Seeing that these excuses didn’t wash, Democrat legislators huddled and threw together a new plan: give every taxpayer a $400 “rebate.” They rolled it out at a subdued press conference in front of the Capitol yesterday morning. When this exercise in face-saving was over, Gallagher and I were waiting (at a respectful distance, of course) and the gaggle of press came to us. Watch our response [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorbYnKRJPYqVmUdqGDf_cllbatObG4KYqeU2aTS2ObJzw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=3). Truthfully, this is the first time I’ve ever seen the Supermajority propose returning money to taxpayers. That tells you how much Monday’s vote has rattled them. But it's no substitute for suspending the gas tax. Our Assembly GOP caucus is united, and every Republican Member of Congress signed [a letter to Newsom](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyVT2U_zfGlgisfZej0drtXrI90C3CtLzU632g06FJSHg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=4) supporting my bill. This really shouldn’t be partisan, though. We’re giving our colleagues on the other side another chance next week. Tell your Assembly Member no more excuses. Vote yes on AB 1638\. [Help me keep putting them on their heels](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=5) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzDUdwi48b2Y30PoPED_yjg_2amMvhEAU5pEr81qkzT6w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar18_final&n=7).

subject: The media is lying about Ukraine and Russia
body:
Did you think the propaganda surrounding Covid-19 was bad? We’re about to see worse—Ukraine is the next media propaganda sh
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanirp543ej8oioeieflg3ch186gjl64t807m1e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8o3n6mqj6sjnc6pm2d3l6ur68d1gsgq6echimgpnad3melq3cp35euoe8sj5curt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5ddjcup30phmc2pm4ptgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfn59rcjun85iqas0m03adpu3df3gvr76k03u7qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)
Hello Friend,

Did you think the propaganda surrounding Covid-19 was bad?

We're about to see worse--Ukraine is the next media propaganda show.

The media's talking heads are already starting the show.
* White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki is spouting administration rhetoric by **blaming rising gas prices on the conflict in Ukraine** even though prices were already on the rise before.

* Stephen Colbert, a CBS comedian, said,_ "A clean conscience is worth a buck or two," _and that he'll _" pay $15 a gallon because I drive a Tesla."_ A multimillionaire with a Tesla may not care about the cost of gas, but we do. That shows how out of touch they are with the average person.

* _The View 's_ hosts are now calling for a federal investigation because Tucker Carlson dared to question the mainstream narrative.

**The propaganda is worse than ever, but the Media Research Center (MRC), America 's premier media watchdog, is fighting back.**
[_**Will you support TRUTH in media, STOP radical propaganda, and EXPOSE media liars by donating $25, $50, $100, or any generous amount? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7lm7ckcd9d5j97spr3mhdsh1f5e940rdcu02m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)

Let me introduce myself briefly. I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media.**

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.

**I am asking for your immediate support today to help me raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zah2p8emhe3caduks32q8evn6kc1bf5i95hl1tog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)

These celebrity talking heads are oblivious to the true harm war between two nuclear powers can cause.

They are trying to blame Biden's failures-- inflation and sky-high food and energy prices-- on Ukraine.

They callously discuss escalating conflict and rising gas prices as if it was no big deal. _**But these lies affect real people**_. So the MRC is exposing them for the liars they are.

I refuse to stand idle and let lies reign in America.

Will you stand with me? **Click any link below to donate.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70a0belb985be8idmqpi1euuedmjdkplocl92cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3jivag7rgtpfn62d3nfsbdegdh33im2k7nd6ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2pn9mv9okt7p9egnouj8gu7ir1l186b083ekcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu2f5qas125btlttgdehj6rb0ole4o76b4ssscl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq6sbo5huemk805o4l7h334cqrqjuan6814l5bu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdp7pjj1opsjjqf3srvmsuoad9vjmqj1mje22fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm0o72c5h2bs)

The leftwing media protects politicians... MRC exposes the truth about them.

The leftwing media tries to hide Biden's failure with inflation and jobs... MRC spreads the truth and exposes the media bias.

The leftwing media lies to push their radical agenda like CRT... MRC shows the American people how liberty can solve our problems.

I have committed my life's work to exposing the media.

Brent Bozell

subject: We’re $2,048 short

body:
This email is confidential. Please do not forward or share this message.
| **< < A CONFIDENTIAL MESSAGE
FROM NEWT GINGRICH >>**
Fellow American,

name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: Peter Franchot’s Gas Tax Holiday Becomes Law
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
As gas prices continue to skyrocket due to Putin’s illegal, reckless, and violent invasion of Ukraine, I am pleased to officially declare that the State’s $0.36 gas tax will be suspended beginning today, March 18, until 11:59 PM on April 16.
https://www.marylandtaxes.gov/gas-tax-holiday/ [https://www.marylandtaxes.gov/gas-tax-holiday/]
When I called on the State to pass a gas tax holiday for Marylanders, lawmakers got to work within just three hours. This emergency legislation – one of the quickest we’ve seen in recent memory – will provide immediate relief to Marylanders by putting up to $100 million back in their pockets.
While this 30-day suspension is an excellent start, I believe and insist that we should extend this holiday to 90 days, and I thank lawmakers for indicating their openness to an extension. Our residents can rest assured knowing that during this holiday, whatever price they are paying at the pump will be $0.36 cheaper.
My agency has set up a dedicated page on our website, www.marylandtaxes.gov, that includes information and resources for Marylanders, fuel suppliers, and fuel retailers regarding this holiday. Click here to learn more. [https://www.marylandtaxes.gov/gas-tax-holiday/]
If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, you can look forward to more examples of state government working quickly and efficiently to deliver concrete results that will improve your quality of life. Together, we’re going to redefine the promise and possibility of state government.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0cf8a4f7-e3a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/0c09256d-e9a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzA5MjU2ZC1lOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=niaQvvXxYbo_j2gx5quixXMXiJ8dhz_Gu-IRxipYmfg=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43125337/335824707/-1010516998?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220318-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjY2FmMWYxLTBhYTctZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6cfR07-ZvvaKhcKpkI_A1ViIPYBZGDov5XvvF5BBfuI=)
First off, we have Florida Governor **Ron DeSantis** and Ohio Governor **Mike Dewine.** Both Republicans are vulnerable this year, and Democrats have a great shot at defeating these governors. Please respond ASAP.]() | | | | | Thanks for your response, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl72slt4vmrtk0k6cglov63qc4b356s40dldngl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs)
# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_" Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---
Mike B. writes...

_" Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znmdrfgiidk0ctij44bkh392iuv1iobm7faspns0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6cpfqlkgeqblsfnpup3h283ini36un3pd2mvhm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_" I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc9due80bolkp7e01jmltaqv1n2cvmq1ob4hicfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl6mr3dt18jlnpl3p9tjtm775firesreli0r3bog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zk7o04jc83re8gcpclcopmhlr78jof7r572o6pdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgm4or3cth2bs)

This act establishes a road map to citizenship for immigrant youth – that’s more than 2 million people – including DACA recipients and those with temporary protected status, who would benefit from this.

name: Elana Schrager, CaraveoForCongress.com
subject: Budget crunching (and gas prices)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter,
Elana, Dr. Caraveo’s Campaign Manager, here. We emailed you yesterday about our ambitious $20,000 end-of-quarter goal. But before I ask you to pitch in to help us hit it, I wanted to shed a little light on where your dollars go after you hit that “donate” button on ActBlue, and why we need your help TODAY.
Basically, it comes down to reaching as many voters as we possibly can before the June primary, in every corner of the 8th District we can possibly get to. Here’s a breakdown of what some of the most common donation amounts help us do:
$8 = helps us send 400 text messages.
$15 = is the cost of postage for 27 pieces of mail.
$50 = fills up a tank of gas so we can travel to every part of the district.
$100 = pays for 2,000 phone calls made by volunteers.
You can make a donation using this link here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts
Those everyday needs don’t even get into the bigger overhead costs like staff salaries, office space rental, and cumulative travel expenses. Which brings me to the reason I’m reaching out...
Usually , our budget includes about $800 per month in gas cards and other travel-related expenses so that we can reach voters where they are: on their front stoops, in coffee shops, at community events from Thornton all the way up to Greeley — pretty much anywhere there are people, we’re going there. These face to face conversations are the very core of our campaign, and we quite literally cannot run a successful race without them. With gas prices now at more than $4/gallon, that $800/month in travel costs is looking more like $1,400/month.
We won't cut back on outreach to voters — we can’t, because the outcome of this race is too important for Colorado families — so I’m asking if you can donate to help make up the difference. Here’s a link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts
Thanks so much for your help!
--
Elana Schrager
Campaign Manager
Email: info@caraveoforcongress.com
Donate Online: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts
Mailing address: Caraveo for Congress, PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614
PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
Caraveo for Congress, PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c929c78b-10a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/10360c54-eaa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDM2MGM1NC1lYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L6IzEiVdqbPEf_4T7XxZniEOYA6poyR50cxSjMhPs0E=&id=114304601 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Jason Richey endorses Bill McSwain for Governor
body:
Jason Richey has thrown his full support behind Bill McSwain for Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/jason-richey-endorses-bill-mcswain-for-governor?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 18, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Jason Richey endorses Bill McSwain for Governor
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today announced that he has received the endorsement of Aliquippa native and Pittsburgh-based businessman Jason Richey. Richey suspended his own campaign for Governor and announced his endorsement of McSwain Thursday night.

McSwain had this to say about the endorsement:
---
|
> **_"I am proud and honored to receive the endorsement of my friend Jason Richey, who has been a champion for economic growth, a strong defender of constitutional rights, and an advocate for school choice for all Pennsylvanians. Together, we will work to defeat Josh Shapiro and towards a stronger, safer, more secure Pennsylvania." _**
---
| In a statement released Thursday, Richey explained that Bill McSwain is the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro, and promised to work with McSwain to defeat the disastrous left-wing policies that have decimated our communities:
---
|
> _**"First and foremost, I will be working to elect Bill McSwain as our next Governor. Like me, Bill McSwain is not a career politician but a political outsider who shares the vision of revitalizing our economy, restoring educational freedom, and removing the barriers that hold Pennsylvania back. ****The people of Pennsylvania have suffered enough under Gov. Tom Wolf’s harmful policies—policies supported by Democrat Josh Shapiro. It’s time for a new direction. Bill McSwain is best positioned to win the November election and lead Pennsylvania down a brighter path." **_
---
|
---
| McSwain and Richey shared the endorsement in a video Thursday night:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d9ad18e9c1&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d000e5778b&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=42edf09363&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=637f4462f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=637f4462f9).

subject: Irvine Walk Tomorrow and Upcoming Fundraising Deadline
body:
Help us spread the word tomorrow by knocking on doors. Meet us at 10:00am at Deerfield Park.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wEYs9XWJpiUUrFPWOlEcBngAUmMklyAqtgZlDHAoyJ7SpQGZtsKpzUlIgVYrI5SgVmScEsYDizuRi_WjPUPM4kdH8JW2RPCOBU2T7T_H6csSCt8GHWhVcmVHPd5QFAVEhqprkePWNIEq27jTRBZq14nH9-Bt2RjerbMRNsMbEtP2kW-KhlwBeK7Xt7cwVlFwz4xpWb2eGeCKc3Q2lTPHFA==&c=nXQigy2UAvtk5frWUV-cPH7kpscGL3iJzDbSnCpFkYiporBewrwbkg==&ch=23JF-ryWYXBK4ARglvipIkZcyFsGhZRN1eoZ6IQBRKDNdrR5Ov1SyA==)
---
---
| Dear Peter Willis,
Campaign season is here and it is time to put in the work to Start a New Conservative Movement in California and Take Back the House in November!
Tomorrow our volunteers and I will be door knocking in Irvine. Irvine is the newest and only addition to my district after the redistricting process.
I am the only candidate to run in this district two years ago which has created great momentum and name recognition. It is vital that voters in Irvine also know that I will fight for them as their Representative.
Help us spread the word tomorrow by knocking on doors. Meet us at 10:00am at Deerfield Park in Irvine. Address information is below. Coffee and donuts will be provided. Make sure to bring your walking shoes, your phone for our walking app and a lot of energy!
As a candidate, I take a lot of pride in the personal interaction with voters. I personally plan to knock on doors for over 15 hours this weekend alone!
When: Saturday, March 19th at 10:00am Where: Deerfield Community Park 55 Deerwood W Irvine, CA 92604
We hope to see you there. You can RSVP at link below.
---

clean_body: Help us spread the word tomorrow by knocking on doors. Meet us at 10:00am at Deerfield Park. | | | | == | Dear Peter Willis, Campaign season is here and it is time to put in the work to Start a New Conservative Movement in California and Take Back the House in November! Tomorrow our volunteers and I will be door knocking in Irvine. Irvine is the newest and only addition to my district after the redistricting process. I am the only candidate to run in this district two years ago which has created great momentum and name recognition. It is vital that voters in Irvine also know that I will fight for them as their Representative. Help us spread the word tomorrow by knocking on doors. Meet us at 10:00am at Deerfield Park in Irvine. Address information is below. Coffee and donuts will be provided. Make sure to bring your walking shoes, your phone for our walking app and a lot of energy! As a candidate, I take a lot of pride in the personal interaction with voters. I personally plan to knock on doors for over 15 hours this weekend alone! When: Saturday, March 19th at 10:00am Where: Deerfield Community Park 55 Deerwood W Irvine, CA 92604 We hope to see you there. You can RSVP at link below. | | == | While I have your attention, we also have a huge end-of-month fundraising deadline coming at the end of the month. My campaign is not funded by special interest but rather self-funding and from loyal conservatives such as yourself! Every donation of any size helps us reach our goal of a victory in November. == Help us defend this seat today by rushing your best gift! | | == For contributions made via check, please make your check payable out to 'Brian Burley for Congress' and mail your check to: Brian Burley for Congress 92 Corporate Park Suite C-80 Irvine, CA 92606 Thank you and God Bless, Brian Burley | == | == | | | | | | | Brian Burley for Congress | 92 Corporate Park Suite C-80, Irvine, CA 92606 7148240032 | | Sent by mailto:brian@burley4congress.com in collaboration with |

Hello,
Imagine the sense of relief our NATO allies must feel knowing President Biden is in office right now instead of his predecessor. I know the United States military issues a collective sigh of relief.
Donald Trump proposed withdrawing from NATO and attacked our very democracy. He openly stated that he believed Putin over our intelligence agencies. In Trump, Putin found a U.S. president who could stir up more anti-American sentiment than the Kremlin could ever hope to foment.
As Vladimir Putin began invading Ukraine, Donald Trump called him “genius,” “savvy,” and “smart.” **There is nothing “genius” about Putin; he is a dictator. And Trump doesn’t understand why America won’t let him be a Putin-wannabe.**
My opponent Chuck Grassley stood by Donald Trump through it all. Grassley continues to peddle the Big Lie even now – even adding fuel to the bizarre belief that the FBI was somehow involved in instigating the January 6th insurrection.
When I’m elected and Chuck Grassley is forcibly retired this November, I will serve with the dignity, demeanor, level-headedness, and progressive pragmatism of the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. For me, it is a continuation of long service to the nation. My number one job: Protect our democracy.
The early polling shows this could be one of the closest races in the country. And if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our fragile majority in the Senate.
McConnell and his Super PACs are readying millions of dollars in attacks. **The only way to fight back is if we raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still $3,290 short.**
[**I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m counting entirely on the support of grassroots donors like you. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to spare before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125757/335826579/-42398318?refcode=em20220318pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjJkNTkyNC0wZmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3M_tJBvOWocr03qNIUYarJqvpDq8TVwbqmWfLody3M=)

The only way to fight back is if we raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still $3,290 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We need to cull Congress of its insurrectionists and those who aid and abet them. Together, we can defeat Chuck Grassley this November. Thank you for being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| | We wanted to give you an important update from Andy’s reelection campaign, Peter: Right now, we’re in a tight race with our opponent — in fact, recent numbers show us virtually tied. And just this month, our opponent’s received***a lot*** of help from a special interest group that’s also fundraising for extreme Republicans — Republicans who support the Big Lie. [_**That means we have a lot of ground to make up. Peter, can you chip in to help us reelect a progressive champion to Congress right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119454/335796542/882283677?refcode=em_20220318_f_t_roundup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc3ZTllOC1lZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KgVxveX3c4CAnPesvOv08GK4p7Ku6Uwc8QJe6o5wXIY=) While our opponent relies on wealthy special interest groups, we’re building a team of dedicated grassroots supporters — people like you help us reach voters across the new Eleventh District, and our team is growing. Today, twelve of Andy’s colleagues in the House — folks like Progressive Caucus Chair Pramila Jayapal, Labor Caucus Chair Mark Pocan, senior Black Caucus Member Eleanor Holmes Norton and more — are officially endorsing our campaign. Together, they represent the breadth of experience of the Democratic caucus and the diversity of the new district, and we’re honored to have them on the team. They join Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Maxine Waters, SEIU and many labor organizations, and dozens of local leaders as proud members of Team Andy. We’re building the progressive team that can win, but March is an important month for us. We have to report our numbers to the public at the end of this month, and if we want to compete with the big special interest money being poured into this race, we need you to step it up. [_**If you can, please donate to support Andy’s reelection campaign and ensure progressive values remain in Congress. Our most common contribution is $10.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43119455/335796543/882283677?refcode=em_20220318_f_t_roundup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc3ZTllOC1lZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KgVxveX3c4CAnPesvOv08GK4p7Ku6Uwc8QJe6o5wXIY=) Let’s go! clean_body: This is why building a grassroots team is so important: | | | | | We wanted to give you an important update from Andy’s reelection campaign, Peter: Right now, we’re in a tight race with our opponent — in fact, recent numbers show us virtually tied. And just this month, our opponent’s received*a lot* of help from a special interest group that’s also fundraising for extreme Republicans — Republicans who support the Big Lie. = While our opponent relies on wealthy special interest groups, we’re building a team of dedicated grassroots supporters — people like you help us reach voters across the new Eleventh District, and our team is growing. Today, twelve of Andy’s colleagues in the House — folks like Progressive Caucus Chair Pramila Jayapal, Labor Caucus Chair Mark Pocan, senior Black Caucus Member Eleanor Holmes Norton and more — are officially endorsing our campaign. Together, they represent the breadth of experience of the Democratic caucus and the diversity of the new district, and we’re honored to have them on the team. They join Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Maxine Waters, SEIU and many labor organizations, and dozens of local leaders as proud members of Team Andy. We’re building the progressive team that can win, but March is an important month for us. We have to report our numbers to the public at the end of this month, and if we want to compete with the big special interest money being poured into this race, we need you to step it up. = Let’s go! Team Levin | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. name: Beto for Texas
subject: Greg Abbott lied (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our democracy is on the line, and we need your help.
#
**Greg Abbott lied to the people of Texas — again.** This is what he promised Texans after signing one of the most extreme voter suppression bills in the country last September:
_"No one who is eligible to vote will be denied the opportunity to vote."_
Yet, nearly 23,000 ballots were rejected during our primary elections earlier this month. **An investigation by the Associated Press found, "Texas threw out mail votes at an abnormally high rate."**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54037?refcode=ema20220318-180999&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=180999%2E444211%2EZakKyC)
This is no accident. This was part of a deliberate voter suppression scheme orchestrated by Abbott and the Texas GOP to attack democracy, keep Texans from participating in our elections, and retain their hold on power.
**[Our democracy is on the line, and we need your help. That's why we're launching a new Fight Voter Suppression Fund to go directly to on-the-ground work in Texas to bring more people into our democracy and to defeat Abbott. We're kicking it off with a goal to raise $75,000 by midnight — will you pitch in right now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54037?refcode=ema20220318-180999&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=180999%2E444211%2EZakKyC)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54037?refcode=ema20220318-180999&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=180999%2E444211%2EZakKyC)**
While Abbott and Texas Republicans are trying to take away Texans' votes, Beto is working to build an inclusive democracy where everyone who is eligible to vote is able to. He's been doing this work for years and helped lead the fight against the SB 1 voter suppression bill last summer.
**Defeating Abbott isn't going to be easy — it will take a historic number of Texans taking to the polls to demand change.** That's why our organizing team and over 56,000 volunteers are doing the work now to build a people-powered coalition full of Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and folks who haven't voted before.
Your support of the Fight Voter Suppression Fund will allow us to educate Texans on their voting rights, register voters in all 254 counties, and bring more people into this campaign. [Please, will you chip in $3 or more right now to our Fight Voter Suppression Fund to support our organizing across Texas and help elect a governor who will protect our voting rights and our democracy?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54037?refcode=ema20220318-180999&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=180999%2E444211%2EZakKyC)
Thank you for being a part of this,
— Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220318-180999-footer&t=23&refcode2=180999_444211_ZakKyC&akid=180999%2E444211%2EZakKyC)**

Peter,

My name is Scott, and I’m the campaign manager for Team Herschel.

You’ve probably received an email or two from our team letting you know that Herschel Walker is running for the Senate. _**However, I’m reaching out today to take the opportunity to address you directly.**_

**[I want to let you know just how important the month of March is for our campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71eaeccfa43e4d468949993d4087a742&_e=eqMePPBxf2yFTJqeQAzZ0MGj8REffayvH8vWf_6Nxbr994aMp60UtV253EzWE85Yefo1vCJcx6LUqbNC29yIZZCcI6ocrU7J0-5yxrePIB0sqgM7EZnZF_Vm0GaVNCxIOZjSVeSQUSvBxGLcFoLlaTYKUq7E_raXnphfPtWN3B1OCsQOP29-krAUIziqFMhnN2y5kq1cm1hOgeuzX_Fz2zFRrc3TSNeLmsBvJTmHXZtzW3ClDfegHBx7PuJN4Wq8ah6-ipsHJbAPaTsK9RV4lIUBFAokkcIZGnRpOZcpItpWpzAzkHHHMsdsd0pBlEYbEzL4qwRk9O0NaYsVqLswiqGUcK0krJE-bABp8n74Pz2Sh3uvBnushBVk0tnWAinuu3PEt7Kz9fctNzDIsvIYLVkVLJu959vf0Du8saVpR4PTjWsyzkS5bMLXCveHpMciV3te9swalJpQwvgwJ8UECQ%3D%3D)**

On the first day of every month, we sit down as a team to update our campaign’s goals. As we were sitting down together around our conference table _this month_ , I stressed to our team that **we’re approaching the end of the 1st quarter of 2022.** In the political world, that’s when most political campaigns kick into a higher gear (not that we weren’t already in a high gear, but you get my point).

**To be frank with you, our list of supporters isn’t where we need it to be.** Come June, if our list is the size it is today, we will not be able to raise the amount of money or turn out the number of voters we’re going to need to win this CRITICAL SENATE race.

**[For this reason, over the course of the next month, we need to add 25,000 new supporters to our list](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71eaeccfa43e4d468949993d4087a742&_e=eqMePPBxf2yFTJqeQAzZ0MGj8REffayvH8vWf_6Nxbr994aMp60UtV253EzWE85Yefo1vCJcx6LUqbNC29yIZZCcI6ocrU7J0-5yxrePIB0sqgM7EZnZF_Vm0GaVNCxIOZjSVeSQUSvBxGLcFoLlaTYKUq7E_raXnphfPtWN3B1OCsQOP29-krAUIziqFMhnN2y5kq1cm1hOgeuzX_Fz2zFRrc3TSNeLmsBvJTmHXZtzW3ClDfegHBx7PuJN4Wq81_ijHS8AU7oTW1cZLINhPVtUIZQpa6lp6kLwBcS6jIoGAqS5d0NkvrEUi_8Y2CAT1absd0KdxiqU4Zf1dWsAixFgSs1ttjyzJRLd-NMMeE66nw3yk6p9CqRxU-BOQsVJcb-r9jwMvbqOczCLxSeDiA_Wrp14PUDFCOYXZvunECd3v4TgfjnDVRdO75gCyYVs1pnnvfsPcA1mki04UuccOA%3D%3D)**. If you’ve previously offered your support to our campaign, would you please reaffirm your commitment today? If you haven’t yet responded or engaged with our communications thus far, would you please take action today?

**Signal Your Support for Team Herschel Today** [** Join our growing list of supporters -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71eaeccfa43e4d468949993d4087a742&_e=eqMePPBxf2yFTJqeQAzZ0MGj8REffayvH8vWf_6Nxbr994aMp60UtV253EzWE85Yefo1vCJcx6LUqbNC29yIZZCcI6ocrU7J0-5yxrePIB0sqgM7EZnZF_Vm0GaVNCxIOZjSVeSQUSvBxGLcFoLlaTYKUq7E_raXnphfPtWN3B1OCsQOP29-krAUIziqFMhnN2y5kq1cm1hOgeuzX_Fz2zFRrc3TSNeLmsBvJTmHXZtzW3ClDfegHBx7PuJN4Wq8ZYTPVHhkfyu2BgXnF8pUOh80IqadRObpfSGl6_QT9ph8hyzgT9mHdCqZNjNzd2KxLJ55cKyFiggJFHrDHLTaCTuTinne1KnWosniYE_gyV6h84QC78skAw78y5xelZo0YRfBxxg1OdZeC3kuIrAZku8mVcSx96h6N-rd6hNnxewruig7XHNPaeRKSF4lJHe6i0XPOGa-CxoD-E98pjrgLQ%3D%3D) **[Reaffirm your commitment to Team Herschel!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71eaeccfa43e4d468949993d4087a742&_e=eqMePPBxf2yFTJqeQAzZ0MGj8REffayvH8vWf_6Nxbr994aMp60UtV253EzWE85Yefo1vCJcx6LUqbNC29yIZZCcI6ocrU7J0-5yxrePIB0sqgM7EZnZF_Vm0GaVNCxIOZjSVeSQUSvBxGLcFoLlaTYKUq7E_raXnphfPtWN3B1OCsQOP29-krAUIziqFMhnN2y5kq1cm1hOgeuzX_Fz2zFRrc3TSNeLmsBvJTmHXZtzW3ClDfegHBx7PuJN4Wq87YskEYC-75BOKPbYWcJ5JvehzjCAzQUrtP6mIxW_DE4IJ08VWNEZc4TY1XgoPHQGjmycIont9Um8rmkKOKfCcYJw3JL_vHDxiXtHRBtk8WXLyjwQL8qxezlY6X9KXZJPu6O2iGiwuvhdCenb0CF7ZhmuVsISyZiw5z0Nw5iyMDz8xlKRxakhK9CrFKAtqm5UgFWBLRgmQkFSSEplsMhuAw%3D%3D)**

body:
Surely We Can Do Better | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6889433?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=8d51b8d95b&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham serves as a daily reminder of how important it is to select government leaders whose actions will benefit the State of New Mexico. Sadly, [we are experiencing the complete opposite](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=ebc6ee3cd6&e=102b599530) under her leadership.

I remember when we used to be independent and did not need to rely on foreign energy sources. Grisham is now making us hostage to China for obtaining solar panels and wind power technology after commandeering the use of “renewable” energy sources. Yet there’s something that’s not being discussed . . .

_**IT TAKES AN INCREDIBLE AMOUNT OF FOSSIL FUELS TO MAKE RENEWABLE ENERGY SOURCES WORK.**_

Before MLG’s catastrophic decision to pull steady - or baseload - energy sources from our state’s energy portfolio, New Mexico had enjoyed decades of successfully producing its own energy.

That’s not the story anymore. **Our governor is making us more energy _dependent_ every single day.** To add insult to injury, the state’s largest utility company recently issued a warning of the likelihood of New Mexico residents experiencing blackouts this summer.

_Governor Grisham would have you believe that there is no alternative_. We cannot leave it up to the Radical Left socialists to determine when, where, and how we produce and consume energy any longer. Together we can reverse the direction of our dwindling domestic energy supply and the impact it has had on our energy producing infrastructure.

Our future depends on us and only us. _**An energy independent New Mexico is a thriving New Mexico**_.

**As your next governor,** I can say without hesitation that our future _will not_ depend on China by focusing solely on “renewable” energy sources.

As a lifelong public servant, my only goal is to ensure that _**YOU, AND ONLY YOU, CAN CHOOSE WHO KEEPS THE LIGHTS ON.**_

Let’s tell MLG that we’ve had enough of her disastrous policies which only serve to enrich her while harming us. Your support of my campaign in a donation of any amount today will show Governor Grisham that we reject her “mini” Green New Deal, and will not serve as her minions using foreign equipment for expensive and unreliable sources of energy.
---
| [JAY WILL MAKE NEW MEXICO ENERGY INDEPENDENT AGAIN](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=bc45d09093&e=102b599530 "JAY WILL MAKE NEW MEXICO ENERGY INDEPENDENT AGAIN")
---

---
| [DONATE $50 »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=eaf263edf7&e=102b599530 "DONATE $50 »")
---
| [DONATE $100 »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=06e5da8796&e=102b599530 "DONATE $100 »")
---
| [DONATE $250 »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=5316448e86&e=102b599530 "DONATE $250 »")
---
| [DONATE ANY AMOUNT »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=b3e6357bff&e=102b599530 "DONATE ANY AMOUNT »")
---
| | Surely we can do better. This isn’t a one-man show. We’re all fighting for a more prosperous New Mexico, and together _we will_ make that happen.

Let’s turn on the engines to attain energy independence again.
---
| Yours Truly,
**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

[](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=9816454f58&e=102b599530)

| Team, this legislative session, Republicans have used their power to introduce over 100 anti-democracy election bills, and Senator Kelly Townsend just said the quiet part out loud on the Senate floor.

While explaining her yes vote to another bill that suppresses our freedom to vote, Sen. Townsend said, **“we’re all trying very hard to suppress the vote.”**

**[Team, we need your help TODAY to fight back against the anti-voter agenda right-wing Republicans are pushing at the legislature. These bills do everything to prevent you from signing up to vote, voting, and knowing if your ballot has been counted. Right-wing Republicans have sponsored bills that prohibit same-day voter registration, early vote centers, unmonitored ballot boxes, and drive-thru voting. This disproportionately harms the young, Black, Indigenous, and people of color.

These bills, sponsored by ring-wing Republicans in the House and Senate, are attacks on our democracy and Arizonans’ freedom to vote!

clean_body: | | | Saying the quiet part out loud! | | | Team, this legislative session, Republicans have used their power to introduce over 100 anti-democracy election bills, and Senator Kelly Townsend just said the quiet part out loud on the Senate floor. While explaining her yes vote to another bill that suppresses our freedom to vote, Sen. Townsend said, “we’re all trying very hard to suppress the vote.” | ?linkid=3&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-this-is-our-best-chance-at-winning-the-az-governors-office&emailreferrer=email1474366&emailsubject=sen-townsend-admits-the-gop-is-trying-very-hard-to-suppress-the-vote These bills do everything to prevent you from signing up to vote, voting, and knowing if your ballot has been counted. Right-wing Republicans have sponsored bills that prohibit same-day voter registration, early vote centers, unmonitored ballot boxes, and drive-thru voting. This disproportionately harms the young, Black, Indigenous, and people of color. These bills, sponsored by ring-wing Republicans in the House and Senate, are attacks on our democracy and Arizonans’ freedom to vote! Friend — They say women can’t win competitive races in Pennsylvania — we call BS. [If you agree, donate to help elect the first woman to represent PA-01 in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120066/335799308/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220318sexism_TE_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NThmN2FiNy1mMmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66SQX5HToutJ-OHYWeuffDQSoicaEVtSUy86NfTtKLU=) Ashley is used to hearing tired tropes about women candidates not being “electable” or “qualified” to run for office. But when it comes to fighting for our communities in Bucks and Montgomery counties, Ashley doesn’t take a no for an answer. Instead, she rolls up her sleeves and tackles every challenge head-on. Ashley has always fought tirelessly for her community, whether it’s being the only woman in her Apache helicopter class, overcoming financial hardships in a single-parent household, or working on COVID response during the pandemic. So let’s stop putting women candidates into boxes and work to ensure our leaders fight on behalf of people first and foremost. **[Will you pitch in $10 or more to bring brave, fearless leadership to Congress? clean_body: | = Friend — They say women can’t win competitive races in Pennsylvania — we call BS. = Ashley is used to hearing tired tropes about women candidates not being “electable” or “qualified” to run for office. But when it comes to fighting for our communities in Bucks and Montgomery counties, Ashley doesn’t take a no for an answer. Instead, she rolls up her sleeves and tackles every challenge head-on. Ashley has always fought tirelessly for her community, whether it’s being the only woman in her Apache helicopter class, overcoming financial hardships in a single-parent household, or working on COVID response during the pandemic. So let’s stop putting women candidates into boxes and work to ensure our leaders fight on behalf of people first and foremost. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = Thanks for supporting our people-powered campaign. subject: It may not seem like much...but our small donations can absolutely beat the GOP’s dark money.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
CNN has consistently ranked this one of the seats “most likely to flip” in November
#

We're emailing you to ask you to contribute $5 today.
CNN has consistently ranked this one of the seats “most likely to flip” in November, and your contribution could make the difference.
We know it may not seem like $5 is enough for us to compete with the millions of dollars Club for Growth has already poured into this race — and the $94 million Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just raised to flood the most competitive races like North Carolina.
But what you may not know is that the majority of donations to Cheri Beasley’s campaign come in response to messages just like this one — from people just like you pitching in small amounts of money.
So yes, when everyone is chipping in, even $5 has the power to swing this race and flip this seat. But to pull this off, we need everyone to play a role in this fight — including you.
[**Please contribute $5 today to send Cheri Beasley to the Senate. Republicans are flooding North Carolina with millions in dark money to buy this seat and take back the Senate, so we need lots of $5 donations right now from folks just like you to fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-subs&refcode2=561.357359.fnHOfz&t=1&akid=561%2E357359%2EfnHOfz)

subject: March campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120305/335800353/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)

Hey team,

As expected, March has been incredibly busy. Already, Kara has hit the campaign trail in St. James, Brentwood, Plainview, Greenport, Hauppauge, Dix Hills, and we're just getting started!

Since you're such a key part of this team, I've gathered a few highlights below to share with you.
# **Office Opening**
Despite the rainy weather, we had an incredible turnout for our office opening and petitioning kick-off earlier this month!
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120306/335800354/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)
---

We couldn't have done this without _your_ support. Opening our office headquarters, starting conversations with our neighbors, and building out our ground team, was all made possible by grassroots supporters.

* * *
# **Getting Kara on the Ballot**
We're keeping a strong pace with signatures, but we'll need to pick it up to have a strong showing by the filing deadline. That's why we're so grateful for our volunteers and the inspiration and commitment they bring every day to our community.

**[Do you live in the District or nearby and want to get involved? You can sign up to volunteer here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120307/335800355/-1577022083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=&emci=941365b9-d1a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57b36b5e-f4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120308/335800356/-1577022083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=&emci=941365b9-d1a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57b36b5e-f4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)
---

[Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120309/335800357/-1577022083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=&emci=941365b9-d1a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57b36b5e-f4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)
**_Already volunteering?[Send us your best petitioning selfie here.](mailto:info@karaforcongress.com?subject=Selfie)_**

* * *
# **Standing with Ukraine**
Kara stood with the North Country Peace Group to rally for peace in Ukraine. As we continue to witness the devastating scenes from the war in Ukraine, it's critical we use our voices to stand up for Democracy at home and abroad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120310/335800358/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)
---

* * *
# **What We're Hearing in the District**
As part of our outreach, we're having a lot of conversations with our neighbors. We're hearing them express their thoughts over the higher prices at the pump and the grocery store, as well as their ongoing concerns about Covid.

Look, these conversations with our neighbors are an important reminder of how important it is that we flip this seat blue and send someone to Washington who is willing to actually address these issues. Just this month, Kara stood with Senator Gillibrand to talk about bringing more manufacturing jobs to Long Island, securing our supply chains, and keeping costs low:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120311/335800359/681073251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=&emci=941365b9-d1a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57b36b5e-f4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)
---
[Watch here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120312/335800360/681073251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=&emci=941365b9-d1a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57b36b5e-f4a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)
* * *
As you can see, Kara's hard at work each and every day to make sure we're running a strong campaign to flip this seat and secure real progress for Long Islanders. And when we give her a 15-minute break? We find her picking up litter to leave the space outside our office a bit cleaner. Seriously, she's nonstop!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120313/335800361/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)
---

**Now's the part of the email where I ask for your help to send Kara to Congress.[We've got an end-of-quarter FEC report coming up, and a contribution of any size right now would go a long way toward reaching our goal and demonstrating the strength of our campaign. I hope I can count on your support today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120314/335800362/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)**

Thanks again!

Kelley
Campaign Manager
Kara Hahn for Congress

Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120315/335800363/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43120316/335800364/189849860?refcode=em22_220318_Marchupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNmI1ZS1mNGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdxmZBLdKbEloFdV6u-j0mVOhEUGzUSSYJIO2GpNjj4=)

clean_body: | = Hey team, As expected, March has been incredibly busy. Already, Kara has hit the campaign trail in St. James, Brentwood, Plainview, Greenport, Hauppauge, Dix Hills, and we're just getting started! Since you're such a key part of this team, I've gathered a few highlights below to share with you. Office Opening Despite the rainy weather, we had an incredible turnout for our office opening and petitioning kick-off earlier this month! | = We couldn't have done this without your support. Opening our office headquarters, starting conversations with our neighbors, and building out our ground team, was all made possible by grassroots supporters. Getting Kara on the Ballot We're keeping a strong pace with signatures, but we'll need to pick it up to have a strong showing by the filing deadline. That's why we're so grateful for our volunteers and the inspiration and commitment they bring every day to our community. Already volunteering?mailto:info@karaforcongress.com?subject=Selfie Standing with Ukraine Kara stood with the North Country Peace Group to rally for peace in Ukraine. As we continue to witness the devastating scenes from the war in Ukraine, it's critical we use our voices to stand up for Democracy at home and abroad. = What We're Hearing in the District As part of our outreach, we're having a lot of conversations with our neighbors. We're hearing them express their thoughts over the higher prices at the pump and the grocery store, as well as their ongoing concerns about Covid. Look, these conversations with our neighbors are an important reminder of how important it is that we flip this seat blue and send someone to Washington who is willing to actually address these issues. Just this month, Kara stood with Senator Gillibrand to talk about bringing more manufacturing jobs to Long Island, securing our supply chains, and keeping costs low: As you can see, Kara's hard at work each and every day to make sure we're running a strong campaign to flip this seat and secure real progress for Long Islanders. And when we give her a 15-minute break? We find her picking up litter to leave the space outside our office a bit cleaner. Seriously, she's nonstop! = Now's the part of the email where I ask for your help to send Kara to Congress.= Thanks again! Kelley Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *
