name: =?utf-8?Q?Swank=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Re: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R)
body:
We need some good old-fashioned common sense right now in DC! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9473c6490824/re-thank-you?e=d32193ab14)
---
| | |
---
---
---
| |
---
|
# **We're facing serious problems stemming from a lack of moral leadership in our country.

That's why I'm running for the U.S. House of Representatives in Washington State's 10th Congressional District. This is normally rated a D+5 district; however, the 2022 election is shaping up to be a historic "red wave" and a Republican has a real chance of winning this race.

I grew up on a small farm in Pennsylvania where I learned the value of hard work; afterwards, I spent several years in the Army Airborne Infantry where I learned the value of a strong military protecting this country.

After my tour was done in the Army, I made the decision to become an officer in the Seattle Police Department where I spent the last 32 years of my career. My experience as an officer reinforced my dedication to the Rule of Law as I saw first-hand what happens to a society when it isn't followed.

_My life experiences have driven home a love and respect for our nation._

For too many years we’ve sent the same type of people, with the same bad, self-serving ideas to D.C. expecting different results; yet, all we have is more of the same. We can’t expect sound public policies if we continue to elect the same people, on the same hopeless path over-and-over again.

[We need some good old-fashioned common sense right now in Washington, DC! Click here to see my newest video ad and join the fight.](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=2277067c3f&e=d32193ab14 "Video and Anedot Link")

People with realistic, practical solutions can get us back on the right track. We must get back to what the founders envisioned when they set up our Representative Republic – Citizen Statesmen. People who've had a real jobs, who know what it’s like to struggle to day-to-day, but also feel a duty to take on the role of legislator for a short time. _In other words, not career politicians like the democrat I'm running against._

_We have many dire issues facing our nation, but these are just a few I believe need to be addressed and supported immediately to improve the lives of the people of Washington State's 10th District, as well as the entire country._**
* **A Strong, Non-Politicized Military for National Security**
* **Affordable, Free Market Healthcare **
* **Ban Stock Trading by Congress and Federal Judges**
* **Border Security is National Security**
* **Election Security and Integrity **
* **Enact Term Limits for All Members of Congress**
* **Honor the Commitment We’ve Made to Our Veterans**
* **Increase U.S. Energy Independence and Reduce Energy Costs**
* **Protect the Bill of Rights and our Second Amendment**
* **Reduce Homelessness by Addressing Drug Addiction & Mental Health**
* **Reduce Taxes and Spending**
* **Restore Parental Rights in Education and De-Politicize Our Schools**
* **Stop Out-of-Control Inflation **
* **Support and Defend Law and Order**

**_Thank you for your support! With your help, we can win this important fight to save our community and our country._

Yours in Freedom,
Keith R. Swank
Keep the Republic Safe**
---

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Can we have a moment of your time to explain why grassroots support is so important to our campaign?
#

Friends,
We’re reaching out to ask you to make a $5 donation ahead of this month’s FEC deadline. But first, can we have a moment of your time to explain why grassroots support is so important to our campaign?
Alex is working tirelessly in the Senate to make us proud and deliver for Californians. He’s at the forefront of the fights for immigration, voting rights, climate change and eliminating the filibuster to get it all done. He knows that’s what has to be done to make the meaningful progressive change that Democrats ran and won on.
And on Monday when the confirmation hearing for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson begins, he will faithfully execute his duty as a member of the Judiciary Committee to consider her historic nomination.
This important work leaves limited time for Alex to worry about our campaign’s fundraising, but that doesn’t change the important goals we need to hit before the official end-of-quarter FEC deadline this month. And right now, we have some work to do if we’re going to stay on track.
We’re going to publicly report our numbers after this deadline, so it’s important we post a BIG number that shows the people are 100% behind Alex and our progressive movement. So that’s why your $5 is so important and why we are asking:
[**Will you please make a $5 donation to Alex Padilla’s campaign today to help us win this race, hold the majority and deliver results for the people? Do it so we can reach our goal before the FEC deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220318-1-60&t=1&refcode2=687_159979_wNUFAS&akid=687%2E159979%2EwNUFAS)

clean_body: Thank you for everything you’re doing. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Hey Peter, It’s me: Jason Simmons, the Executive Director at NCGOP HQ. Chairman Whatley asked me to pull together a list of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Florida, and your name immediately jumped up to the top of the list. Congratulations! That’s why I’m reaching out today, actually. As one of the most dedicated Republican Patriots in Florida, I want to offer you the exclusive opportunity to join our elite Majority Makers Membership program. | 2022 MAJORITY MAKERS MEMBERSHIP EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | The November election is going to be close, Peter -- too close. And no state is going to be harder fought on both sides than North Carolina. If we win here, we’ll win the Majority and defend the accomplishments we made under President Trump’s leadership. But if we fall short, the Democrats will continue forcing us down the path of socialism. | Thank you. Jason Simmons Executive Director, North Carolina Republican Party

Now that we’re the official Republican nominee for Texas’ brand-new 38th congressional district, I wanted to ensure that YOUR voice and opinions are being heard.
---

To win this all-important new district that’s 1 of the 5 seats needed to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi’s control, I’ll need your help finalizing our winning platform for the general election. 2022 General Election Victory Survey Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Submission Status:[Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 10:45 P.M. name: Tim Burchett
subject: Dear Liberals, Get Your Priorities Straight 🗣️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgqET6UmSFYJFB617jSa1fTWx5Djx6A5qHLDwkjZWQ3bNsxtY82HCXQROdu-uGXcSA1_OmbMAIYZn-gQ-wkfyDqVgmw5YAXgPkTG4jGl-CM9zJStJM5ar0ned0Bgms2lhl10Hhmgbbo--3lg9IkAcmk053GvXQIWmur0nKISJ9dGNOwHJFpQJPwyzQiDU-sb0LGy4hOWZ12oyOLoakasqLazcfbgPeAMfe9qm7Wq4ra-mupxM1Tb9AbLWpwEcxEixddgyxQ4c2xg1sVh4YiR8ciBvvm2KMP2GEnkE-1FGGivuz-fa0jc_jfb9NTuiJZO3bIey4I_UdrCpGXYj_mHqnVtjbfHAmx75F1lAMrIex12rT8hJqZGZx5huEKheyPys_A%3D%3D) | |
---
**Dear Liberals, Get Your Priorities Straight 🗣️**
The American government needs to get its priorities straight.

The world is hurting right now.

Here in the U.S., Americans are struggling with the highest inflation rate in 40 years at a [record-breaking 7.9%](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgkOO0xDgcXrx6NlWV090ZD3U9370Ekiu05VcXWgPXx5Z_VeRxdbka1nQzoaAtQo42r-f3acdDqv_rjFDCxNo-vptORQjSSjKvQ7ypj20nPNE8XjZD-HNzSwccae3wpsLsyqF2GXlPUgvJED_-a9MBYH1C9j4dxGuuxb7GWYYqRj_n-9K0Ui8FH7FGvmBPlge6Y8LrJ6Ds-EXU6U9u8ARgbfjc8DEPdDFcqzs0xbqIuFWur7-fMHc15IE_AguI2TcRhdpCESZSGkfLmeh-kryThH3T97rcPy8CfYg5cEQZ5rfI-SqXPLPnNGB3hRMh_2gpw%3D%3D). All the while, honest, hard-working families are struggling just to get food on the table and [gas](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgpyewqB7oS7XWPXozfiIld7fBb8Xpqux563oE93GV-8o-ZWnKGnn58WEQ0LLqpXYVd4IaTOizyjG4iFP9VYOX6oNVclF_HL2U76elpszEXGVXa_NcT1yQ6V0Qq3lJUq2T4OY4rbOi9TNXTsSUNj9QUyuRDucaw018YGqvsCUgYfDnAI3ygLhXzWvTMM80VYKi18QKckd-6vFA-lVwfqx6jYNZmNjTT-I7fqSaJrDccVzr6El_gryUuPIii6iPUSOr0Vnvy7CQfSGsPs4n-Pt8IC7ZseW-9pT0GB4uqL7c-Pk) in their cars.

On the international front, our ally Ukraine is fighting off a brutal tyrant who has no respect for human life. Within three weeks of Putin’s war, [thousands](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgmp_AQWl_9f2Soys3KI3J24CcpolQPk4N10OgQq1wliTmjhr4dFA8dWKRwOjJXQ5BfaHGH-f4rRYMAAYV6VhFI9i0RHWa_KrCmWsyOv_-nhB9FuJ2V0bKuaaJRQr4wXUHEpsxRMgtrL25CEeENJxPvTy7_fB-cz4o3KjtO-LOaaxozIK1OYU--vWBXQxRAksOFbwLq7xlQBUIzqFbhOmZi3Ltq5iXGGG4qdtC0-jC4FIY03KIGksfgnQiEbEXSRyEi7fznIoJqqWUWufGWG-KCzcVvaNbdEa1ZpWZAqoFkcB) of innocent Ukrainian civilians and soldiers were killed. And there’s no end in sight.

Given the current state of the world, you’d think that Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi would be able to assemble the powerful resources we have here at home and address these issues once and for all. However, my far-left colleagues have their priorities all screwed up.

Take, for example, the House Foreign Affairs Committee, on which I sit, [held a briefing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgm5w-WvrE8HbV7IR4D5nrNWnf939uPtTwYt425QwL3TXbTdJ7u42TZXuuNq2L0W3TdfJb18BSONHE2Yrh0215oyhBUZ6LSquoic6cAAD8Wg7fTschRMz_UCPG56sThPQU3sD0xpEKGybRfTIgc65iYTy-6tImHv5o-HLpT_UXdcDTHivLWmdj_eaRArgp4WzGiluyBGWZLCt8NKcBPwhsLKtdK5ClH-mNhsSTpjdDdcF2QCUT0CF2S9Hqp90D-k97Wmoyf7JxVyn_HijeJ0BZA5Vq6PyY_Co3SyA8wTBRZ-0) this week with the U.S. Special Envoy to Advance the Equal Rights of LGBTQI+ Persons.

First of all, what in the world is the “+” for?

Second of all, is this really the best thing to be focusing on right now? Ukraine is literally [begging](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pgghxs1O2QbvHCb_0vtfz5AHTRtZrduTQqdkN_5vw4shHZN-XMuG4G_dl5sFnkCXkRQBCzF0hL9BCguNiiq2SS8tSC4wWP3bsEzQT7aw7dKwfA7dyTtqegapm0LkK2SAHVWiShArSaaanCdz4gnLaLsCNVxpastwGOYaXCSlGbqNwPY4u5MY63Fba3F3i8N7uuVy3eWP3xcT8RfpoLushhT5V1DxiRZFWvjoINfK85dO8N3CMqXcDduQn_XZZhQechlMCEDUVC9Guo3cq0162sR2fdUZefoH4zVx_OSB2cjR5CKvZ4OPiNG6ROKe1WncUmSqCmPqLPjLGMaX8CnjlwXI%3D) for planes and equipment, and Joe Biden is dragging his feet. Americans are paying record prices for gas and the far Left [wants to double down](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e978ca6f71704556a13398da50ac8c83&_e=WK_QvuGoIRQ0qPHz7s7pggt1rWdmeE7RUbdSGC1BS3Sr0kWWatbVnLmsaubSARcIwIUI4qy7Lk0_A3G8jojQ4N-RMBe2NxffdfzD9eQSzqHUytqbJ7sdl7Od8tAN2fKBsXZ4P-hq3hnQ18l7Gx8ghs6Ofe8l2bFwIpEGEbEvir0-VP70vA5OvQCJ3F10ka6fyOS4Y7acmBbRmdE7M3WPuViyPSTIn2zpA2BHY1C3n15ySOz_UArKlTqod6jvJ8S32_x7Zzd0sFbtaMZx-qObtk6WTH_WQMLuE10x368OBb5Ij_MnTi1GcsbanBwZxSH4drt9XPZOdoj2jfNTdP9wI8zBJ5Gp20nSMZ2YZEB5SKOMBkGlgst064IL81utieOc) on their cockamamie Green New Deal. Why are Democrats obsessed with woke virtue signaling when there are real problems to deal with?
|

_Image courtesy of Fox News_
An East Tennessee bear cub found a new home this week.

The orphaned bear was discovered by a good Samaritan who spotted the little guy in trouble after losing his mama.

Once in the hands of the Appalachian Bear Rescue and the Tennessee Wildlife Resources Agency, it was off to the races to find this fuzzy friend a new family.

The happy ending? The cub was placed with a new foster family who welcomed him with open paws.

On the international front, our ally Ukraine is fighting off a brutal tyrant who has no respect for human life. Within three weeks of Putin’s war, of innocent Ukrainian civilians and soldiers were killed. And there’s no end in sight. Given the current state of the world, you’d think that Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi would be able to assemble the powerful resources we have here at home and address these issues once and for all. However, my far-left colleagues have their priorities all screwed up. Take, for example, the House Foreign Affairs Committee, on which I sit, this week with the U.S. Special Envoy to Advance the Equal Rights of LGBTQI+ Persons. First of all, what in the world is the “+” for? Second of all, is this really the best thing to be focusing on right now? Ukraine is literally for planes and equipment, and Joe Biden is dragging his feet. Americans are paying record prices for gas and the far Left on their cockamamie Green New Deal. Why are Democrats obsessed with woke virtue signaling when there are real problems to deal with? | Beary Good News 🐻 Image courtesy of Fox News An East Tennessee bear cub found a new home this week. The orphaned bear was discovered by a good Samaritan who spotted the little guy in trouble after losing his mama. Once in the hands of the Appalachian Bear Rescue and the Tennessee Wildlife Resources Agency, it was off to the races to find this fuzzy friend a new family. The happy ending? The cub was placed with a new foster family who welcomed him with open paws. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Chris Walsh, AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Our path to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friends, it's Chris, Alessandra's campaign manager.
Because this is such a crowded primary, voters often ask me — and our team — why Alessandra is the best Democratic candidate in this race, and what her path to victory looks like. So I wanted to take some time to sketch that out for you today.
**The truth is that Alessandra is the only person in this primary with a clear record of delivering for all New Yorkers.**
In 2018, when she saw that her state senator was working against progressive interests, she challenged him — and won, despite being outspent 10-to-1.
When she was elected, she got straight to work passing bold legislation like codifying legal abortion and historic climate action bills.
She’s the best candidate in this primary because of her history delivering for her community and the people of New York. Look, don’t take my word for it, ask her constituents who elected her for reelection in 2020. She even outperformed Joe Biden in her senate district by _four_ points.
That’s why I know that Alessandra is the candidate to beat. But the other candidates know that, too, and they’ll throw ridiculous amounts of money into stopping her momentum.
**[So please, make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to Alessandra’s campaign today. Our first Federal Deadline is coming up in about two weeks, so your support is more important than ever right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220318-1-60&refcode2=574_59515_iRoZjQ&akid=574%2E59515%2EiRoZjQ)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220318-1-60&refcode2=574_59515_iRoZjQ&akid=574%2E59515%2EiRoZjQ)**
Look, I wouldn’t be on Alessandra’s team if I didn’t believe in her and her ability to get things done for the people of NY-3. But no one, not even Alessandra, can win in such a crowded race without lots and lots of support from people like you chipping in small amounts of money when you can.
Thanks for reading,
Chris
Chris Walsh
Campaign Manager

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=574%2E59515%2EiRoZjQ).

body:
I'll be live streaming my entire day as we travel across the state. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=67abc890dc&e=9d6926af69)

---
| Dear Fellow Republicans,

This weekend, local Republicans from across the State will host over 30 conventions in their hometowns to elect delegates to the State Convention, discuss issues important to them, their families and neighbors, and unite to defeat Tim Walz this November.

**What better way to experience this Super Saturday than spend it with our campaign virtually? **

Team Benson will start live streaming on Facebook at 9:00 AM as we travel the state! I'll be taking your questions, talking with voters, and sharing my favorite campaign and capitol memories.

**[Right now, you can RSVP for the live event on Facebook to be sent a reminder and submit questions in advance, if you choose.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=47baf25cbb&e=9d6926af69)**

Start watching first thing in the morning or join us throughout the day.

I look forward to connecting with you!

Sincerely,

| | | **Team Swan,**

Our campaign keeps picking up steam and continues to become **the** campaign to beat.

As you may have already seen, I released my first campaign ad that finally says what we’ve all been thinking: what’s happening in our military ranks is **insane.** And it created a lot of buzz. If you haven't seen it, you can watch the video below!

**Here's What They're Saying:**

_Christian Post:_ [Former Marine colonel criticizes military's focus on gender ideology amid Ukraine invasion](https://colonelswanforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0368302df230e4a82cd29bd86&id=a77087fb17&e=85e5151e18)

Colonel Swan

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Add your name if you believe we need to pass commonsense gun laws ASAP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Peter isn’t in this fight for the awards, accolades, or endorsements. He’s in it to help end the epidemic of gun violence in our country.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=137%2E61531%2EQZL4XV)
Hello,
Great news: This week, Brady PAC, one of the nation’s leading organizations working to prevent gun violence, endorsed Peter for Senate.
For years, Peter has been a leading advocate for common-sense gun safety reforms, from passing universal background checks for gun purchases, to banning assault weapons, to removing the prohibition on gun violence research by the CDC.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220318_p_t_brady&t=3&akid=137%2E61531%2EQZL4XV)
An endorsement from the Brady PAC is a big deal, because it means Peter has proven to be a real partner in the fight to end gun violence. But Peter isn’t in this fight for the awards or accolades—he’s in it to help end the epidemic of gun violence in our country. That’s what he’ll do as senator if we win this race. And with this grassroots movement, we’re optimistic we can get it done.
[**Please add your name if you agree with Peter that Congress must step up and pass commonsense gun laws right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220318_p_t_brady&t=4&akid=137%2E61531%2EQZL4XV)
[**[ADD MY NAME]**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220318_p_t_brady&t=5&akid=137%2E61531%2EQZL4XV)
Peter already helped to pass a strong background check bill in the House, but Senate Republicans and Mitch McConnell refused to bring it to the floor while they were in the majority. As Senator, we can count on him to always support gun violence prevention measures.
Preventable gun tragedies continue to tear families apart, but preventing them isn’t at the top of everyone’s priority list in Washington. That's simply unacceptable. And while we can count on Peter to continue fighting for common-sense gun safety, it’s clear we’ve got to increase the pressure on Republicans to step up and join him.
[**We have lost too many Vermonters—and too many Americans—to gun violence. Add your name if you’re with Peter in the fight for common-sense gun reform. Let’s inspire his Senate colleagues to join us.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220318_p_t_brady&t=6&akid=137%2E61531%2EQZL4XV)
Thank you,
Team Welch

---

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Peter,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

[](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=eca0972b54154cb1a84cd57a30a46f6b&_e=lXqhn8d3Qc5avG-msTE4E2hAT7RvKIx8nUOg7L-oLO6enr7J-kL170-9bhbHGPPil7slR5bcSjpZkSz8wjUY0r_IZObSSPNGYfHtVdH1EvuN2poW3hxHcC82EEdfgL3uzLkwlCbc4lD2EYJ_rHag7qDFs5x1-BNEVbXudLd3x2VsqaI-UcgzJQQDhrVa3BQ0G4BgjP5L9NMfaMcMTxXe0eWMXrC6frOKjLyvyOd3ubWM2PErEF5Q8namHd3kbXeHn6ROav8n2BBQ4xeKVPl42ONOV8zcxvtm6_kIBSEBfouNKWMhti8CJdo07kQur97VLlnlBeCtwOEtlqzWY6xeTNuWpa1n18cpkz3ytX1VFhh6kao9nzknKhnhbl-D_QCWEIEPsHfvU5Ij-1mKytmQ6OiihwhHN8-finZRzOVGghU1BJFG7uEUdry45m92gLtl_mQ1MHfo0NfzhCB-qpssK5zmMr3NkHxPYxdl42iT0-k%3D)
When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. [**They must not be allowed to continue to serve in the House majority.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=eca0972b54154cb1a84cd57a30a46f6b&_e=lXqhn8d3Qc5avG-msTE4E2hAT7RvKIx8nUOg7L-oLO6enr7J-kL170-9bhbHGPPil7slR5bcSjpZkSz8wjUY0r_IZObSSPNGYfHtVdH1EvuN2poW3hxHcC82EEdfgL3uzLkwlCbc4lD2EYJ_rHag7qDFs5x1-BNEVbXudLd3x2VsqaI-UcgzJQQDhrVa3BQ0G4BgjP5L9NMfaMcMTxXe0eWMXrC6frOKjLyvyOd3ubWM2PErEF5Q8namHd3kbXeHZcWvbboDwG1kQ4qdXcB1L2BJ825IYH0OhQFXYB4JIzH9FA7d_VbdG3gbbf5KOJ0E---awzIc7HMzOx_SR1OmhoMmjQlyylKbII9SXy4BSf0Ni8MX0mYYgTLiZ8ErewJa65B8w_6s4vPBo3BT2BJBWTFVWzKyxmwsqz6q-4O_FzyoAK0zxjdZCxLfvQqf9L-BVrQCZx-0e7xW0bPmycrcMpm0xRuqOR3hYrkzKdEgUWM%3D)

We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Peter, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Why is Rob Bonta silent on human trafficking solutions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
| | |
---
| | Did you know California is one of the hotspots for human trafficking in the nation?

We are talking about a multi-billon dollar industry that commercially and sexually exploits its victims through force, fear, fraud, coercion, violence and threats.

Perhaps most terrifying, 25% of victims are children. Perhaps most shocking, human trafficking is not considered a violent or serious felony in California.

Thankfully, Senator Shannon Grove has authored a bill in the State Senate, SB 1042, sponsored by Kern County District Attorney Cynthia Zimmer, to fix this problem. SB 1042 would finally make human trafficking a violent and serious felony and empower law enforcement and prosecutors to more forcefully go after and punish perpetrators of this heinous crime.

SB 1042’s human trafficking solution is critically needed, which is why you would expect the appointed Attorney General to be out front and supportive of this attempt to more effectively address human trafficking. Yet, where is AG Rob Bonta on this important bill? Silent.

Check out some videos I released in the past few days talking about this issue:
---
| [ ](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=07506c2681&e=94837ebab3 "WTF #11 — A Solution to Combat Human Trafficking #shorts")
---
| [ ](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=45a3deb178&e=94837ebab3 "California Human Trafficking Bill SB 1042 — Where are you AG Bonta?")
---
| [ ](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=59f769240b&e=94837ebab3 "Does AG Bonta stand with victims? #sb1042 #shorts")
---
| Unfortunately, AG Bonta’s inaction is another example of his failed leadership and all-talk-no-action administration.

In alliance with the other Let ‘Em Go Guys (LA DA George Gascon and SF DA Chesa Boudin), AG Bonta talks the big talk on combatting human trafficking, but when it comes to walking the walk and supporting SB 1042, he is Missing in Action.
---
|
---
| I am calling on AG Bonta to join me in supporting SB 1042.

If AG Bonta doesn’t want to do his job and continues to be a Let ‘Em Go Guy, then we need to let him go and bring in someone like myself who will do the job and stand up for human trafficking victims.

Sincerely,

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |
---
| [Donate to Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=c9ebe810b7&e=94837ebab3 "Donate to Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022")
---
| | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
FPPC ID 1437955

You can [update your preferences](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=eb3e142dba) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=eb3e142dba).

We’re just not where we wanted to be. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk4efJOO6MrdgDkhpc6u4KC-Vp2T9dwzDoT8SAnhKYzY_zrRwjZgPfGSiPd_JT7usY_kkyViVs5xbuh4HgVPjdFIMFBXIEiNL3bgMRG_qFxIPrRRL4edmi-aGFN0rsIfv8KmIv2LOv9nTRt0gpJXh3gs88Ca6g-3qLcnrtuKeb_2jl7WWcJDd1UzYgfoREIJ76IcWsHYkKpXsUpw6KT-_xnht2WRY9U2j1ztmScxWeg63OVJfcRegEpUaS3lgvaHyYtW39SSvGBUa5F3uJznzHBA/3kg/kdxEIpONTfic_q2hJGA2Ww/h0/wqmtffYVDDM8GlfIf_gIyTcGkyr01B5fYn2cpkUnfd0) Dear Team, This is tough, but as we approach the end of the week, we have to admit that we are not where we need to be on fundraising. Our opponent has unleashed an onslaught of corporate money, and the truth is, we just haven’t been able to keep up. It’s sad to say, but when you are a corporate funded politician like Danny Davis, it doesn’t really matter that the price of gas is prohibitively high and regular people are just barely getting by. **Corporations always have some cash on reserve to fund their own priorities, and corporate politicians like Danny Davis are more than happy to cash the check.** Our campaign depends on regular people—people dealing with inflation, and spending hundreds of dollars every week just to drive to work—making an average donation of $46. We are so tired of accepting the status quo, but if you're able to pitch in, Friend, you can help us make up the gap. [**We need 152 people to donate $46 in order to catch up before the end of March. Can you chip in $46 or $3 or $7 to help us stay in this race?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESgPu-7WUcQ2PHiNpdOoOfE9yX4YWI-JSuoIBamhxLgn0maIQhfxRh0euLOAi_pHtZvvKc4hvWYSe2QDSiJZj20G7yjc6rSkPb3K8vjYrrVPneWXE1s1XAYqAeKmBVtKri7X0IhLEpeITqLqmKacoRsgEe0uF7sMs3bJif7WThuV5Mg8kwpIMh6gHrSvtDxkg66hXvl2OK_FNBrxiGPIw8njBCVg1af56yN5PTcC6oAVqMQrksKJjx9cNqFPd9vdv7vc2DnvEnorxZM3P91jY9Mvwa6RpM7vfeLZgMhVmZZvCpsE_rpVY_xPLV6Vtp90uRJnSV5Dd0RilZp-Nb8bBElHKQLLC8UsAPfvhtzqFxE8U/3kg/kdxEIpONTfic_q2hJGA2Ww/h1/9Wmmr7LXED26aYZKXaFBJidwxRZmMmnJCCaxSZa2l1k) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESVSQSD1BruFtnuo1cihxIIvbRRqiG6zHyJ-58w2YSKA4dPsgWDM8E8y8mn2Xi81gq_xStzxExnMVFEu5e4_jWug6qar0W0J6D0q9Pndshc_fy_SeIFr3PZHmLUMC61oRq9gDjskcg73CZb9Fhd8KM5HRpCucHAIinuD-dgRbh1XgRgwujhS8_loV5x6frSbaj5JykvliIazv7PwlMXv0BOajt-VLNQM2GDdMnYHyQmu_cpX6JzokgxTSeDz023HtftFa80mVnGRV4GBapfJRRL38-cbeEd2CgnmuFGguz3YNMEUizhxbomn6YcN0mMKXwq5rSbornw_GagJenBxsopiBZ42zXI-4Hhr2wKrdLrAs/3kg/kdxEIpONTfic_q2hJGA2Ww/h2/q8jufupVCiCB5Ht75t9kBReAayZsIgbgHag6RiQ8bTo) At a time when making ends meet is harder than it’s been in years, representatives like Danny Davis should be focused on our community’s struggle, but instead they just focus on a steady flow of corporate cash. **We are frustrated, we are worn out, and we are done waiting. We need leaders who stand up for people, not profits, and who govern with a clear understanding of who they represent: the people.** [**Help us make up our fundraising gap by chipping in $46 today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESQk_E-gHSNxtr1cFTksvF6nSFBJcvQXFE-S_QNE_jfi4CoCHBDlofX2pLYJnN7akEO5ycWN-wxtCfYCDbB4jxXUKPccBYvhIkascRceUkqJp949Xx5Riywg5t213GWiblFJr5GTxoXiiuYP_ByidvfGAM4cjhTiwP8igKC8BsPlnB8ZpPHsysbHas1cm8W-NDHTnC3AR22bbrMh9O079zOnEB_15W8kqkd4mGmUoCcLZ25fO2G9JiccoARdTlrJeMgINq8rwPTonpnFPetuGl1vGaFfqXFZxU-aEN651sfeY587qWeZjL8GSBS841z5p6p1wV-9bHuK7kZF_OK0OMPe3L17-gKDNa5MVDzs5ysO4/3kg/kdxEIpONTfic_q2hJGA2Ww/h3/KSo4WJnqipIcKLQdnK6jogkOngqYu9yuo0LzkCe9CuI) Thank you, Team Kina

We need someone who's focused on solving problems, not scoring points. It would mean a lot, Kathleen Brown Democrat TX-13 | "Chip in!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. ###
**-****INDems Hail Successful Statewide Jobs Tour: Fifth Tour in Less Than a Year**** - ** As promised, Indiana Democrats have gotten to work. And at the end of this week, the State Party celebrated the success of “The Jobs Tour”, a statewide effort to share how Hoosier Democrats - not Republicans - are responsible for the brighter economic future for families and communities across the state. Thanks to the [American Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122295/335811595/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) and [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122296/335811596/2091091387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), Democrats like U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank J. Mrvan secured total funding for the state’s READI program, more than $900 million of state construction projects, and transformational investments that will expand broadband internet access, revitalize water systems, fix community infrastructure needs, and repair crumbling roads and bridges across Indiana. **Democrats created this brighter economic future for Hoosier families when it mattered most.** “The Jobs Tour” continued the Indiana Democratic Party’s commitment to meet voters and families where they are. Last year, the state party held over 60 events in more than 55 counties via its [American Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122297/335811597/1104149896?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), [American Jobs Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122298/335811598/350200736?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), redistricting, and “[Small Town, Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122299/335811599/991420763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” tours. By the end of the 2022 election year, Indiana Democrats will have held campaign events in every one of the state’s 92 counties. Every community and county matters, and Democrats are ready to share how they delivered and stood by Hoosier families - regardless of region or political opportunity. Republicans, Democrats kick off election year in Cass County_ **\- 92 to Win: Our 92 County Plan to Mobilize Hoosier Voters -** 92 to Win is the Indiana Democratic Party’s new 92 county mobilization program. If the Indiana Democratic Party wants to send more Hoosier Democrats to Indianapolis and Washington, then it’s time to mobilize voters across all of Indiana’s 92 counties. **This program is focused on a three-part strategic plan to grow and mobilize the Democratic base in Indiana.**
1. Make sure every eligible Hoosier is registered to vote.
2. Engage, organize, and mobilize Democrats across Indiana.
3. Increase Democratic turnout in all 92 counties in the 2022 midterm elections and beyond.

The team at the Indiana Democratic Party is focused on building a strong, successful, and sustainable organization that mobilizes voters across the state to elect more Democrats at the local, state, and federal levels. The Indiana Democratic Party is starting to ramp up organizing efforts in counties across the state – and 92 to Win is the first step. **It’s going to take support from all 92 to win.** **-****Indiana GOP Brags About “F” Rated Workforce in Latest Unemployment Report****- ** This week, Indiana Democrats also criticized the Indiana Republican Party for [celebrating a state economy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122309/335811609/-1120523388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) that’s leaving Hoosier workers behind. [In the latest state jobs report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122310/335811610/65267242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), the Department of Workforce announced 61.9% of Indiana’s workforce has a job. This figure falls behind the national average, and it exposes the Indiana GOP’s economic agenda that’s delivered only low-wage jobs for Hoosier families. **In fact, many[economic experts confirmed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122311/335811611/1011540309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) Indiana is falling behind due to the Indiana Republicans’ culture wars on the economy and against organized labor. ** Since passing so-called “right to work” legislation in 2012, Indiana’s workforce has dropped to a [“F” rating](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122312/335811612/1944698831?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) and many “[good jobs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122313/335811613/-1771623567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” have left the state. Further, the Indiana GOP continues to target unions. U.S. Senator Todd Young sent [a letter to the Biden Administration](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122314/335811614/361395013?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) calling on the government to dissolve project labor agreements (PLA) connected to infrastructure projects paid for by the American Rescue Plan and The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (The Jobs Act). Statehouse Republicans replicated this effort with House Bill 1269 during the 2022 session. Organized labor is the backbone of Indiana’s workforce, and the Republicans’ partisan agenda to drive down wages only diminishes the future of our families and the state itself. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats are delivering for the Hoosier worker. Since the start of 2021, the American Rescue Plan has created more than 67,000 jobs - including about 26,000 new businesses started across Indiana. Many of these new jobs are union and provide a livable wage for workers. Simply put: Indiana Democrats value organized labor and the Hoosier worker while the Indiana GOP’s culture wars have diminished the state’s economic future.
**\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues -** It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats is continuing its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “[The Hoosier Promise](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122315/335811615/-1920848487?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** _Regional Organizing Directors_ The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122316/335811616/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) _Spring and Summer Interns_ The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

#### _Intern Duties_
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
_Qualifications_
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### _How to Apply_
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). **\- Opportunities -** **\- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #2 -** [Monday, March 21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122317/335811617/-1986106239?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), 6 - 7:30 PM EST **\- INDems: “The 2022 Crossroads Summit” for county parties and candidates -**
**Join INDems for our[2022 Crossroads Summit on Saturday, April 2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43122318/335811618/884541636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4Yjk0Ni1mZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6aHfRlTQkHnf9nP5c8qAoCV7qg9uu0PTvoE_nzCezg=&emci=54fbca33-f0a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ed8b946-fea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) in Indianapolis for a day-long training for party leaders and candidate campaigns. ** ###

clean_body: | -INDems Hail Successful Statewide Jobs Tour: Fifth Tour in Less Than a Year - As promised, Indiana Democrats have gotten to work. And at the end of this week, the State Party celebrated the success of “The Jobs Tour”, a statewide effort to share how Hoosier Democrats - not Republicans - are responsible for the brighter economic future for families and communities across the state. Thanks to the and , Democrats like U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank J. Mrvan secured total funding for the state’s READI program, more than $900 million of state construction projects, and transformational investments that will expand broadband internet access, revitalize water systems, fix community infrastructure needs, and repair crumbling roads and bridges across Indiana. Democrats created this brighter economic future for Hoosier families when it mattered most. “The Jobs Tour” continued the Indiana Democratic Party’s commitment to meet voters and families where they are. Last year, the state party held over 60 events in more than 55 counties via its , , redistricting, and “” tours. By the end of the 2022 election year, Indiana Democrats will have held campaign events in every one of the state’s 92 counties. Every community and county matters, and Democrats are ready to share how they delivered and stood by Hoosier families - regardless of region or political opportunity. Here’s a sampling of coverage Democrats earned during the “Jobs Tour”: : Mrvan kicks off Indiana Democratic Party ‘Jobs Tour’ in Merrillville : Democrats to highlight jobs, infrastructure at tour stop : Local Democrats discuss job creations for Greater Lafayette : Southern Indiana Democrats tout benefits of federal stimulus for region : Democrats try to turn national legislation into local momentum : Indiana Dems 'Jobs Tour' comes to Kokomo : Brett Voorhies, Ray McCormick, Ryan Hatfield, Zac Heronemus To Continue “The Jobs Tour” In Evansville : Democrats stress importance of federal dollars in creating jobs : Republicans, Democrats kick off election year in Cass County \- 92 to Win: Our 92 County Plan to Mobilize Hoosier Voters - 92 to Win is the Indiana Democratic Party’s new 92 county mobilization program. If the Indiana Democratic Party wants to send more Hoosier Democrats to Indianapolis and Washington, then it’s time to mobilize voters across all of Indiana’s 92 counties. This program is focused on a three-part strategic plan to grow and mobilize the Democratic base in Indiana. 1. Make sure every eligible Hoosier is registered to vote. 2. Engage, organize, and mobilize Democrats across Indiana. 3. Increase Democratic turnout in all 92 counties in the 2022 midterm elections and beyond. The team at the Indiana Democratic Party is focused on building a strong, successful, and sustainable organization that mobilizes voters across the state to elect more Democrats at the local, state, and federal levels. The Indiana Democratic Party is starting to ramp up organizing efforts in counties across the state – and 92 to Win is the first step. It’s going to take support from all 92 to win. -Indiana GOP Brags About “F” Rated Workforce in Latest Unemployment Report- This week, Indiana Democrats also criticized the Indiana Republican Party for that’s leaving Hoosier workers behind. , the Department of Workforce announced 61.9% of Indiana’s workforce has a job. This figure falls behind the national average, and it exposes the Indiana GOP’s economic agenda that’s delivered only low-wage jobs for Hoosier families. In fact, many Indiana is falling behind due to the Indiana Republicans’ culture wars on the economy and against organized labor. Since passing so-called “right to work” legislation in 2012, Indiana’s workforce has dropped to a and many “” have left the state. Further, the Indiana GOP continues to target unions. U.S. Senator Todd Young sent calling on the government to dissolve project labor agreements (PLA) connected to infrastructure projects paid for by the American Rescue Plan and The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (The Jobs Act). Statehouse Republicans replicated this effort with House Bill 1269 during the 2022 session. Organized labor is the backbone of Indiana’s workforce, and the Republicans’ partisan agenda to drive down wages only diminishes the future of our families and the state itself. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats are delivering for the Hoosier worker. Since the start of 2021, the American Rescue Plan has created more than 67,000 jobs - including about 26,000 new businesses started across Indiana. Many of these new jobs are union and provide a livable wage for workers. Simply put: Indiana Democrats value organized labor and the Hoosier worker while the Indiana GOP’s culture wars have diminished the state’s economic future. \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats is continuing its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year. \- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring - Regional Organizing Directors The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, We had another great week for Jane’s campaign for U.S. Senate. The campaign released its latest ad showing that Jane will tackle the issues Ohioans care about, we received another county party endorsement, and Jane continued to show why she’s the workhorse in this race with events across the state. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Crackdown** On Tuesday, the campaign released our latest ad and second broadcast TV ad of the cycle. The ad takes aim at the illegal immigration crisis at our Southern Border. As a U.S. Senator, Jane will finish President Trump’s wall and end the flood of illegal drugs fueling Ohio’s opioid epidemic. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=SAzKiAYN6N9RkOzhXRJWI8UrpxUlf9Vmd70EUWc0152sXAKACUlgJBrYmzJOSyAT-gIIM05xpwxyX5ZXP3iE8Smb9o5s68rabCofCAHOo5qc0yS6ZNo6YNBRF-VeiA4BjFBxSeBUReoUQfvDdmiJBzzZfaEFygMs2cSR9_EFhZbXH2My3u725s7P32e-xhMohWSLILQBAAi0baZd5uNXhzeOU3bx7vdGTtmF8A98_9AEa4jWkLIFs3fCNpV4jKaND6TB6H34dWHVLxEjZYepZRjk95qz1IOVNzLeHt-VFRE%3D)
**From the Trail**
Last Friday night, Jane connected with old friends at the Gallia County Lincoln Day Dinner in Vinton. It was great to see so many fired up conservatives!
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=SAzKiAYN6N9RkOzhXRJWI9CcPegS_yQcHN6gcfffH7gf99eluHoJPS6-KHJ74CkpAi0RUXmrpbbt6cj9uUfg-ytJGKREwBjOp9jcbyxuD2r7scHE12lxgXHcWTxqxhf1iWFKxET5boDBup3FB_u8vbmGz0sVnVQZkv_zWawl1iMG5httbl2Ayyz3XPHX7JL4OjEnwvzuYngBNR1WjZMqUX4pqmG6z2zuukErQr2uo02VynHEA57l8HtjcqjyIxR9Tg8_-a3e59rQvrLRO1CjSS2yGkO1Gg9t8UvajheASzXv93ESAI9OzY8JzAmi_VFDZBEO4A6ncbnYk5Vr_iDeyQ%3D%3D)
On Saturday morning, Jane attended the VFW Post 6878 Pancake Breakfast in Proctorville. It was great to see and thank our local veterans and all the great folks that support our VFW posts.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=SAzKiAYN6N9RkOzhXRJWI0NXiIv8J-AlhXFb-ZBsDyKbO2xmtoYMQcP9N2KX62mQ77SUv2MLWGTWTMptMR955lbVGEt7KtEkiZNrFR7PP0TWr9NoOLLFCjrLjmhpbxXPss_tbzUvAhY1ouOlx58QVnkPJwXT0rrrRon4eBdm2n2syxZEWkplnHHnhmTrSdk2FpbN2AV4G90Uuqu-jY45EGDvV3PuhIoFT-Ml9WXYqbZiy1TAdYtskukFuXBIsYPcd404kFwZoQNCC0aoyzYwBw%3D%3D)
Later that day, a great group of parents hosted Jane for another Parents First stop to discuss how our schools are losing focus on what really matters – the kids!
On Monday night, Jane joined the Stow Republican Club in Summit County. She shared her priorities as Ohio’s next Senator to fight for American jobs, a stronger border, and parents’ rights in education!
**Latest Endorsements**
Jane was proud to earn the endorsement of the Columbiana County Republican Party this week.

“...proud to endorse Jane Timken with an overwhelming 80% of the vote because we believe she has the strongest record of fighting for Ohioans and has the work-ethic, integrity and grit...”
**Early Voting Starts in Less Than Three Weeks**
We’re coming up on the end of the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate. In just 18 days, conservatives across Ohio will begin selecting their choice to represent our state for the next six years. Jane Timken is a mom on a mission to fight for the America First agenda and is our best chance to defeat Tim Ryan in November.

She can’t do this by herself though. We need you to join us for the final five weeks of this election. We have worked hard, but there is still much to do!

Sign up below to get involved with our get out the vote operation and Election Day Team! Our next Super Saturday is April 2nd. Jane and I will see you out there!
[**GOTV**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=SAzKiAYN6N9RkOzhXRJWIzpRqaQtQoQUH5Bz40rXO2MbRksWrfL2Pj2kGd189bQtwAJkGS8kRC3IPg7Myy1UsQ-4pZrWTwSZnbBYuv2KDdtyvEGxQUB-t6Kb4L0lzCjjKjWVM9tDOYIAJQJ9-Ma5OFHIT0vDaHoygGgigQDzXgcea1_qBieyAJgBKqZYEQBf7eMbBn3xGTPtaT5C-Jea4L4jI0163EALfe0qA-7ITOwRKnT-whPmc9yJEhOcUt4XYWRCDg-OUwOFoKYwgKn3nM4v-pQm30DSuGYmAS8jaXyypbV6mlUbXdA1HOirU4SWMh-E6xJauMz5xKrBrBtj8LImHWVMQh8qG3HUHQ5gYmQ%3D)
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio
Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_t=bh1IxnMsBTCjjBfajzi3srb1jn45QZiwXishGdoYTTn3P_G6yDEr_Eqv4E3ZAf2ld84God5WEj3VhId6hG3Oh6rHIBk-vJAGSUotyMRGel8FBo-bBb-t6xevRibfxmf5W_BP_iabAVQRSGcN-Jv7uEABSdpxO3KN_J809Fl1pMY%3D)
| [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=SAzKiAYN6N9RkOzhXRJWI0KKVgeRLgn137wmfZn8_4mHqGAiSBmTqoKSbP88WELMSG0ZKVhrlDrhK1YJXH7LBC2iMoNVUGSsgy7S0HBQ7aTMY_HDoEjsnJ-Lv1N23tpxq_yGRYPHrbF4B5N5FIUSxQURRWDTGHhOhWlIFBbHaDc4Kwmd9ervnt3X8Hj30xtWbfizKdSiCUNfdFy1LIh31Z2nxWeoqt1fH4GOsOt8vTd-_9zvN7D_tyD9qo1yZldAF_zWqqmUHv3NAF78-4jlyKRdGa6V2W81noGYIdeqOuk%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=0fce9fbb7b9f49d2bc962c717a76d333&_e=LwOpRRtsnS-CyQV4HK9I6nS9JaiUNkyax9sHGhfbUcwldBtzEuS50Xb3wc_wUeJZ7Co97PP3WkFsPfZpnLgG3L1RF8P88mCpPd0r344bnK0UyQdajyk0kQlSauFAuCSSDOPIN9UYrEHU07aDuIk5U9DJiXM6meiZPBYvumKauLkeKJGLYcrQ0s55B4ctFKJeqh6kgqLXuan_ea9YphsE_ey1dZp1wBDOfDgbwmMmFgRR-zufvREFirJLfFiPTV0d4fvkSW3_w0cn2azO4BMDxg%3D%3D)

name: Morgan Harper
subject: A new GOP front runner, a new offensive comment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Mike Gibbons is just the latest GOP candidate to do something offensive.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220318-816-footer-ak&t=2&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)
It’s a day that ends in Y, so you can bet one of the Republican candidates for this Senate seat has done or said something terrible again.
Mike Gibbons, a self-funding financier who’s now one of the leading contenders for the Republican nomination to represent Ohio in the Senate, **employed a litany of offensive stereotypes about Asian people in a podcast interview that just resurfaced.**
Over and over in this interview, Gibbons cited a widely discredited book to make offensive comments about Chinese people and other Asian people, attributing any success among Asian people to racial tropes that have long been trademarks of anti-Asian racism.
**[We cannot allow someone with such ignorant and racist views to represent our state in the Senate. Can you rush a contribution to our campaign to help us fight back against this kind of hate?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29586?t=27&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29592?refcode=em20220318-816&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=46&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)**
I can’t believe I have to say it, but being a racist multi-millionaire doesn’t qualify you to represent people in the U.S. Senate.
We need a Senator who cares about our communities and EVERYONE within them. We need a Senator who’ll fight for working people, especially right now when we need it most. **And most of all we need a Senator who won’t try to divide us based on what we look like, where we come from, or how much money we have.**
**[Our diversity – and having the power of the people on our side – is what makes us stronger. Can you chip in today to our grassroots campaign?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29586?t=47&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)**
Now more than ever, I proudly stand with our Asian-American friends, family, and neighbors and I hope Mike Gibbons apologizes for his hateful and offensive comments – it’s the least he can do.
Thank you,
Morgan

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220318-816-footer&t=48&refcode2=816_90090_Ogy2VS&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=49&akid=816%2E90090%2EOgy2VS)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Thank you, Morgan | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Biden is giving the world to China
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Our rulers are malicious idiots | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066237?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=634ab4e001&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

America is losing her place on the world stage.

In its blind hatred of Russia, the Biden Regime has made a series of incalculably stupid moves that have—in the span of less than 2 weeks—put our country in the _weakest_ position it’s been in history.

The world’s biggest oil producers are now conducting business in Chinese Yuan instead of American Dollars.

Saudi Arabia and the UAE refused to even pick up the phone when our illegitimate “President” Joe Biden called.

The Saudis are meeting with Xi in a few weeks.

Russia and China are now entangled in an unbreakable economic alliance.

Even India, China’s ancient enemy, is being pushed into China’s arms.

_The rest of the world is moving on, building a new global order without America in it._

World leaders know that Joe Biden is senile, and they know that he was not legitimately elected.

They don’t respect him. Why should they?

_Even foreign criminals don’t fear the U.S. Government anymore._

Just this week, a Mexican drug cartel shot up the outside of a U.S. Consulate just miles away from the Texas border.

**Our criminal, decadent Ruling Class is intentionally destroying the Dollar—and with it, our economy.**

_Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to afford basic necessities. It’s only going to get worse with these fools in charge._

**_We have to replace THEM before they replace US._**

[Replace Do-Nothing America Last RINOs like my opponent with an American Nationalist.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8409a6d0f9&e=eda539b26b)

**[_I will IMPEACH our treasonous, senile, illegitimate "President" and his bimbo sidekick_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d4ef192619&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=17d2ea7c65&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9354f4e920&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=df3dcfcb10&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

subject: [Action needed] Tell Congress: Defend reproductive rights now

body:
Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America.
#
_Content Warning: This email discusses dehumanizing attacks on reproductive freedoms. If you don’t want to read about that right now, please skip this email._
---
Derek,
**Extreme attacks on reproductive rights are escalating nationwide.**
→ A GOP Texas lawmaker introduced a bill to allow for the death penalty for people who have abortions
→ The Idaho legislature copied and passed Texas’ draconian six-week abortion ban
→ A Missouri lawmaker introduced a first-of-its-kind bill that would make it illegal to help someone travel out-of-state to receive abortion care
It’s unacceptable.**The right to abortion is fundamental and sacred.** Not just in Pennsylvania, but across America. That’s where John has stood since Day 1.
But we need Democrats in Washington to act _now_. [** _Will you sign our petition demanding Congress act to defend reproductive freedom nationwide?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/repro_rights_email?source=em20220318-5032&t=1&akid=5032%2E434096%2Egpf6zx)
**[Sign Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/repro_rights_email?source=em20220318-5032&t=2&akid=5032%2E434096%2Egpf6zx)**
If Democrats in the House and Senate acted in unison, they could reform the filibuster and clear the way for the passage of bills like the _Women's Health Protection Act_ that would protect reproductive freedom nationally.
Derek, John has never wavered on this: Send him to the U.S. Senate, and he will NOT hesitate for a second to protect abortion access and pass the kinds of bold legislation that would transform our country.
**[But until then, it’s on us to build grassroots pressure on Congress to take action. Add your name to tell Democrats to immediately enact federal protections for reproductive rights »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/repro_rights_email?source=em20220318-5032&t=3&akid=5032%2E434096%2Egpf6zx)**
**[Sign Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/repro_rights_email?source=em20220318-5032&t=4&akid=5032%2E434096%2Egpf6zx)**
It’s painful to watch states pass regressive anti-woman abortion bans like the ones we're seeing in Texas, Idaho, and Missouri. Thank you for joining us as we do everything in our power to fight back.
Keep fighting,
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220318-5032-footer&t=5&refcode2=5032_434096_gpf6zx&akid=5032%2E434096%2Egpf6zx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Very proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Friends and supporters: **I was just with President Biden as he signed my bipartisan Dr. Lorna Breen Health Care Provider Protection Act into law.** This legislation is incredibly close to my heart because it works to reduce and prevent suicide, burnout, and mental and behavioral health conditions among health care professionals. The bill was named in honor of Dr. Lorna Breen, a physician from Charlottesville, Virginia who was working on the front lines of the pandemic in New York and died by suicide in the spring of 2020. Today I want to thank Lorna’s family for all of their advocacy on this issue; it’s with their support that we’ve been able to make this meaningful progress. As we began to navigate the COVID-19 pandemic, it was quickly clear that its mental health consequences are particularly acute for frontline health care healers, who’ve made tremendous sacrifices to care for their patients in uncharted times. It’s with this in mind that my health care policy advisors and I have been working on this legislation and urging my colleagues in Congress to prioritize it. This bill is a critical first step to provide our healers with mental health resources to cope with the challenges they face every day -- and supporting our health care workforce will benefit everyone, because we all need great medical professionals to take care of us and our loved ones. By keeping our health care professionals healthy, everyone in society wins -- so I hope you’ll join me in taking a moment today to acknowledge this victory. Thanks for everything you do to support this important work, from reading these emails, to donating when you can, to volunteering in your neighborhood. It does make a difference. -Tim Kaine

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia
P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bb1bff63-01a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/383f0231-02a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODNmMDIzMS0wMmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWQ6rU_RoIMccMMPRN7OPRnDlNCN7akb5VlaXVJ8KSM=&id=103724877).

subject: Are You Against Freedom?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
body:
We Cannot Let Oregon Fail | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon.com/champion-for-everyone-15333508?e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| | [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=3aca4d630c&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| | Peter,

**Oregonians need a change of pace. **Anti-business policies punish workers. Progressive tax policies punish workers. America Last policies punish all of us. Not surprisingly, Democrats continue telling Oregonians what they should care about. **No more.**

This sordid state of affairs in our state and country has unleashed my servant spirit to improve conditions for the communities in Oregon which I call home. I will look my opponents straight in the eye while standing against policies which violate freedoms, burden hard-working taxpayers, disregard the sanctity of life, and threaten the safety of living in our communities.

As a candidate I work on many important policy issues and legislation daily! Recently I spent time learning about policy and legislation for the unborn and newly born. Last year, Oregon Democrats defeated a bill that would have protected the lives of **babies born after an attempted abortion.** This is HOMICIDE! As your Congresswoman, I will fight for the sanctity and respect of life for young and old and everyone in between. YOU deserve to have excellent representation against HORRIBLE legislation on every level!
---
| [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=c2314b7c3c&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| Are you willing to support a battle-tested leader who will champion the sanctity of life and God-given freedoms for all ages?

Defending the sanctity of life, preserving our borders, slashing unfair tax rates, revamping the economy, reducing our national debt, and preserving Oregonians’ constitutional freedoms is just scratching the surface on how I intend to serve as your next Congresswoman.

Will you help me restore common sense governance in our state? We cannot let Oregon fail by allowing the disastrous Radical Left agenda to endure any longer!
** AMY IN CONGRESS MEANS PROGRESS**
A donation of [_**$250**_](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=6e21aee50e&e=36bbc8e2ca), [_**$100**_](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=d6f3c9d13a&e=36bbc8e2ca), [_**$50**_](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=cc48b0a925&e=36bbc8e2ca), [_**$25**_](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=80a4a366d9&e=36bbc8e2ca), or even [_**$15**_](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=46a8e33006&e=36bbc8e2ca) will help my grassroots campaign give the Radical Left in Washington D.C. a notice of dismissal from _**We The People!**_
---
|
---
| In Liberty,

Amy Ryan Courser

_Republican Candidate for Congress, OR-06_
_Former City Councilwoman of Keizer, OR
Small Business Owner
Wife, Mother, and Grandma
Patriot and Conservative_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Roger Stone just endorsed my leading GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=124%2E5257348%2EYTDnpj ]Adam Schiff for Congress

The QAnon crowd is up to their usual bile, and Trump’s former political
advisor Roger Stone just endorsed the leading GOP candidate in our race.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220318_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=124_5257348_YTDnpj&akid=124%2E5257348%2EYTDnpj ][IMG]

“She’s a true America First candidate, and she’s running against that odious
piece of crap, Adam Schiff.”

– Roger Stone’s endorsement of the leading GOP candidate in my district

This foreshadows the smear campaign that I will have to endure, and the
vitriol people in my district are going to be seeing from now until
November — including tens of thousands of new voters in the new portions
of our district who I haven’t introduced myself to yet.

Roger Stone was integral to Donald Trump's political rise. He advised him
to tap into racist ideologies, delve into conspiracies, and his links to
Russia and other dark forces have been well documented. He also lied to
Congress and tried to incriminate others into lying — to the Intelligence
Committee which I chair — and in fact, was convicted of doing so. (Then
pardoned by Trump, of course.)

My last Trumpist opponent raised over $4 million against me. The fact
Stone is already touting my leading GOP opponent is a chilling sign of the
dirty money and political dirty tricks that are still to come – and we
must be ready to combat the lies and smears.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220318_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=124_5257348_YTDnpj&akid=124%2E5257348%2EYTDnpj ]Will you pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 to my campaign right now? It’s
going to take a lot of resources to ensure voters in my district know the
truth about my record and service. Not the lies that have already begun to
flow into my race from the likes of Roger Stone.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:
