body:
My Friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer My Friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer |
---
Peter,

My friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer, is stepping up to help Conservatives across America Fire Nancy Pelosi, and she is starting right here in Oregon. **[Today, I am reaching out to you to ask for your support of Lori’s fight.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=73f754f57c8847369bbfb9f277798401&_e=nw_2l6xfCDYMutEJoy0FH2KZc9VoXVXa-suQ0UlXJwUIXfA1RMaEa5Jsl_VfBcPqbBVDGpl_4dcnahwEDBrWOy5_yFlVJO2HkiS5wYyuhzxtBhdrJrHfiDLAlBQcxDFjH_FnbuIrvVGrfkiVUdxNqpt8kpPHViHw8auEzGncn9SXg7S1MAiu3OAAG7CdTOK5tL_ZOc_nm_QUZmk0cWdh0G-ARA_wn2nNKV-Z36hqZ0cy6zhr104IwKL4nAkz7VYsDsNQumrNY8EzyXb93S_1UAOzGA6pKqAludkyb40XR41oJeqTbgr9CfZyHgHA55eNldkWhq8jyKaeibg5YY2dsg4tBpKfVhB55RCrrnvCH9-7OqYP4-zDGN5G4YzczYHEpg7fNXKrMsg7TDDBXofdUkjyMJf7bmn1RJ1Mb1M4RCqd0gtvXpS1vOXWrGs9msdA)**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=73f754f57c8847369bbfb9f277798401&_e=nw_2l6xfCDYMutEJoy0FH2KZc9VoXVXa-suQ0UlXJwUIXfA1RMaEa5Jsl_VfBcPqbBVDGpl_4dcnahwEDBrWOy5_yFlVJO2HkiS5wYyuhzxtBhdrJrHfiDLAlBQcxDFjH_FnbuIrvVGrfkiVUdxNqpt8kpPHViHw8auEzGncn9SXg7S1MAiu3OAAG7CdTOK5tL_ZOc_nm_QUZmk0cWdh0G-ARA_wn2nNKV-Z36hqZ0c5ORAdC6ZeElEoywqOj-mKbyWwY8lvlsLAGPo2tQuaTO8uR4HH0rKenR5uv6KPlacq-T3OaSk9Q63RZhAN7VZYfODTG-AlXCfYTel51yCR6E6dAqex2e5-pxVevkT8SoqJBUYdsxMGu_JgmwIhlLIt7lz2qxw9aA9BofRUQc45EKiPchQSB67sgJQJfMnhWlOqxT3giiSt_O6sHU66HXr2)
There is no doubt about it. The Leftists in Congress have been leading our Nation down a dark and destructive path. They’ve stripped Americans of our freedom through their unscientific COVID lockdowns and vaccine mandates. They’ve led an economy marked by skyrocketing inflation, limited access to goods, and stagnant wages. They abandoned our allies in the Middle East.

Now, they are quite literally leading us into World War III as Russia pushes forward with their invasion of Ukraine.

**[We have to stop Joe Biden](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=73f754f57c8847369bbfb9f277798401&_e=nw_2l6xfCDYMutEJoy0FH2KZc9VoXVXa-suQ0UlXJwUIXfA1RMaEa5Jsl_VfBcPqbBVDGpl_4dcnahwEDBrWOy5_yFlVJO2HkiS5wYyuhzxtBhdrJrHfiDLAlBQcxDFjH_FnbuIrvVGrfkiVUdxNqpt8kpPHViHw8auEzGncn9SXg7S1MAiu3OAAG7CdTOK5tL_ZOc_nm_QUZmk0cWdh0G-ARA_wn2nNKV-Z36hqZ0c4QMw_Syo31fw06_cJx8re2Bg-aMLaljJzZnVx56_Yz75ktwkpnkLORhS5gm1vbq9dyaUh-WjrSKE2hvox7oxueSViKhi4CIMP6AVVcsGdpDS7EV4WnShcI0rInY4PZeosKEjDO1l-ATFstNFfevDtL9GuwDlSfSswHnfQQ3hIMDcq2moH-nRJ_HGCXEziIduqA2i0vRkr1Yeark-lA6af)** from making matters worse. The first step to making sure our country can recover from this presidency is to **Take Back the House.** We can’t afford an additional two-years of this Administration ruling without any accountability to the American people.

Lori Chavez-DeRemer is leading the charge. She fought for good governance here in Oregon while serving as Mayor of Happy Valley. **Now, she’s fighting for Conservative reform in Washington.**

**[Lori needs our support,](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=73f754f57c8847369bbfb9f277798401&_e=nw_2l6xfCDYMutEJoy0FH2KZc9VoXVXa-suQ0UlXJwUIXfA1RMaEa5Jsl_VfBcPqbBVDGpl_4dcnahwEDBrWOy5_yFlVJO2HkiS5wYyuhzxtBhdrJrHfiDLAlBQcxDFjH_FnbuIrvVGrfkiVUdxNqpt8kpPHViHw8auEzGncn9SXg7S1MAiu3OAAG7CdTOK5tL_ZOc_nm_QUZmk0cWdh0G-ARA_wn2nNKV-Z36hqZ0cSNcj_ObOxy597DPjTIwmLsIjgmt-c0p9r4L4nMIz6lc_LGFZoRi73Sx43si6_e7hVo2bgCBbd2PMtmWsxYFmpRZ3wyCpgu3snzCY1XLfWnxOMCwAR76GciP93NAUKKA8Nq7jO7GMSUNPQDgpi3ihXV2OPO_seA3SS6X9iBev7eApY7DAyTFZ53xyw_XpVoJRr4yQL2J3fxMdIjSSaPab4)** that’s why I have committed a max-out donation to her campaign. She can’t do this alone, so she needs you to step up as well.

**[Please make a rushed donation TODAY. Without your support, we won’t have the votes in Congress to make sure Nancy Pelosi is removed as Speaker of the House.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=73f754f57c8847369bbfb9f277798401&_e=nw_2l6xfCDYMutEJoy0FH2KZc9VoXVXa-suQ0UlXJwUIXfA1RMaEa5Jsl_VfBcPqbBVDGpl_4dcnahwEDBrWOy5_yFlVJO2HkiS5wYyuhzxtBhdrJrHfiDLAlBQcxDFjH_FnbuIrvVGrfkiVUdxNqpt8kpPHViHw8auEzGncn9SXg7S1MAiu3OAAG7CdTOK5tL_ZOc_nm_QUZmk0cWdh0G-ARA_wn2nNKV-Z36hqZ0cqX9SSkXtWk1ksg-DzVx5yNV0At_mRFfgrf668nhyyeRbQ1mmWfqJkqEqjTL3xGRI8Bck6kSa4t_4Cjp4M1ip-Zfl-MncP07zrlRB3oArIZxO9NwD11jX-4iIzRumAr6rr4NIAfoaHb41D9SA8XIxDSHe4HFYREr9EsYoSLY5dZTMgfb8TY8nRPX6geAN8eHNMcSD-jJSeAnGb_MEPnHdV)**

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. clean_body: My Friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer My Friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer | Peter, My friend, Lori Chavez-DeRemer, is stepping up to help Conservatives across America Fire Nancy Pelosi, and she is starting right here in Oregon. There is no doubt about it. The Leftists in Congress have been leading our Nation down a dark and destructive path. They’ve stripped Americans of our freedom through their unscientific COVID lockdowns and vaccine mandates. They’ve led an economy marked by skyrocketing inflation, limited access to goods, and stagnant wages. They abandoned our allies in the Middle East. Now, they are quite literally leading us into World War III as Russia pushes forward with their invasion of Ukraine. from making matters worse. The first step to making sure our country can recover from this presidency is to Take Back the House. We can’t afford an additional two-years of this Administration ruling without any accountability to the American people. Lori Chavez-DeRemer is leading the charge. She fought for good governance here in Oregon while serving as Mayor of Happy Valley. Now, she’s fighting for Conservative reform in Washington. that’s why I have committed a max-out donation to her campaign. She can’t do this alone, so she needs you to step up as well. | For Oregon, For Freedom, For America, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. name: Team AOC
subject: What they’re not telling you about the price of gas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
As gas prices hit record highs, Big Oil is raking in windfall profits.
| Explainer: Oil Profiteering
---|---
We’re all hearing a lot about rising gas prices. This week, the retail cost of a gallon of gas at one point hit a record high of $4.43.1
But something strange is going on that too few in the media and in public office are talking about: _oil profiteering_.
## **Let us explain...**
You would think that the price of a gallon of gas is closely linked to the price of the barrels of crude oil used to make that gas. When Russia invaded Ukraine, the price of oil shot through the roof. That, in turn, sent gas prices upward.
**But this week we’ve seen a disconnect between the cost of oil and the retail cost of gas.** Take a look at this chart produced by the White House, showing numbers from Bloomberg News:
Oil prices dropped 30% this past week2, but gas prices largely stayed the same.
## **So, what gives?**
As the U.S. and other countries respond to Russian aggression in Europe, Big Oil is raking in record profits. They’re profiteering off of the war, using it as an excuse to gouge working families at the gas pump.
And this isn’t a new phenomenon**. Exxon, Chevron, Shell and BP alone raked in more than $75 billion in profit in 2021.** 3 Chevron called 2021 one of its “most successful years ever.” Shell’s CEO called 2021 a “momentous year.” And Big Oil producers are planning for an “even better” 2022 by their own accounts.4
## **We need consequences.**
There’s something fundamentally wrong when so much suffering felt by working people is accompanied by windfall profits for Big Oil executives and investors.
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is joining the growing chorus in Congress and the White House for accountability.5 Big Oil cannot continue to rake in massive profits while working families struggle to pay their bills.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/12199?t=1&akid=2876%2E2526796%2Ek98zGt)

* * *

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality and reverse the effects of climate change. Through a Green New Deal, we will reduce our greenhouse gas emissions and guarantee a high-wage job to everyone who wants one. And we’re not stopping there—our platform calls for federal limits on rent increases, transformative criminal justice reform, Medicare for All and tuition-free public college. Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220318?refcode=em20220318-2876-P_ENG_EXP_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2876_2526796_k98zGt&akid=2876%2E2526796%2Ek98zGt) **[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220318?refcode=em20220318-2876-P_ENG_EXP_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2876_2526796_k98zGt&akid=2876%2E2526796%2Ek98zGt)**
---

name: Team Samuels
subject: The facts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:

clean_body: My opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist and one of the most extreme Republicans running for Congress anywhere in the country. | = = Look, I’m sorry to be so abrupt. But my opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist and one of the most extreme Republicans running for Congress anywhere in the country. That’s why Donald Trump endorsed him. And we just found out he outraised us last quarter. He’s raised over $2,000,000 to defeat me. Look, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power my campaign. If we are going to start to close the gap between his campaign and ours, I need your help. = | = = = = = = The truth of the matter is that Derrick Van Orden is dangerous. He believes in lies -- including that the 2020 election was stolen -- and was on the grounds of the Capitol on January 6. But he’s a major threat -- he came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for Congress. So that’s why I need your help. I know with supporters like you by my side, I can defeat him and represent western Wisconsin with the dignity and respect it deserves. But we need to make sure we can compete with Derrick Van Orden’s resources. = Thanks for your help, Brad | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: What I'm fighting for...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
https://www.delinadisanto.com/ [https://www.delinadisanto.com/]
Hey friend, after talking with hundreds of Arizonans across the district, I know the people of AZ-01 deserve a strong leader who will stand up for them in Congress — not a corrupt representative who bows to party lines.
It's troubling to see people who still have no health insurance, who are rightfully concerned about our children and public school funding, and who are anxious about our environmental and water crisis. And with our state legislature seemingly moving Arizona backwards, we need leaders in Congress who will put working families first.
That's why as AZ-01's next Representative, I will:
✅Prioritize healthcare reform — whether that be taking on pharmaceutical companies or working to provide affordable healthcare options to all Americans.
✅Support our public school systems by funding professional wages to teachers and employing mental health professionals for our children.
✅Create green energy jobs in Arizona through wind and solar in order to curb climate change and boost our economy.
✅Fight for women's reproductive rights by passing federal legislation that protect a woman's right to choose
However, I need your support to make all of this a reality. Can you chip into my campaign as we work to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and finally unseat David Schweikert? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/delina_disanto_for_congress?refcode=X_031822_AZ_Issues&recurring=1]

name: Odessa Kelly
subject: If you think Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay”bill is bad –
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Tennessee’s restrictions would affect every student in public and charter schools from the day they enter kindergarten until graduation day. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-ZHPycvS09e_hXn0Vt7t_ANo5J5jxZ09OGA9fvYJBieCbd365JMwmvU9j69k9ASsP1Df_ZZtesTZm3gIWYxBqc-gH0OM50CSdJhVWDZ0wJ6vn4lGSFWPKrwZoRPMR5hwE3s0eU8ble-XSdvjbDW_ch8VAcx91QHNBLwjHszKP7FezfHFe1d-wF4oPPkRNlFlE7CA6zFqQ7T62eUnnnvXDI-BfX8P57G_aYHWSxRBJggRyMpMQ4wCCUEQMyLwL-y6qU/3kg/b2imR5gKR5aCy4SDbt6HRQ/h0/VtMBjq8wsxPCfceHTfq08rWSoOby21kWGvDoRGj2H6w) Peter, Right now, Tennessee lawmakers are considering a bill that’s even more far-reaching and restrictive than Florida’s Don’t Say Gay bill. ****While Florida’s bill — passed by the Senate just days ago — targets elementary students only, Tennessee’s restrictions would affect every student in public and charter schools from the day they enter kindergarten until graduation day.[**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiQMk_77hj8_W1qS-iNR63x3Hscj_uRBnq6QtyFAN98M5hBukQmW-YitpfAmyd9KAFV8XQSyKug76tOAtb-Cruk14wjPaawT1YP99WelOXCdpRHzxt-9Rs-qevrZG9gjTgxX0nIRKjJtrKILeEg8yV9zjxFUO0vAY2ySEELyjaMy2H2Ti1hpyEpiY3iH1evuGmAgc5xyAG9LLSuXAWZewTkDBmZs5GAIYT8EbnWhHwQLJwUHS61Nxvieq-HNTlSNgsjNjOvqbX6Ux1bhL2PpjKM7Ry7QMuOu3PAny8p5kcUKdFqyks0M_m7REOpFeUQWVvKtOfXvcOMrQFPhoMUfW9359phmVoELW7hcjv-nqO18m2yfEHOToM9zVnh7DkEka9/3kg/b2imR5gKR5aCy4SDbt6HRQ/h1/JZFPUfZRtcyMWeNuSkb952yZj9BfE_hbANhQgQ1_nF0)
Knows as HB 800, the Tennessee bill declares that schools _“shall not locally adopt or use in the public schools of this state, textbooks and instructional materials or supplemental instructional materials that promote, normalize, support, or address lesbian, gay, bi-sexual, or transgender (LGBT) issues or lifestyles.”_
[**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiCVoM6G4P-CZBKzA_oDkwXn2oeAR5_ZDubpsg_uH2Fd_e9D2_HtzgJgeDymmeh1R6peINoC55HVfV7skAPdi-QBhk4iZ2ZNpjYeMudIOSVucZiCtyn7il_zg4QX6gKrI9KnlvscCh7UuDL1JZgWNGHr23fREduu1ABMuKavZSk7dW6Y89HGY-g5ovY3glV0K73sjW3th34fjV7EeOmMkI7XzvpZv6mT7PrhLRuvpOay1gGEZk6rDMyjmQ6Do1mDwSRPElctTu4wuOii0fbi_jq97fN7Hj0lsbEAxVWiEXdpbgdRp0GAVaX8u0XDJE4_3_tewcaZhox4bsIl1AYHNWjh2PLOZpsuY5wF9CYNRoOTW7DJFn5t3e4loxnacsP56w/3kg/b2imR5gKR5aCy4SDbt6HRQ/h2/-Ws7Fi1fP9dMNdJHrCmIDNhWKyox0DD-opTCEVipkfs) [Fight Back »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmVPuPoW-CwDhuQO9a2meTZJLUF_ZCARDKsGDcAEPVlsnBG3k4-ayXTYn64dvU67u9sI8q6fTWgbsGauKmkZ3dcZjBNYLQBHO6F3q5LWodFfGLxx4dKonw49QxJuf5V_T1qFvKfyJFqzxdXpDf7dmW5aoOhmqVYK_Gj1LE790UssZQkg4TiiKWGripPZVDaTFuqlknSotmjX-GLeFM4zeklVq4jD3_etMI2Z6FFc5RGKEeKGmvalvC6kXJAWCZzhzO8j3cPBUMibzZWmKrIOdcsNcu3s-ssC37yfWwncR4d5T1EYFi8J2scl99OIzIGCOnz7FNcCGadAbQIGNjMibfqEbB7xoZOnYo2Q9732PHhCg/3kg/b2imR5gKR5aCy4SDbt6HRQ/h3/JHUAe8VsI6uP2mXiY-8OLM2dehPBMeiiZuxvncaqjPU) **In short, this law would ban even the mention LGBTQ+ persons or issues in the classroom.** Imagine a Tennessee where students from LGBTQ+ families would be discouraged from talking about their families in class. Where LGBTQ+ students would be pushed to keep their own identities secret. Where students just like me would get the message from their teachers, principles, and counselors that their identity is illegal.
We don’t have a moment to lose to fight back against this bill and ensure LGBTQ+ students in Tennessee can feel safe and accepted in the classroom. clean_body: Tennessee’s restrictions would affect every student in public and charter schools from the day they enter kindergarten until graduation day. | | | Peter, Right now, Tennessee lawmakers are considering a bill that’s even more far-reaching and restrictive than Florida’s Don’t Say Gay bill. **While Florida’s bill — passed by the Senate just days ago — targets elementary students only, Tennessee’s restrictions would affect every student in public and charter schools from the day they enter kindergarten until graduation day. Knows as HB 800, the Tennessee bill declares that schools “shall not locally adopt or use in the public schools of this state, textbooks and instructional materials or supplemental instructional materials that promote, normalize, support, or address lesbian, gay, bi-sexual, or transgender (LGBT) issues or lifestyles.” In short, this law would ban even the mention LGBTQ+ persons or issues in the classroom.** Imagine a Tennessee where students from LGBTQ+ families would be discouraged from talking about their families in class. Where LGBTQ+ students would be pushed to keep their own identities secret. Where students just like me would get the message from their teachers, principles, and counselors that their identity is illegal. We don’t have a moment to lose to fight back against this bill and ensure LGBTQ+ students in Tennessee can feel safe and accepted in the classroom. Thank you for taking action. In solidarity, Odessa Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

subject: Only 32% of people who gave last quarter have given this quarter

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2808%2E3611125%2E7z2Ybo ][IMG]

Folks,

I know we’ve sent a lot of emails asking for your donation lately, but
there’s a good reason:

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is less than 2 weeks away and we need 200
donors to chip in by midnight to stay on track to win this battleground
race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8968?t=1007&akid=2808%2E3611125%2E7z2Ybo ]This is our first deadline of 2022. We get no do-overs. No second
chances. So if you could chip in $25 or any amount, I’d really appreciate
it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8961?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2808%2E3611125%2E7z2Ybo ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8961?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2808%2E3611125%2E7z2Ybo ]Donate $50

It’s no secret that I’m a top target for Mitch McConnell and his dark
money buddies. The GOP can’t afford to lose a single seat if they want to
retake the Senate majority, and they thought Ohio was in the bag.

Now McConnell and his cronies are pissed because polls have me
neck-and-neck with every self-funding, Republican extremist they could put
up against me.

We have a real shot at flipping this seat blue, but we need to build the
biggest grassroots effort Ohio has ever seen to compete with the millions
of dollars Republicans are pouring into this race. Seriously, you can’t
sit this one out.

So far, only about 32% of the people who gave to our campaign last quarter
have given this quarter. We can’t let our grassroots momentum come to a
standstill right before our FEC report, especially when our numbers will
go public for everyone to see.

We have to pick up the pace, and that’s why I’m asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8968?t=1008&akid=2808%2E3611125%2E7z2Ybo ]will you please
make a contribution of $25 or any amount before midnight tonight? I
wouldn’t keep asking if it wasn’t so important.

Tim Ryan

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They just got caught interfering with the election!
body:
It only took two years, but Big Tech's war on "misinformation" has unequivocally been proven to be suppressing THE TRUTH!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)It only took two years, but Big Tech's war on "misinformation" has unequivocally been proven to be suppressing THE TRUTH!

During the 2020 Election cycle, Facebook and Twitter banned the sharing and distribution of an article by the _New York Post_ that exposed the contents of Hunter Biden's notorious laptop from hell.

If you were on social media at the time, you couldn't even talk about it without being censored!

But today, after the _New York Times_ published an article confirming everything that was part of the original _New York Post_ story in 2020, it's all of a sudden "safe" to discuss online and no longer deemed "misinformation" by the Big Tech tyrants.

Why is it suddenly safe today? Because Joe Biden isn't currently running against President Trump!

Big Tech's censorship is nothing more than election interference hidden behind the fake, altruistic purpose of "protecting the public".

Facebook, Twitter, Google, Apple and Amazon need to be held accountable in the courts and before Congress . . . **and you know that 's exactly what I'll do [when I get to Congress!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)**

**As the only deplatformed candidate in the nation,[when I win my race](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww), I'll be Big Tech's worst nightmare in Congress!**

We're less than two weeks away from the end of the first fundraising quarter of 2022, and I have another $24,000 to raise. [Will you chip in today so that we don't fall short?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)

Our costs are climbing as we bring on staff to implement our strong, grassroots ground game, and unlike most Congressional Districts in the nation, I'm up against a time crunch as thousands of the "Snow Bird" voters in my district will be heading back to the Northeast for the summer, which means I may not get a chance to meet them before they leave.

[Help me beat the clock by donating as much as you can today so that we can reach as many voters as possible.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m434WNr8892y763oMTIOPuV892Zg/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/Mu892eymKba6o7dWVYiOKlww)

body:
I am looking for dedicated high school and college students to join my campaign as Democracy Summer Fellows!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125384/335824845/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220318-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=)
---
| Hi,

**I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2022 National Democracy Summer School!** Developed by my colleague, Congressman Jamie Raskin, and expanded in partnership with the DCCC, this program is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of Democratic political activists, organizers, and leaders.

**As a part of this initiative, I am looking for dedicated high school and college students to join my campaign as Democracy Summer Fellows!** Selected Fellows will participate in an exciting online seminar and curriculum designed by Rep. Raskin focused on the history of social and political change in America and the progress of political democracy, while simultaneously training as organizers and volunteer activists with my reelection campaign here in California’s newly-drawn 51st Congressional District.

[_**If you know a student who may be interested in our Fellowship program, click here to find more information and access our application!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125385/335824846/-1273029967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=&emci=0c7c87c9-cfa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8154115f-0ba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14239920)
---
| [LEARN MORE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125386/335824847/-1273029967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=&emci=0c7c87c9-cfa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8154115f-0ba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14239920)
---
The theme of this year's academic seminar is “Political Democracy and its Enemies.”

Through the academic program, Fellows will learn from great activist heroes, both young and veteran political leaders, Democratic policy experts, and top political and community organizers across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II, Prof. Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. John Lewis, and dozens of other luminaries of change and progress.

Campaign fellows will work primarily on field work and voter outreach, helping us turn out voters to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Fellows will also have the opportunity to connect with voters to talk about the issues that matter most, network with business and community leaders from across the region, and work in an always exciting and dynamic environment.

**[_Additional information and the application for the Fellowship can be found here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125387/335824848/-1273029967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=&emci=0c7c87c9-cfa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8154115f-0ba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14239920) **The deadline to apply is April 20, 2022.

**If you know a student that may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email – this is an opportunity they won’t want to miss!**

If you are not a student but are excited about Democracy Summer, I hope you’ll consider supporting my campaign’s participation in this inspiring program and our efforts to galvanize a new generation of Democratic political organizers and leaders [_**with a contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125388/335824849/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220318-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43125389/335824850/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220318-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU0MTE1Zi0wYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yY-k6CROVXdIbanTCsvYT8FQgjPfIfeo882Pi28n4b4=)
---
I am so grateful to work with the next generation of changemakers.

Thank you,
Sara

* * *

subject: Back the blue
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6180429?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Have you seen the news?

SUNY Brockport – a school financed by YOUR tax dollars actually invited a convicted **cop killer **to speak to students.

Jalil Muntaqim murdered two NYPD police officers in cold blood. But SUNY Brockport and their unchecked liberal wokeness is calling him a “political prisoner”

Let’s get one thing straight right now. Even holding this event is a disgrace, but calling this violent cop killer a “political prisoner” is an insult to every brave man and woman who serves in our police forces.

SUNY Brockport has crossed an unthinkable line. At a time when violent crime and ambushes of police are skyrocketing in this nation – they are giving a platform to cop killers and letting them speak to students.

That’s why I took action this week.
**
I led the entire New York Republican Congressional Delegation in directly demanding that SUNY Brockport cancel this shameful event and apologize to the families of the cops murdered by Jalil Muntaqim and every law enforcement officer in our state. **

---
| [BACK THE BLUE](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=3889a54da8&e=13f35c4add "BACK THE BLUE")
---
|
I’m proud to back the blue, and I always will fight for those who fight for us. You have my word.

Best,
Chris Jacobs

---
| [DONATE HERE](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=87027d0c2b&e=13f35c4add "DONATE HERE")

My team has set a goal of bringing in 500 donations before the end of this week to push forward our work together. As of this morning, we're still 172 donations short. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, as always, for being a part of this movement. I'm so grateful that you're a part of this team. Very truly yours, Jay

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cbea602ded)

| | | | | | |

| | | | | | |

## Biden seems to be getting more and more confused...
Watch:
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Everyone Was Surprised By The Senate Passing Permanent Daylight Savings Time. Especially The Senators](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3af46487f8&e=f6564bbe3b) — via BuzzFeed NewsWell this explains a lot... [Biden’s timid leadership in Ukraine on full display in Poland MiG fiasco](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=985ba45831&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox NewsInteresting point by Tom Cotton — why are MiG-29s more provocative than missiles? [Russia has sanctioned Joe Biden, Hillary Clinton, Hunter Biden](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=38125c25cb&e=f6564bbe3b) — via BCC[Team Biden is ‘gaslighting’ on gas prices with #PutinPriceHike](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2e8ec7f028&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill, Joe Concha[NEW: Pfizer CEO says a fourth booster shot “is necessary” ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eb11069a4e&e=f6564bbe3b)\- via The HillAttn: Pfizer shareholders [GOP raises red flag on Supreme Court nominee’s Guantanamo work](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=844108a5fb&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill Biden’s Supreme Court nominee Ketanji Brown Jackson represented terrorists — how much will this play into her confirmation?[U.S. Republican senators say they will not support new Iran nuclear deal ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ae31bde624&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Reuters[NASA confirms U.S. astronaut will return with cosmonauts on Russian spacecraft later this month](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c3bfa5f186&e=f6564bbe3b) — Fox NewsThe Russians threaten to leave a US astronaut in space — proving the lengths Putin will go to[Jen Psaki’s excuse on ‘unused’ drilling permits is truly clueless](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=006011ea74&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Examiner
| | | | | | |
---
Last week I asked if Daylight Saving Time should be permanent most people voted [yes](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0fda2c7bfa&e=f6564bbe3b) for more daylight. Then...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=79a95ce6ea&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |

As the most **pro-life team** in Ohio’s governor race, my running mate, Joe Knopp, and I will make Ohio a **safe haven** for the unborn. Our State will prioritize and protect human life because we know that every life is a precious gift from God.

| | Dear Friends,

**As we enter the second half of this month I want to reiterate my continued deep gratitude for all the support I have received.** Your invaluable financial and grassroots assistance are the lifeblood of our campaign and moving forward that support will continue to be even more critical.

**Your support directly helps fund the work we are doing now and up until the primary.** My conversations with individuals throughout the state continue to reveal a deep dissatisfaction with leadership. From the state's housing and homelessness crises, to massive increases and gas prices and costs of goods, Oregonians are struggling and are in need of a change.

**My campaign needs your donation today.**[Your $10, $25, or $50 donation will be essential in acquiring the change Oregonians need and desire.](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b825608e19&e=7e91be8cad) Won't you chip in today?

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Why is the New York Times so offended?
body:
The failed New York Times is threatening to cancel me over comments about China I made almost a decade ago. So why are they attacking me now?
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0K5EhttEXJe7MxR-LjUy8Fki4v1IOvaI-cikRV0MHkWePifv0cnXYYcMK-DpOsFhbxp2U-DvsyqkICSjYH1aIgJU1AMRBcXEBpY4KeO08ArB53Wj0c3lHXrQzTiSBXcMATX0_OVzZE_9bq1OfS-GYlq8XVK5KIcSnSARNI8bsya1T_-vDTjGw==&c=P7Ruv6LWFnrbVIFT3vpxnFnqBBA0qeN6ajre6WhIgfgeGirzzk5Vww==&ch=MyjheP19V__crpC0ydTkj8zyLYmN3NHtnw5EdefLVPdvSkpz_3tobA==)
---
| Peter,
The failed New York Times is threatening to cancel me over comments about China I made almost a decade ago.
So why are they attacking me now?

1. Their illogical hatred of President Trump and anyone who supports his America-First policies.
2. I'm am the front runner in this race, and it scares them!

I have some news for the New York Times. They don't get to cancel me or the truth about China. Our campaign can't be bought and won't be silenced!
You can help me fight back, Peter, by sending an urgent donation to our campaign.
---
| | | [Click Here to Donate Today >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0K5EhttEXJe7MxR-LjUy8Fki4v1IOvaI-cikRV0MHkWePifv0cnXYYcMK-DpOsFhbxp2U-DvsyqkICSjYH1aIgJU1AMRBcXEBpY4KeO08ArB53Wj0c3lHXrQzTiSBXcMATX0_OVzZE_9bq1OfS-GYlq8XVK5KIcSnSARNI8bsya1T_-vDTjGw==&c=P7Ruv6LWFnrbVIFT3vpxnFnqBBA0qeN6ajre6WhIgfgeGirzzk5Vww==&ch=MyjheP19V__crpC0ydTkj8zyLYmN3NHtnw5EdefLVPdvSkpz_3tobA==)
---
| What did I say that offended them?
Like President Trump, I am willing to tell the truth about China.
Donald Trump was right when he said:
* COVID- 19 did come from China, and China's COVID cover-up cost lives around the world.
* The Chinese do steal intellectual property, cheat on trade deals, and destroy American jobs.
* The failed New York Times is a true ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE!

Donald Trump was absolutely right to stand up to them, and I will do the same in the Senate.
My goal is to raise $30,000 before the end of the month to secure our lead before the primary election. Can you please donate $20.22, $50, or even $100 today to help me reach our goal?
---
| | | [Donate $20.22 >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0K5EhttEXJe7MxR-LjUy8Fki4v1IOvaI-cikRV0MHkWePifv0cnXV_ryw1aTy8Eyt28WvH1df3I365p5Bs38QaeTFtw9N4fteDNNHdU2p6gb82-kfKEZlvpgpWt4qgnjLfMYCA9E18466h0DnPclbQGxruzzPw7QMawT1Ru7w9ESy2k5qcsk08AXS5QQuRsezi-nt-VgbM=&c=P7Ruv6LWFnrbVIFT3vpxnFnqBBA0qeN6ajre6WhIgfgeGirzzk5Vww==&ch=MyjheP19V__crpC0ydTkj8zyLYmN3NHtnw5EdefLVPdvSkpz_3tobA==)

body:
On Thursday, I held a press conference at the Idaho Capitol to introduce My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/03-18-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8ff40c7213&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| On Thursday, I held a press conference at the Idaho Capitol to introduce **My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho**. The full vision is available in this email and online at [MakeIdahoFreeAgain.com](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2ef02b39fd&e=823fa8e224). You can watch a video of my press conference below:
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=506baad58b&e=823fa8e224 "Janice McGeachin's Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho!")
---
Click above to watch the video
| |
## Update on Baby Cyrus Situation:
**Because of the grace of God and your prayers and support—Baby Cyrus is now home with his family!** Unfortunately, the fight is not over. The adjudicatory hearing is on April 8th, and if we don’t continue this fight, it is still possible for the state to take him away again! We will continue to monitor this situation and to seek nothing less than permanent reunification. Read more [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9cef619311&e=823fa8e224).
---
|
---
|
# My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho
1. Health Freedom
* End medical tyranny
* Prohibit medical mandates
* Prohibit experimental vaccines on our children
* Implement affordable free-market alternatives to Obamacare
* Investigate all arrests and enforcement actions for violating Little's lockdown
* Return the money that Idahoans were fined for violating Little's lockdown
* Rein in abusive overreach by CPS that violates constitutional and parental rights
2. Election Integrity
* Continue supporting a 50-state audit of the 2020 election
* Make Idaho a model state for election integrity
* Enact strict voter ID requirements
* Ensure accurate voter lists
* Guarantee Idahoans the right to vote in person
* Adopt tamper-proof paper ballots
* Prohibit federal interference in Idaho elections
3. Idaho's Economy
* Support small businesses
* Recognize that ALL businesses are essential
* Eliminate the corporate income tax
* Prioritize Idaho businesses in state contracts
* Support family farms
* Fight corporate cronyism and corruption
* Eliminate special interest tax incentives
* Enforce state procurement laws
* End pension spiking
* Adopt "revolving door" policy (lobbyist cooling period)
* Reduce taxes and regulations
* Reduce unemployment taxes
* Eliminate sales tax on groceries
* Reduce property taxes
* Reduce unfunded mandates on local government
* Restrict the growth of local budgets
* Reduce occupational licensing mandates
4. Constitutional Rights
* Defend freedom of speech against "cancel culture"
* Protect the right to worship freely
* Uphold the right to keep and bear arms
* Make Idaho a "2nd Amendment Sanctuary State"
* Oppose all forms of "red flag laws"
* Defend the presumption of innocence in self-defense cases
* Prevent the enforcement of unconstitutional federal gun laws
* Incentivize the increased production of firearms and ammo in Idaho
5. State Sovereignty
* Reduce Idaho's financial dependence on federal dollars
* Eliminate administrative rules that conflict with Idaho's constitution or statutes
* Productively manage Idaho lands
6. Energy Independence
* Encourage responsible development of rare earth minerals
* Encourage expanded research at INL to promote the development of safe and renewable energy resources
* Reopen the University of Idaho School of Mines
* Oppose breaching dams
7. Military and Defense
* Defend our National Guard against being called up to fight in undeclared wars
* Remove vaccine mandates for National Guard
* Support our veterans
* Establish a State Guard under Idaho control to aid in border defense and riot control
8. Office of the Governor
* Restore the constitutional balance of power within the Executive Branch
* Implement an Idaho-First customer service model for all state agencies
* Revise executive emergency powers to prevent protracted declarations of emergency
9. Education
* Support expanded opportunities for school choice
* Fix Idaho's public school curriculum
* Eliminate all trace of Common Core
* Return to the basics of education
* Reading, writing, and arithmetic
* American civics
* Idaho history
* Remove CRT and other Marxist elements
* Prioritize skills-based training
10. Traditional Conservative Values
* Defend the right to life
* Recognize that life begins at conception
* Encourage the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ and _Planned Parenthood v. Casey_
* Support legislative efforts to curtail and restrict abortion
* Defend children against abusive medical procedures
* Protect children from obscene materials and unlawful sex education in public schools
* Support parental rights

---
|
---

clean_body: On Thursday, I held a press conference at the Idaho Capitol to introduce My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho. | | | | | | | Dear Friends, | On Thursday, I held a press conference at the Idaho Capitol to introduce My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho. The full vision is available in this email and online at . You can watch a video of my press conference below: | "Janice McGeachin's Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho!" Click above to watch the video | | Update on Baby Cyrus Situation: Because of the grace of God and your prayers and support—Baby Cyrus is now home with his family! Unfortunately, the fight is not over. The adjudicatory hearing is on April 8th, and if we don’t continue this fight, it is still possible for the state to take him away again! We will continue to monitor this situation and to seek nothing less than permanent reunification. Read more . | | My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho 1. Health Freedom End medical tyranny Prohibit medical mandates Prohibit experimental vaccines on our children Implement affordable free-market alternatives to Obamacare Investigate all arrests and enforcement actions for violating Little's lockdown Return the money that Idahoans were fined for violating Little's lockdown Rein in abusive overreach by CPS that violates constitutional and parental rights 2. Election Integrity Continue supporting a 50-state audit of the 2020 election Make Idaho a model state for election integrity Enact strict voter ID requirements Ensure accurate voter lists Guarantee Idahoans the right to vote in person Adopt tamper-proof paper ballots Prohibit federal interference in Idaho elections 3. Idaho's Economy Support small businesses Recognize that ALL businesses are essential Eliminate the corporate income tax Prioritize Idaho businesses in state contracts Support family farms Fight corporate cronyism and corruption Eliminate special interest tax incentives Enforce state procurement laws End pension spiking Adopt "revolving door" policy (lobbyist cooling period) Reduce taxes and regulations Reduce unemployment taxes Eliminate sales tax on groceries Reduce property taxes Reduce unfunded mandates on local government Restrict the growth of local budgets Reduce occupational licensing mandates 4. Constitutional Rights Defend freedom of speech against "cancel culture" Protect the right to worship freely Uphold the right to keep and bear arms Make Idaho a "2nd Amendment Sanctuary State" Oppose all forms of "red flag laws" Defend the presumption of innocence in self-defense cases Prevent the enforcement of unconstitutional federal gun laws Incentivize the increased production of firearms and ammo in Idaho 5. State Sovereignty Reduce Idaho's financial dependence on federal dollars Eliminate administrative rules that conflict with Idaho's constitution or statutes Productively manage Idaho lands 6. Energy Independence Encourage responsible development of rare earth minerals Encourage expanded research at INL to promote the development of safe and renewable energy resources Reopen the University of Idaho School of Mines Oppose breaching dams 7. Military and Defense Defend our National Guard against being called up to fight in undeclared wars Remove vaccine mandates for National Guard Support our veterans Establish a State Guard under Idaho control to aid in border defense and riot control 8. Office of the Governor Restore the constitutional balance of power within the Executive Branch Implement an Idaho-First customer service model for all state agencies Revise executive emergency powers to prevent protracted declarations of emergency 9. Education Support expanded opportunities for school choice Fix Idaho's public school curriculum Eliminate all trace of Common Core Return to the basics of education Reading, writing, and arithmetic American civics Idaho history Remove CRT and other Marxist elements Prioritize skills-based training 10. Traditional Conservative Values Defend the right to life Recognize that life begins at conception Encourage the overturn of Roe v. Wade and Planned Parenthood v. Casey Support legislative efforts to curtail and restrict abortion Defend children against abusive medical procedures Protect children from obscene materials and unlawful sex education in public schools Support parental rights | | Please donate , , or today, so that we can continue to spread the word about My Conservative Vision for a Free and Prosperous Idaho. | "DONATE Today!" | Sincerely, Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor | P.S.** Please if you are able, to see our unique merchandise, and us on social media, and to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 by Janice for Idaho, All rights reserved. body:
Team – I wanted to personally reach out. I know you’ve gotten a ton of emails from my team over the past three days. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is only a few hours away, and we’re just short of reaching our goal. I just checked in with the folks over at HQ, and we’re just $805 away from reaching our mid-month goal. Meeting these goals ensures my team has what they need to reach voters and keep us competitive! We are so close, folks, so can you help us close the gap? You can donate by clicking this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TeamQuaye**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43126430/335829420/-370498100?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.18_b2_qvi_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWJkMTIwYy0xNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9tw5Wj8-8ooAzhVRs2P7IOhLVnnfE1gDHuSaZx9kLU=) One Team. One Fight. – Quaye
